title: Social Media Distribution & Creator Ops Coordinator
description:
ROLE: Distribution & Creator Ops Coordinator

TYPE: Long-term if you're strong



WHO THIS IS FOR

This is for someone organized, sharp, reliable, and internet-native.

You do NOT need to be a polished corporate social media manager.

But you DO need to be good at keeping lots of moving pieces under control.



WHO WE ARE

We're building a content-led app growth engine.

We source short-form content, post it through our own account network, test volume,

and double down on what performs.



We need someone to help run the distribution side of that machine.



We operate in 2 lanes:



PIPELINE A

- we post content through our own account network

- this can mean many accounts per app

- content must be queued, scheduled, posted, and tracked cleanly



PIPELINE B

- creators post through their own channels under agreed deal terms

- someone has to make sure they actually post, send proof, and get logged properly



This role helps hold both lanes together.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

1. Schedule short-form content across multiple TikTok / Instagram accounts

2. Keep owned-account posting queues full across many accounts, not just one brand page

3. Coordinate what gets posted on which account, in which market, and when

4. Track captions, sounds, posting notes, and content status cleanly

5. Follow up with Pipeline B creators and confirm their posts actually go live

6. Collect posting proof, links, and status updates from creator deals

7. Monitor account health and flag anything unusual fast

8. Record simple daily / weekly reports on what shipped, what posted, and what performed

9. Help identify winners, losers, and useful content patterns



THIS ROLE IS NOT

- being the face of the brand

- making aesthetic Canva posts all day

- writing fluffy brand strategy decks

- replying to every comment like a community manager

- generic VA admin support



This role is posting operations + creator follow-through + account coordination + clean analysis.



WHAT MAKES SOMEONE GOOD AT THIS

- you are very organized without being slow

- you can handle repetitive work without becoming messy

- you notice patterns in content performance

- you understand how TikTok / IG content actually feels native

- you can keep multiple accounts and queues clean at the same time

- you can chase creators politely and keep them accountable

- you communicate clearly and do not disappear



REQUIRED

- Good written English

- Comfortable using TikTok and Instagram daily

- Comfortable with scheduling tools, spreadsheets, and trackers

- Stable internet and a laptop

- Can work consistently and hit posting deadlines

- Strong attention to detail

- Comfortable managing lots of moving content across multiple accounts



NICE TO HAVE

- experience scheduling content for TikTok / IG / Shorts

- experience with Publer, Buffer, Metricool, Later, or similar tools

- experience tracking content performance in Sheets / Notion

- experience working with lots of content assets and file naming systems

- basic understanding of account health / shadowban / posting risk

- experience following up with creators, affiliates, or partners to make sure deliverables went live



HOW TO APPLY

Do NOT send a long cover letter.

Keep it clean and follow instructions.



1. Subject line must start with: POSTING



2. Send a 60-90 second Loom or selfie video answering these:

- your name, age, and city

- why this role fits you

- how you would stay organized if you had to manage 10+ social accounts at once

- how you would make sure creators in a posting deal actually publish on time

- one thing you think separates a strong TikTok post from a weak one



3. In the written part of your application, include:

- your TikTok and Instagram links

- any tools you have used for posting / scheduling / tracking

- your current work situation

- how many hours/week you can give us

- the words: CONTENT QUEUE

- one short paragraph on how you would report what content is working each week

- one short paragraph on how you would track both:

  a) creator posts on their own channels

  b) posts going out on our owned accounts



4. If shortlisted, we'll send you a paid trial task.



IMPORTANT

If you miss the keyword, the Loom, or the social links, we will not review the application.



We are looking for someone reliable, sharp, and calm under volume.

If that's you, apply.

title: Video Editor for Ecommerce Dropshipping (Meta Ads Specialist)
description:
Are YOU an experienced video editor specializing in Meta Ads for physical products and dropshipping? Can you look at a competitor’s winning ad and immediately understand how to replicate it technically, or transform a script into a winning creative using the most advanced AI tools? If you answered an enthusiastic “YES” to both questions above, KEEP READING.

We run multiple international companies in the ecommerce and education space and we’re looking for a Video Editor (Meta Ads Specialist) to join our creative team.

We need someone to take responsibility for:

Sales-Focused Ad Production: Crafting clean, high-conversion ads (1 to 5 minutes) including Mini-VSLs, AI-UGC, and "Product in Hand" content.

Asset Management & Sourcing: You will be provided with a folder of our selected B-rolls. However, if additional clips are needed, you must source them autonomously and innovatively. The use of traditional stock footage (Shutterstock, Envato, etc.) is strictly FORBIDDEN.

From Script to Finished Product: We provide the scripts; your job is to interpret them visually, choosing the right clips and editing them to create a dynamic, persuasive, and technically flawless product.

AI Tool Research & Implementation: This is your passion. You must stay constantly updated on new AI releases (editing, UGC avatars, video generation). In our weekly calls, we expect you to pitch new software that can revolutionize our workflow.

AI Asset Generation: Hands-on use of the AI Stack (Higgsfield, Sora 2, Veo 3, Arcads, MakeUGC) to create or enhance content.

Visual Optimization: Implementing textual hooks, kinetic typography, and scroll-stopping subtitles.

Position Requirements:

At least 2 years of specific experience: A solid background in Meta Ads for ecommerce brands. You must have worked as an editor for brands generating at least $10k/month in revenue. While respecting privacy, you will be asked to provide examples of these collaborations in the following stages.

Deep Passion for Innovation: This isn't just a job; you must love technology. We want an AI "killer" who stays ahead of the market.

Excellent Problem-Solving Skills: If instructions aren't crystal clear or assets are missing, you don't stop. You find a solution and complete the task with excellence.

Availability & Commitment: Starting with a part-time collaboration (20h/week) with a clear intention of moving to Full-Time shortly. We work 5 days a week, but availability on Saturdays and Sundays is required for emergencies. Please note: we are looking for a dedicated partner, not an "Upwork or Fiverr style" freelancer juggling 5-6 different companies. If you cannot guarantee us top priority and absolute mental focus, do not apply.

Obsessive Precision & Anti-Mediocrity: Subtitles, cuts, and details must be perfect. Mediocrity is not allowed in our team.

Fluent in English: The team communicates in English. Deep proficiency is mandatory to manage multilingual content (IT, FR, ES, DE, NL).

What We Offer:

Performance Bonuses: Potential for bonuses up to $1000+ per month based on the results of the videos produced.

Career Growth: A real opportunity to become Head of Video Editing.

Active Involvement: You will actively participate in the growth of an international company, testing the most powerful AI tools on the market.

title: Operations Support Coordinator
description:
Operations Support Coordinator 



American Standard Adhesives, Inc. 



Remote  |  Full-Time  |  Fixed PST Hours 



Reports To: Owner 



Works Closely With: Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist 



Department: Operations 



Status: Full-Time 



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–4:00 PM PST or 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST 



Location: Remote (PST hours required) 



 



About the Company 



American Standard Adhesives, Inc. (ASA) is a U.S.-based manufacturer and distributor of industrial adhesive products, serving a diverse base of customers across multiple industries. Our lean team plays a critical role in keeping our day-to-day operations running smoothly and our customers well-served. 



1. Position Summary 



The Operations Support Coordinator is a senior supportive role that helps the Owner run the day-to-day operational workflow of American Standard Adhesives. This person owns the repetitive, structured, and recurring tasks across the operation, and serves as a coordination point between back office, warehouse, accounting, and sales support functions. 



This is a support role, not a decision-making role. The Owner retains all final decision-making authority over pricing, commitments, disputes, personnel, and policy. The Operations Support Coordinator is empowered to execute within established SOPs and Work Instructions, to coordinate across teams, and to escalate exceptions promptly. 



The Operations Support Coordinator works side-by-side with the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist, who manages the day-to-day order workflow. This role requires a working understanding of the order processing function so that coverage, overflow, and escalation handling are seamless. 



2. Key Responsibilities 



A. Order & Back Office Coordination — ~30% 



Support the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist with order flow, including purchase order handling, invoicing, and customer acknowledgments. 



Monitor the open order queue daily; flag bottlenecks and aging orders to the Owner. 



Coordinate between back office and warehouse on daily outbound orders. 



Maintain visibility across online and third-party platforms, as well as direct customer order channels. 



Provide coverage for the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist during absences or peak volume. 



B. Shipping & Warehouse Coordination — ~20% 



Coordinate shipping label creation and communicate with the warehouse on daily picking and shipping. 



Coordinate parcel and pallet shipments across all channels. 



Liaise with the warehouse team on picking and shipping. 



Ensure shipping documentation is accurate and filed. 



Confirm end-of-day shipment closure with the warehouse through direct communication. 



C. Import & Vendor Coordination — ~15% 



Support recurring import workflows, including container tracking and customs follow-up. 



Manage the vendor
 channel: monitoring, routing, and filing per company work instructions. 



Maintain vendor files and supporting documentation. 



Draft vendor communications for Owner review when commitments are involved. 



D. Compliance, Insurance & Risk — ~10% 



Coordinate contractor file tracking, insurance certificate collection, and renewal calendars. 



Support tenant verification and related compliance workflows where applicable. 



Keep compliance records organized per company file-naming guidelines. 



E. Recurring Administrative & Systems Tasks — ~15% 



File and folder organization across company systems, per internal guidelines. 



Accounting system data entry support (bookkeeping execution only — not financial decisions). 



Pull and format operational and margin reports for Owner review. 



Maintain quality assurance and product documentation. 



Support system administration tasks under Owner direction. 



F. Project-Based & Ad Hoc Support — ~10% 



Support insurance renewals, hiring and recruitment coordination, and SOP documentation. 



Prepare case or claim files for Owner review. 



Handle time-sensitive special tasks requiring independent follow-up within pre-approved scope. 



3. Authority & Decision Boundaries 



This is an execution and coordination role, not a decision-making role. Clarity here protects the business and the person in the role. 



The Operations Support Coordinator MAY: 



Execute any task covered by an existing Work Instruction or SOP. 



Coordinate teammates, vendors, and carriers within pre-approved scope. 



Draft communications, quotations, and documents for Owner review. 



Flag exceptions, risks, and decision points upward promptly and in writing. 



Provide data, summaries, and recommendations to help the Owner d
 faster. 



The Operations Support Coordinator MAY NOT (without Owner approval): 



Approve pricing, discounts, credit terms, or payment terms. 



Commit the company to vendor contracts, service agreements, or long-term arrangements. 



Approve refunds, returns outside written policy, or customer concessions. 



Approve hiring, terminations, promotions, or compensation changes. 



Change SOPs, policies, or approve new processes without written Owner sign-off. 



Resolve disputes involving material money, legal exposure, or customer retention. 



When in doubt, escalate. Speed and clarity of escalation is valued over independent judgment on gray-area items. 



4. Qualifications 



Required 



Minimum 5 years of professional experience in operations, logistics, customer service, or back office support. 



Working knowledge of general accounting software, shipping software, Microsoft 365 (Teams, SharePoint, Outlook, Excel), and business phone systems. 



Strong English communication — written and spoken — with a clear, concise, professional tone. 



Proven ability to follow SOPs and Work Instructions precisely. 



Excellent organization; able to work within existing file naming and folder structures without disturbing them. 



Disciplined on escalation: knows what to d
, what to ask, and what to document. 



Ability to handle a mix of repetitive and non-repetitive tasks with minimal supervision. 



Preferred 



Import/export or logistics coordination exposure. 



Industrial supply, distribution, or manufacturing background. 



Experience supporting an owner-operated small or mid-size business. 



Analytical or accounting background. 



5. What We’re Looking For 



Highly organized with strong attention to detail. 



Proactive communicator who flags issues early rather than letting them escalate. 



Reliable, self-managed, and comfortable in a fast-paced, lean team environment. 



Comfortable managing multiple priorities and shifting tasks throughout the day. 



Mature judgment — knows when to act, when to ask, and when to escalate. 



Operates well under clear boundaries and is comfortable supporting, not leading. 



6. Success Metrics (First 90 Days) 



Zero preventable shipping errors. 



Vendor
 inbox processed daily with no unrouted items older than 24 hours. 



Daily visibility of order queue status reported to the Owner. 



Backup coverage established for the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist on core order workflow tasks. 



All escalations documented with context and a recommended next step. 



7. Reporting & Working Relationships 



Reports directly to the Owner. 



Works daily alongside the Customer Service & Order Processing Specialist. 



Coordinates with the warehouse team, accounting, and service / vendor contacts. 



Escalates customer or partner-facing decisions to the Owner. 



8. Schedule Requirements 



Full-time, Monday–Friday. 



Fixed PST schedule: 8:00 AM–4:00 PM PST or 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST. 



No flexi-time or alternative schedules. 



Must be fully available during PST business hours. 



9. Compensation 



Competitive rate based on experience. 



Long-term, stable engagement with room to grow.

title: Full-Time VA to Manage Online Art Business (Work From Home)
description:
About the Business



We are launching an online art business that will showcase and sell original artwork and high-quality prints from talented artists. Customers will be able to buy directly, bid on artwork, and order printed merchandise through Printify.

We want this business to run smoothly with minimal owner involvement — so we are looking for an experienced, highly responsible VA to manage the daily operations.



Responsibilities



The VA will be in charge of running the business day to day, including:

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Would you be interested in a full

We have built an incredible Filipino VA team that all exhibit our 3 core values; trust, respect and honesty.



We are very selective over who we hire, as we want people that want to join, and stay with us for the long term. 



The spine of our business has been with us for several years; if you are planning to work others jobs alongside this, this role isn't for you.



The most important thing we're looking for in a Virtual Assistant is someone with a great attitude, fantastic organisational skills and ownership/thinking outside of the box.



The kind of person that truly enjoys working as part of a team, has dynamism and a willingness to learn. 



The role will be quite bespoke, and full training will be provided. 



You will also have a mentor assigned to you specifically for as long as you need. 



Above all, you’ll get the opportunity to make a really meaningful impact in a growing business!



The requirement will be for 40 hours a week between Monday and Friday, as well 8 hours between Saturday and Sunday, so 48 hours in total (UK time zone).

Suraj Basra

title: Creative Strategist
description:
We’re looking for a creative, research-driven Creative Strategist who wants to grow long-term with our team as we scale digital ecommerce and SaaS businesses. You will spend 100% of your time researching new creatives for Meta ads, writing ad scripts, communicating with UGC creators and video editors, and finding inspiration from competitors and people in other industries.



We’ve been building in SaaS and ecommerce for 5+ years, and we are now doubling down on digital products, starting with 
 and several additional projects currently in development.



If you love creative strategy, testing new ad angles aggressively, and pushing the boundaries of direct response marketing, this role is for you.



ABOUT THIS ROLE:

You will be responsible for researching, ideating, and producing high-performing ad creatives, primarily for Meta ads. Our goal is to drive profitable front-end acquisition consistently at scale (2+ ROAS) through innovative, high-converting creative concepts.



You will not just write scripts, you will also lead creative experimentation, working with UGC creators, video editors, and AI UGC tools to produce breakthrough direct response ads. You’re also welcome to edit videos yourself when you have the time and interest.



THIS ROLE IS FOR SOMEONE WHO:

Lives and breathes creative strategy, loves researching ad trends and competitor campaigns, and wants to test new hooks, scripts, and angles aggressively. You should be comfortable communicating with creators and editors, and want to grow long-term with a team that takes initiative and constantly looks for new creative opportunities.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Your main focus will be researching new creatives for Meta ads daily, writing compelling ad scripts and hooks, and coordinating with UGC creators and video editors to bring those ideas to life. A big part of the job is finding inspiration on x.com, studying competitors, and looking at people in completely different industries for fresh angles.



You’ll constantly try new ways of creating ads, including AI UGC, and you’ll lead creative strategy and production end-to-end. If you have time and interest, you can also jump into video editing yourself.



REQUIREMENTS:

You should have real experience with creative strategy for direct response ads, writing ad scripts and hooks that convert, and managing UGC creators and content workflows. A strong understanding of Meta Ads creative best practices, plus a habit of researching trends and competitor ads, is essential. You’ll also need to communicate clearly with video editors and creators, and love running creative experiments.



YOU SHOULD ALSO:

Be open-minded and eager to try new creative approaches, active on x.com and following ad industry trends, highly proactive and independent, with strong creative thinking and writing skills.



HIGHLY PREFERRED EXPERIENCE:

Experience working with or producing creative for quiz-funnel based subscription brands, such as BetterMe, Coursiv, Hint, Astroline, Nebula, Simple Life App, Reverse Health, MadMuscles, Liven, or similar quiz-funnel driven digital subscription brands.



Big plus if you also know a skilled video editor who could work full or part time for us.



COMPENSATION:

Starting salary is $1200/month based on experience and track record, with performance-based bonuses and long-term growth opportunities. Our goal is to build a small but extremely strong team that can scale multiple subscription businesses together over the next several years.



HOW TO APPLY:

When applying, please include:

- Your resume

- Your experience with creative strategy and ad production

- Examples of ad scripts or hooks you've written

- Types of Meta ad campaigns you've worked on

- Results you've achieved (CTR, conversion rates, etc.)

- Your experience with UGC creators and video editors

- Examples of creative angles or campaigns you’ve developed



Applications without specific creative examples may not be reviewed. If you're a serious Creative Strategist who wants to push boundaries in direct response marketing, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Senior Accounts Manager
description:
Elite Trades Australia is a Melbourne-based plumbing, electrical, and heat pump business running high job volume through Xero and ServiceM8. We are growing quickly and need a strong accounts operator who can take full ownership of the accounts function and give the Director clear weekly financial visibility.



The Role:

This is a hands-on, high-ownership role. You will take control of the day-to-day accounts function of a fast-moving Australian trades business, with responsibility across invoicing, debtors, payroll, accounts payable, reconciliations, weekly cash reporting, and short-term forecasting.

You will not be stepping into a perfect system. We want someone experienced enough to bring discipline, follow-through, control, and clear financial reporting to a busy environment.

Your focus will be on Elite Trades Australia first. Once the business is stable and the systems are running properly, there will be an opportunity to grow with us and support expansion into Elite Energy Aus.



What You Will Own:

- Invoicing completed jobs from ServiceM8 into Xero with no unnecessary backlog

- Debtor management, including statements, follow-up, and escalation of overdue accounts

- End-to-end payroll, including STP, super, leave tracking, and payroll accuracy

- Accounts payable, including supplier invoice processing and payment preparation

- Weekly bank reconciliations and clean Xero records

- A weekly cash position report for the Director showing:

  1. cash in bank

  2. expected inflows over the next 7–14 days

  3. committed outflows over the next 7–14 days

  4. overdue debtors

  5. upcoming payroll, super, and major supplier payments

- A rolling short-term cash flow forecast updated weekly

- Basic weekly reporting on revenue invoiced, cash collected, and outstanding receivables

- Maintaining discipline between ServiceM8 and Xero and flagging workflow issues early

- Identifying gaps, delays, and data issues that affect invoicing, reporting, and cash flow



Requirements:

- Minimum 4 years of hands-on accounts experience with Australian businesses

- Strong Xero experience

- Proven Australian payroll experience, including STP, super, and leave accruals

- Strong experience in accounts receivable, accounts payable, and reconciliations

- Experience preparing weekly cash reports, cash flow visibility, or short-term forecasting for a business owner

- Excellent written English

- Strong attention to detail and proactive communication

- Ability to manage your workload independently and raise issues early

- Mandatory availability to work full-time from 9:00a
lbourne, Australia time, Monday to Friday



Highly Regarded:

- Xero certification

- ServiceM8 experience

- Trades, construction, or high-volume service business experience

- BAS preparation experience

- Experience building simple reporting dashboards in Excel or Google Sheets



What We Offer:

- Long-term full-time role

- Direct access to the Director

- Real ownership and accountability

- A role where your reporting directly helps management make decisions

- Clear growth path as the business expands



To Apply:

To be considered, your application must include all of the following:

1. A short cover letter explaining your experience with Australian payroll, Xero, debtor management, weekly reporting, and cash flow forecasting

2. Your resume

3. Your Xero certification, if held, or a clear summary of your hands-on Xero experience

4. Confirmation that you are available to work from 9:00a
lbourne time, Monday to Friday

5. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) covering:

- your background

- your experience with Australian accounts and payroll

- the types of businesses you have worked with

- your experience with weekly reporting and forecasting

- why you are a good fit for this role



Please send the following to: 



Applications missing the video introduction will not be reviewed.

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

You flag issues early, own mistakes quickly, and ask for clarification when needed.



Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.



Experienced in Fast-Paced Admin or Scheduling

Background in administrative, dispatch, logistics, scheduling, or operations-heavy roles is

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM U.S. Central Time

- Reliable internet with backup

- Dedicated workspace

- Backup power options in case of outages

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

1. Complete our Culture Index survey: 

2. Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value you most resonate with (ALL CAPS).

3. Use a minimum of 5 Apply Points when applying

4. In your application message, include one sentence describing the most repetitive task you have performed at a high standard for 6+ months.



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Support Specialist
description:
APPLICANTS WITH PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE IN CUSTOMER OR TECHNICAL SUPPORT FOR POS (POINT-OF-SALE) OR PMS (PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS) WITHIN THE HOSPITALITY INDUSTRY (HOTELS & RESTAURANTS) WILL BE PRIORITIZED.





To apply, please follow the steps below:

About the Position:

We are looking for a motivated and independent Support Specialist for a Shared Team with a strong work ethic and the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively. In this role, you will support our customers across phone,
, and chat, ensuring a seamless and high-quality customer experience.

, and chat in a timely manner.

Work Schedule:

title: Growth Marketing Manager (Remote)
description:
About Us



7 years in business. 3x net profit growth in 2025. Bootstrapped, profitable, zero debt. We sell premium security cameras (~$500) across North America and we're launching multiple new products this year. We need someone to own the daily execution of our marketing engine. We already have the strategy, the positioning, and the team. What we need is the person who runs the revenue engine every day — someone who lives inside Google Ads, Meta Ads, and Klaviyo and turns good strategy into measurable growth. You work under our Head of Growth & Marketing who owns messaging, positioning, and creative direction. She d
 what we say. You d
 where we say it, how much we spend, and whether it's working.



You are responsible for translating strategy into execution and closing the loop between performance data and daily actions. You are not defining positioning or creative direction, but you are expected to understand it deeply and apply it correctly across all channels.



What you'll own



Paid acquisition — daily, hands-on management of 5-figure monthly ad spend across Google and Meta. You're in the accounts every week adjusting bids, launching creatives, killing losers, scaling winners. This is not a "set direction and delegate" role — you are the executor. You'll work closely with the Head of Growth to ensure creative is executed and tested correctly across campaigns. Provide clear feedback on what is performing and why, based on data.

 and retention in Klaviyo — build and optimize all flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back). Run campaigns. This is a major priority from day one. Continuously optimize flows based on performance data and customer behavior, improving conversion, repeat purchase rate, and revenue per user.

SEO — work alongside our copywriter to improve organic rankings, product page indexing, blog content strategy, and schema implementation. Ensure content aligns with product positioning and high-intent search behavior, and track impact on traffic quality and conversion.

Attribution and analytics — maintain a clear view of performance across channels, identifying gaps between platform-reported and actual results. Gaps need to be visible. Provide weekly insights that directly report budget allocation and showcase optimization suggestions.

CRO and testing — work with our designer to test headlines, CTAs, trust signals, BNPL messaging. Monitor Hotjar. Identify friction. Fix it. Prioritize tests based on impact and speed, and ensure learnings are documented and applied across channels.

Post-purchase revenue — configure upsells, manage the referral program, coordinate review generation with our Head of CX. Track impact on LTV and repeat purchase behavior, and continuously improve post-purchase experience to support retention and referrals.

Affiliate program — maintain commission tiers, audit for coupon leakage, track affiliate-driven revenue. Evaluate performance based on incremental revenue and maintain control over discounting and margin impact.

Automation — identify and implement workflow automations that save the team time across marketing operations. Focus on reducing manual work and increasing execution speed across the marketing workflow.

Weekly marketing report — delivered every Monday. Revenue, MER, attribution gap, CAC by country, conversion rate,
 share, creative status, flags. No misses. Reports must be actionable, with clear recommendations FROM YOU TO THE HEAD OF GROWTH on what to scale, reduce, or test next.

Execution speed and iteration — operate with high velocity. Launch, test, and iterate continuously across channels. Weekly improvements are expected, and speed of execution is a key part of the role.

System awareness — Understand how each channel contributes to the full funnel and optimize based on business performance, not isolated channel metrics. Ensure execution across paid, retention, SEO, and CRO is aligned.

Team coordination — direct to Head of Growth

Who we're looking for



You've personally managed Google Ads AND Meta Ads for DTC/ecommerce at $30K+/month combined

You've built Klaviyo flows yourself. Not directed someone. You can open Klaviyo right now and build a conditional abandoned cart sequence

Physical product experience at $200+ AOV. Selling a $500 camera to a skeptical 55-year-old rancher is a different game than supplements or SaaS

Specific communicator. Your reports say "shift $150/day from Campaign X (1.8x) to Campaign Y (4.2x)" — not "optimize the account"

You push back when you disagree. We'd rather debate and get it right than defer and get it wrong

You understand that creative is a key driver of performance and can identify what is working based on data, even if you are not the one defining the creative direction

You are comfortable operating within a structured system where strategy and direction are defined, and your role is to execute, optimize, and improve performance within that framework

Not the right fit if



You call yourself a strategist who delegates execution. This role IS execution

You focus JUST on channel metrics without connecting them to business performance

Your experience is Meta-only with no real Google depth. Google is 72% of our spend

You've never questioned whether ad platform data is accurate

You expect full ownership of strategy, positioning, or creative direction. Your inputs will lead decisions, but it's not a decision fully owned by your scope of work

Your background is all low-AOV products under $100

How we work



Fully remote, flexible schedule with team overlap hours

You report to our Head of Growth & Marketing. She sets direction, you execute and provide strategic input

Daily marketing sync with Head of Growth & Marketing and weekly with CEO

Hubstaff for time tracking and transparency — everyone uses it, no exceptions

Fast decisions. You flag it, we discuss, we move



How to Apply

We do not accept applications through OnlineJobs.ph messaging. To be considered, please complete our application form here:

title: Animator/Motion/Editor/Design
description:
Summary

We're looking for a motion animator to work with Scale Ads Agency on short-form video content, product demos, and animated ad creatives for DTC brands.

This is a startup opportunity. We are growing fast and as our volume grows, so does your workload and earning potential. If you're talented, reliable, and hungry, this can turn into a serious ongoing stream of work very quickly.

?? PRICE IS NOT LISTED INTENTIONALLY. WE WILL DISCUSS YOUR RATE ON A CALL BASED ON YOUR SKILL LEVEL AND EXPERIENCE. DO NOT LET PRICE STOP YOU FROM APPLYING.

???? What You'll Be Working On



Short-form motion animated videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and paid ads

Smooth product demo animations that make the product feel premium

Seamless scene transitions with clean timing and intentional pacing

AI-assisted animation and motion work using modern tools

Content that feels polished, sleek, and platform-native



The style we are going for is best described as: clean, cinematic, smooth. Think fluid UI reveals, soft motion graphics, and product demos that feel like they belong in a high-end tech ad. Reference: Base44's ad style on YouTube.

???? Who You Are

This matters just as much as your portfolio.



You are proactive. You don't wait to be told what to do next, you think ahead and move

You are enthusiastic about motion and animation. This is your craft, not just a gig

You can think independently. When you hit a problem, you find a solution before asking for help

You take genuine pride in your output. You don't submit work you wouldn't be proud of

You are comfortable experimenting with new AI animation tools and actively stay up to date with what's emerging

You are a go-getter who sees a growing agency as an opportunity, not just a paycheck

You understand that starting lean with a startup means big upside as the operation scales

You have strong English communication skills. Written and spoken. We brainstorm together, we give feedback, we execute fast, and none of that works without clear communication. This is non-negotiable.



????? What We Need You To Be Skilled In



Motion animation for short-form video content

Smooth, seamless transitions that don't feel jarring or cheap

Product demo animations that highlight features visually and cleanly

Familiarity and comfort with AI video and animation tools (CapCut AI, Runway, Kling, Higgsfield, or similar)

Strong sense of timing, pacing, and visual flow

Ability to match a reference style quickly without needing constant direction



? This Role Is NOT For You If



You only know basic editing with no real animation experience

You are not keeping up with AI tools in the motion space

You need hand-holding on every project

You treat deadlines as suggestions

You are looking for a one-off job with no interest in growing



???? The Opportunity

We are a growing performance marketing agency and we are building out our creative production arm. Right now the volume is starting up, but it adds up fast. Animators who deliver quality work consistently will have more videos coming their way than they can handle.

We are a startup. We are honest about that. But startups that grow take their best people with them, and that is exactly what we intend to do.

???? How to Apply

Please include:



2 to 4 examples of your motion animation or product demo work

A note on which AI tools you are currently using or comfortable with

Your general availability per week



Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a short call to discuss fit, style, and rate.

title: Supply Chain Analyst
description:
unybrands was founded in 2020 by a group of partners who shared a common vision to create the leading next-generation e-commerce platform for micro-brands. The company operates globally, with our headquarters located in Miami and additional teams based in Berlin, London, New York, Seattle and Shanghai.  



unybrands acquires e-commerce brands that operate on and off Amazon. unybrands integrates the brands into its platform, optimizes the business operations and economics, and expands to new product lines and geographies. With us, e-commerce brands reach new heights with expert operators and infrastructure.  



The Supply Chain Analyst will be supporting the leading the team that manages distribution supply chain across multiple micro-brands. They will work closely with micro-brand business teams, procurement team and senior management to spearhead inventory flows across a tiered supply chain.





Key Responsibilities:



1. Purchase Order Management

    Create and manage Purchase Orders (POs) in coordination with procurement and inventory planning teams.

    Monitor POs for accuracy, delivery timelines, and adherence to committed required dates (CRDs).

2. Inbound Shipment and Delivery Oversight

   Create and manage inbound shipments aligned with POs.

   Monitor 3PL partners and coordinate inbound deliveries to ensure timely and accurate receipt of goods.

   Track delivery performance and escalate any discrepancies.

3. Supplier Coordination and Communication

   Serve as the primary point of contact for suppliers regarding PO updates, delays, or escalations.

   Proactively follow up with suppliers for expedited orders or production status updates.

   Address and resolve supply-related issues in collaboration with internal teams.

4. Quality and Inspection Support

   Coordinate quality inspections upon delivery or prior to acceptance of goods.

   Report and assist in the resolution of any quality discrepancies found during inspections.

5. Performance Monitoring and Reporting

   Generate supply chain performance reports including PO status, supplier lead times, and inbound delivery metrics.

   Provide insights and recommendations for improving supply chain efficiency.





A successful tea
mber will have:  



1+ years of relevant experience working in a data-driven role, Supply Chain exposure is a plus

3+ months in the digital commerce ecosystem is a plus

Advance proficiency in Excel (including VBA, Pivot Tables, array functions, Power Pivots, etc.)

Problem solving skills, project management skills, attention to detail and exceptional organizational skills

Excellent business judgement and strong written and oral communication skills

Ability to thrive in a high energy/pace environment where tactical and strategic activities are expected to be driven in parallel

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Mathematics/Statistics, Industrial Engineering, Information Systems Management, or related field

title: Senior Sales Rep and Appointment Setter ($1,300/ month)
description:
Sales Rep and Appointment Setter

(B2B Outbound and Lead Generation Specialist)





Who we are



We are a fast growing performance marketing agency working with serious clients who spend substantial amount  per month on lead generation. We are expanding and need someone sharp, resourceful, and self driven to help us connect with the right prospects at scale.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and Founders. There are no layers between you and the people making decisions.





What this role is about



This is a pure outbound role. Your job is to find the right people, open conversations, and book qualified calls for the team. We will give you the target industries and ideal client profiles. From there, you own the process  building lists, writing outreach, following up, and filling the calendar.



If you need daily task lists, step by step instructions, or someone to tell you who to contact, this role is not right for you. If you thrive working independently, take ownership of your pipeline, and know how to write a message that actually gets a reply, keep reading.





Core responsibilities



>Build targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Search, and other research tools

>Send daily LinkedIn connection requests and follow up messages to qualified prospects

>Write and send personalized cold
s to high value leads

>Maintain clean, organized, and up to date prospect lists inside the CRM

>Follow up consistently across all active leads until there is a clear outcome

>Book discovery calls and coordinate scheduling for the founders

>Log all outreach activity accurately in ClickUp and the CRM daily

>Communicate updates, blockers, and wins clearly through Slack every day





Requirements



>Proven experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for identifying and reaching high value B2B leads

>Strong written English with the ability to write outreach messages that feel personal, not templated

>Experience with cold
 outreach including writing, sequencing, and follow up

>Comfortable working inside a CRM to manage and track your full pipeline

>Highly organized and able to manage a large number of active prospects simultaneously

>Takes initiative and works independently without needing to be chased

>Available full time during BST business hours





Bonus experience



>Background in B2B, SaaS, lead generation, or performance marketing industries

>Experience booking calls for a high ticket or agency offer

>Familiarity with outreach tools such as Apollo, Instantly, or Smartlead



Logic question  (Required)



You have been given a target industry: digital marketing agencies in the UK with 10 to 50 employees that are actively running paid ads for clients. You have LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Search, and Google Workspace available. You have no existing data and your first task is to book 5 discovery calls within 7 days.



Walk us through exactly what you would do from day one. How do you build your list, who do you target, what does your outreach message look like, and how do you follow up? Be specific.



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We want to see how you think, how you plan, and whether you can execute independently without being told every step.





Video introduction (Required)



Record a 2 to 3 minute video and upload to Loom or Google Drive. Include the link in your application. Cover who you are, your experience in outbound sales or appointment setting, a specific result you are proud of with real numbers, and why this role is the right fit for you right now.



***Read carefully before applying***



To confirm you have read this post in full and have the attention to detail this role requires, begin your cover letter with the exact phrase "I want to be lucky". Applications that do not open with this phrase will not be reviewed, regardless of experience.



Do not apply if...



>You need daily instructions and cannot build or manage your own outreach pipeline

>You copy and paste the same generic application for every role you apply to

>You cannot work full time during BST business hours

>You have no real experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator or cold
 outreach

>You are not comfortable being directly accountable to Founders and an Operations Manager





What we offer



>$6 to $8 USD per hour based on experience, reviewed after probation

>Full time remote position with a stable and growing agency

>Direct access to Founders and Operations Manager with no middle layers

>Long term opportunity to grow with the business as we scale

>A fast moving team that values output over process and respects people who take ownership





How to apply



Submit your CV + cover letter starting with the required phrase,  your logic question answer, and your Loom or Google Drive video link. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: URGENT! Senior Meta Ads Media Buyer ($2500/ Month )
description:

We are a fast growing performance marketing agency generating leads across multiple industries. Our campaigns are already live. This role is not about launching ads. It is about diving into active accounts, finding what is underperforming, and fixing it with precision.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and Founders. Your work will be seen and acted on immediately.

environment

title: Social Media UGC Sourcer Creator Research
description:
ROLE: UGC Sourcer / Creator Scout



TYPE: Long-term if you're good



WHO THIS IS FOR



- This is for someone who lives on TikTok, Instagram, and the internet in general.

- You do NOT need to be a corporate VA.

- You do NOT need to have years of experience.

- But you DO need to be sharp, fast, internet-native, and willing to learn.



WHO WE ARE



- We're building a content-driven app growth engine.

- Right now the first app is called Lockt.

- Lockt blocks distracting apps until the user walks their steps.

- Our job is to find normal creators who can film cheap raw iPhone clips for us.

- We post the content from our own accounts. We are paying for footage, not followers.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



1. Find creators on TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit who fit our app angles

2. Judge very quickly if someone is a fit or not

3. Add qualified leads to our tracker cleanly

4. DM qualified leads using our approved outreach

5. Update statuses every day so the pipeline stays clean

6. Send a short end-of-day report with numbers and learnings



THIS ROLE IS NOT



- customer support

- appointment setting

- generic admin work

- influencer management for big celebrities



It's internet research + creator sourcing + good judgment.



WHAT MAKES SOMEONE GOOD AT THIS



- you are naturally online and notice patterns fast

- you know what makes a person feel native on TikTok

- you can spot cringe / fake / over-produced content quickly

- you are comfortable doing repetitive work without getting sloppy

- you can follow a system but still think for yourself



REQUIRED



- Good written English

- Comfortable recording short Looms

- Comfortable using TikTok, Instagram, Reddit, Google Sheets / Notion

- Stable internet and a laptop

- Can work consistently, not disappear



NICE TO HAVE



- experience in sourcing, recruiting, lead gen, outreach, social media, or creator work

- experience finding people online for any role or offer

- understands Gen Z / 
 / app culture



PAY AND GROWTH



- $
/month to start depending on sharpness and availability

- paid bi-monthly via Wise

- performance bonuses can be added once you are producing real results

- path to full-time and bigger responsibility if you are strong



HOW TO APPLY



Do NOT send a long cover letter.

Keep it clean and follow instructions.



1. Subject line must start with: LOCKT



2. Send a 60-90 second Loom or selfie video answering these:

- your name, age, and city

- why this role fits you

- one TikTok / IG creator you think would be a good fit for Lockt and why

- what you think makes content high performing on TikTok, and how to scale this?



3. In the written part of your application, include:

- your TikTok and Instagram links

- your current work situation

- how many hours/week you can give us

- the words: SCREEN TIME

- 3 search keywords you would use to find Lockt-style creators



4. If shortlisted, we'll send you a paid trial task.



IMPORTANT

If you miss the keyword, the Loom, or the social links, we will not review the application.



We are looking for someone smart, hungry, and coachable.

If that's you, please apply.

title: Short-Form Content Editor + Strategist for Entrepreneur's Personal Brand (Long-Term Role)
description:
Looking for a full-time short-form content editor and strategist to run my personal brand across TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn, and Snap. I film the raw content daily, you handle everything else - editing, posting, scheduling, strategy, analytics, and comments. High volume, unfiltered style, long-term role with real growth potential.



ABOUT ME



I'm 19, live in Miami, and run an Amazon business as my main thing. I'm starting my personal brand from zero and have only posted one video. Planning to launch info products and mentorship down the line once there's an audience built up. I have the business side handled. I need someone to handle the content side.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You run my content. I film, you do everything else. Short-form first across TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn, and Snap. The vibe is Miami lifestyle, business, money, cars, and mindset. Unfiltered, lots of personality, cursing stays in.



For a broad sense of the style and space, think creators like TJR, Brez, Jordan Welch, Iman Gadzhi, Luke Belmar, Alex Hormozi, and Hamza Ahmed. Not trying to copy them, just gives you a general feel for the lane.



This is a long-term role. I'm not looking for someone for 3 months. If this grows the way I think it can, you'll eventually manage editors under you and be paid significantly more.



WHAT YOU'D DO



- Edit short-form clips daily and reformat across platforms

- Handle all posting and scheduling

- Write captions and hashtags

- Manage comments day-to-day

- Analyze what's working and what isn't

- Send me weekly filming briefs telling me what to film next, what topics to cover, and which comments deserve video replies

- Spot trends and adapt content to them

- Handle account security (proxies, VPN setup, whatever we need so posting from overseas doesn't throttle reach)

- Be proactive. I won't micromanage. You own the brand on socials.



WHAT I'D DO



- Film 30-45 minutes of raw content every day and drop it in a shared cloud folder

- One batch filming session per week (1-2 hours) for specific stuff you ask for - talking-head on a topic, car shoot, specific b-roll, whatever you need

- Be available for questions and feedback

- Pay for any tools, software, proxies, or subscriptions you need



POSTING VOLUME



I want volume. Starting target is 10+ posts a day across platforms within the first month, mostly TikTok. Growing to 15-25 posts a day over time. Most of that is the same core edits reformatted per platform, not 20 unique edits from scratch. If you think volume is a problem, this isn't the role for you.



PAY AND GROWTH



- Starts at $2,000-$2,500 per month depending on skill and experience

- Performance-based raises as we grow

- Bonuses when we hit milestones

- Real upward path if you stick around and perform



WHO I WANT



I don't need someone who's already the best. I need someone smart, motivated, fast, and hungry to become the best. If you're lazy or half-ass your work, don't apply, you'll waste both our time. If you take pride in what you make and actually care, I'll take care of you.



HOW TO APPLY



Answer these in your message:



1. Share your portfolio. Any format - Google Drive, website, Behance, whatever.



2. Have you ever personally worked for a creator or influencer? If yes, who, and what did you do for them?



3. Have you done short-form content before (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)? Give examples if you can.



4. Do you prefer editing short-form or long-form content, and why?



5. Have you ever been a content strategist, not just an editor? If yes, tell me about it.



6. Walk me through how you'd take a 5-minute raw video of me talking while walking down the street and turn it into short-form content. What's your actual thought process?



7. At the end of your message, write the word RISE in all caps. This confirms you read the full post.



Don't send a generic template. Job post closes 4/23 10AM PHT

title: Credit Repair Specialist – Disputes & Compliance
description:
Now Hiring: Experienced Credit Repair Specialist (Remote, Part-Time)



We are seeking an experienced Credit Repair Specialist to work alongside our company and manage credit repair clients from start to finish.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who understands consumer law, compliance, and strategic dispute handling, and can confidently manage client files with accuracy and professionalism.



Responsibilities



* Analyze full credit reports and identify negative, inaccurate, or questionable items

* Develop and execute customized dispute strategies based on each client’s report

* Handle disputes with all three credit bureaus and creditors

* Submit complaints through the CFPB and FTC when appropriate

* Use factual-based dispute methods rather than relying only on generic templates

* Maintain organized client files and provide consistent progress updates

* Ensure all work remains fully compliant with FCRA and consumer protection laws



Requirements



* Proven hands-on experience in credit repair is required

* Strong working knowledge of:

    * FCRA (Fair Credit Reporting Act)

    * FTC regulations

    * CFPB complaint process

* Ability to create effective, strategic dispute letters

* Clear understanding of compliance and legal boundaries in credit repair

* Strong organization, attention to detail, and ability to manage multiple clients at once



Bonus Skills



* Experience working inside a credit repair company or agency

* Knowledge of Metro 2 and credit reporting systems

* Familiarity with business credit



Position Details



* Remote

* Part-time to start, with opportunity for growth

* Must be reliable, responsive, organized, and results-driven



How to Apply



Please submit the following:



1. A summary of your credit repair experience

2. Examples of dispute strategies or results, if available

3. A brief explanation of how you approach negative items on a credit report



Required Application Task



To be considered, complete the following:



1. Scenario

A client has:



* 2 collections

* 1 charge-off

* 3 late payments



Explain your step-by-step strategy for handling these items.



2. Dispute Approach

Describe how you structure your disputes and explain your approach to factual-based disputing.



3. Compliance

Name 2–3 things you should NOT say or promise to a client.



Important



We are looking for someone who can produce results while remaining fully compliant. If you do not have real experience with consumer law, credit disputes, and compliance, this position is not a fit.



Applications without the completed task will not be considered.



Serious applicants only. Include the word “COMPLIANCE” in your response to be considered.

title: SEO / SEM / Online Marketplace Specialist
description:
Full time career opportunity – diverse B2B/B2C Digital Sales & Marketing role in consumer products – growing responsibilities

A great long term career opportunity awaits a driven, agile, digital-savvy, hungry-to-learn individual who wants to take on growing responsibilities in using AI to drive digital sales and marketing for two exciting Australian consumer brands.

I own two established consumer brands (both have been around for over 50 years), historically operating in the wholesale space (800+ stockists). Over the last couple of years, the B2C channel has grown in importance and its simply too much workload for me to manage. 

Your workload would consist of 2-3 hours per day of digital development work (enhancing websites functionalities and SEO improvements) another 1-2 hour on digital marketing initiatives (from EDMs to SEM) and the remainder on managing marketplace offerings and promotions.  You will implement digital support projects (eg editing product images in Canva, generating AI images for digital ads, managing & optimising google ads, updating online marketplace listings on eBay, Iconic, Faire, Fieldfolio, Fruugo, Amazon) as well as responding to social media posts and posting pro-actively on social media (less than 2 hours per week). You are expected to explore how to use AI tools to make this work more efficient. 

You already have experience in Digital Sales Support, consider yourself a fast learner and self-starter who is willing to take on additional responsibilities to support all sales activity through all our digital sales channels. You have a can-do attitude and are comfortable handling multiple tasks simultaneously.

Advanced Microsoft office experience is required, including having previously managed websites and online marketplaces such as eBay and Amazon. You have significant experience using Shopify and Ahrefs and have a good working knowledge with Canva and AI image generation. You have capability to manage SEO and Google Ads, are an expert in building backlinks, improving keywords and have some experience with AI tools such as Claude Cowork, Gemini and are keen to trial new tools in this space. You have experience managing marketplace sales such as Amazon and are driven by improving sales. Some website development experience would also be beneficial. Any challenges you face that are not defined by our procedures, you are willing to research yourself (eg youtube videos) to figure out how to do something. 

The role is fulltime with salary increases over time in line with increased responsibilities. Hours are Monday to Friday and we honor most Filipino holidays except for All Saints and All Souls Day. Once you complete your 6 months’ probation, you are eligible for a 13th month salary.

This is a fantastic full-time career opportunity and the owner of the business is willing to invest a lot of time into your development. As such, if you are only after a short-term contract or prefer to continue doing some gig-work on the side, this role is not for you.

title: TALENTED EDITOR
description:
Summary

We're looking for a skilled short-form video editor to work with Scale Ads Agency across multiple DTC brand clients.

We have a peptide brand that needs editing support immediately. If the quality is there and you're reliable, this becomes ongoing work across multiple brands we manage.

This is for someone who takes editing seriously. Not someone who just cuts clips together, but someone who thinks about why every transition, sound effect, and visual choice exists. Someone who gets genuinely excited about a well-executed edit and holds themselves to a high standard without being told to.

???? What You'll Be Editing

Short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and paid ads

UGC and talking-head content with multiple angle cuts

Animated text, motion graphics, and subtle visual overlays

Clean aesthetic edits with intentional SFX and transitions

Content that needs to feel native to the platform, not produced

???? Who You Are

This is just as important as your skill set.



You are enthusiastic about what you do. Editing isn't just a job to you, it's something you actually care about

You are proactive. You spot things that could be better and fix them before anyone asks

You take genuine pride in your work You don't submit something you wouldn't be proud to put your name on

You are a go-getter. You don't wait around, you move fast and figure things out

You communicate clearly and don't go quiet when things get busy

You treat every brand's content like it matters, because to us, it does



????? What We're Looking For

You should:



Have a strong understanding of pacing and short-form content flow

Be comfortable with animations, not just basic cuts

Have obsessive attention to detail in every frame, SFX level, and transition

Deliver fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality

Match a reference style quickly, (without hand-holding)

Produce consistent output across multiple brands and briefs



? This Role Is NOT For You If



You need heavy direction on every edit

You treat deadlines loosely

You do the bare minimum and call it done

You can't adapt your style to different brand aesthetics

Your best work is buried in a portfolio you haven't updated



???? The Opportunity

We are a growing performance marketing agency working with DTC brands across beauty, health, and lifestyle. Editors who perform well here get, consistent volume, ongoing work, and a real seat in a fast-moving operation. We take care of people who show up and deliver.



*****THE PAY, THE HOURS & THE VOLUME OF CLIENTS I GIVE YOU ARE DEPENDANT ON YOUR SKILL*****



???? How to Apply

Please include 2 to 4 short-form editing examples that show your range across animations, UGC cuts, and aesthetic transitions. Bonus points if any examples are from skincare, health, or lifestyle brands.



EXAMPLE IDEA OF EDITS:

title: Advanced Video Editor (Long-Form + Short-Form)
description:
We're a content and marketing agency working with founders, coaches, and B2B brands. We're hiring an Advanced Video Editor who can handle both long-form YouTube content and short-form Reels and TikToks at a high level.

This is not a basic editing role. We're looking for someone who understands pacing, storytelling, and retention — someone who watches Ali Abdaal, Kallaway, or Colin and Samir and understands why their edits work, not just how to copy them.

You'll be editing for multiple clients across different niches — water sports, business coaching, and B2B. Each brand has a different voice and style. You need to be able to switch between them without losing quality.

What you'll be doing:



Editing long-form YouTube videos (10-30 minutes) with strong retention-focused structure

Cutting short-form content from long-form (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts)

Adding captions, text overlays, transitions, and B-roll in a way that feels intentional, not generic

Sourcing and syncing trending audio for short-form content

Delivering clean, publish-ready files on time, every time

Taking a brief and executing without hand-holding



You're the right person if:



You've edited long-form YouTube content for a creator or brand (not just personal videos)

You have a portfolio or reel that shows range — talking head, cinematic, b-roll-heavy edits

You know the difference between a good hook cut and a bad one

You use Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve at an advanced level

Preferrbly you use Adobe After Effects

CapCut or Edits is fine for short-form, but not your only tool

You're fast, organized, and don't need to be chased for deliverables



To apply, answer this in your message:

Name one YouTube channel you think has exceptional video editing and explain in 3 sentences why it works. Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: A+ Social Media Manager
description:
Salon Marketing Solutions is an Australian-based marketing education company supporting beauty salons, skin clinics, and aesthetic businesses across Australia and New Zealand. We provide done-for-you campaigns, strategic mentoring, and practical tools to help clinic owners grow consistently and confidently.



Please ONLY apply if you have experience in the ff:
 Marketing, Meta Ads, Canva Pro, Meta Business Suite



Recruited and Trained by Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™ Service

Installed™ builds in-house marketing capability for beauty and skin clinics.

This role is a 4–6 week training and placement pathway, preparing you to run the full social media marketing function inside a clinic — not as an agency, but as an embedded tea
mber.



Purpose:



To lead and execute a clinic’s social media marketing strategy, design, content, engagement, and paid ads — with the goal of growing visibility, followers, and lead lists. You will be placed with a growing clinic business (to be advised at the second interview) and work directly with the clinic owner following installation.

 marketing will be required on an ad-hoc basis to complement social strategy.

This is an incredible opportunity to learn directly from Vanessa McDonald — one of Australia’s most respected marketing strategists in the professional beauty and skincare industry, with 24 years of experience guiding clinics to build sustainable, high-performing marketing systems.



You’ll be trained in:



The beauty, skin, and aesthetics industry — treatments, terminology, and client psychology.

title: Full-Time Social Media Ad Creative Designer (Facebook, Instagram & TikTok)
description:
We are a growing company with a luxury perfume brand and a premium self-tanning brand, looking for a creative and reliable Full-Time Ad Creative Designer to join our creative team.



Your main role will be to create high-quality static image ads and simple animated video ads for
, Instagram, and TikTok. The video work involved does not include filming or voiceovers — only simple motion animations, text animations, product slides, and stylish transitions.



Responsibilities:



* Create ad creatives in 1080x1080 (square) and 1080x1920 (vertical/story)

* Design premium static image ads using product photos, lifestyle visuals, and text overlays

* Create simple animated video ads based on static image creatives

* Adapt creatives into multiple variations for A/B testing

* Maintain a consistent, premium visual identity across all designs

* Collaborate with our Creative Strategy Team on new creative concepts and improvements



Requirements:



* Strong graphic design experience (Canva, Adobe Photoshop, or similar)

* Experience with simple video animations (CapCut, Canva, Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar)

* Good sense of typography, layout, color, and visual storytelling

* Reliable, organized, and able to meet deadlines consistently

* Understanding of aesthetic, minimal, luxury brand style is a plus



Working Hours:



* Full-time (40 hours per week)

* Long-term role



Salary:



* $4.00–$5.00 per hour depending on skill and experience

* Paid weekly



What We Offer:



* Stable long-term position

* Clear creative guidance and direction

* Friendly and respectful communication

* Support from our Creative Strategy Team

* Room to grow as our brands expand



How to Apply:



If you believe this role fits your skills, I would be happy to receive your application here on the platform. Please include examples of your previous work and ad creatives so we can get a feel for your style.



I look forward to hearing from you.

— Karim

title: SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE
description:
SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE (Remote / UK Hours)

LimitlessHub by doja



Full-Time • Remote (Philippines) • Competitive 



We don’t hire often. When we do, we hire people who move fast, think sharp, and want to build something that matters.



WHY NOW

We are changing the way B2B sales works. We’ve just raised $1.3 million. Our product is live, customers are closing, and the flywheel is spinning. We don't view our offshore team as an afterthought. You are the core engine of our business. You’ll be working directly with the UK-based founders and sales leaders. That means you’ll learn faster, execute faster, and progress faster.



THE ROLE

To be completely transparent, we expect absolute excellence. This isn’t a mindless data-entry job, nor is it traditional cold-calling where you are given a terrible list and told to dial 100 times a day.



LimitlessHub gives you an unlimited pipeline of enriched, AI-researched prospects. Our system (and your operations teammates) will provide you with deep battle cards, stakeholder maps, and highly personalised messaging frameworks before you ever engage.



Your job is simple but requires high execution: handle the outreach, have incredible conversations (via
, LinkedIn, and phone), manage prospect replies, and book qualified meetings.



THE FLYWHEEL (How you’ll work)

Discover — AI surfaces the best-fit companies automatically. No list-building. No guesswork.



Intel — Deep battle cards, competitive intel, and stakeholder maps land in your queue.



Outreach & Engage — You take over. You manage the highly-personalised outreach, respond to prospect inquiries, handle objections, and drive the conversation forward.



Close the Meeting — You get the prospect on the calendar for our closing team. Repeat. The tap never runs dry.



WHAT WE EXPECT

Flawless English Communication: You will be speaking and writing to high-level executives in the UK/US. Your written and spoken English must be exceptional, professional, and clear. No waffle. Prospects respect directness, and so do we.



UK Timezone Alignment: You must be perfectly comfortable working UK business hours (typically 9:00 AM - 5:30 PM GMT) without losing focus or energy.



You’re Hungry & Coachable: Not in a cliché way—you genuinely want to outperform. You want to learn how a high-growth tech startup scales, and you absorb feedback instantly.



Incredible Attention to Detail: Sending the wrong information to the wrong stakeholder is not an option. Our standard is 100%.



Proactive Ownership: If a system goes down, or a messaging script isn't working, you flag it immediately. If something is working, you double down. You don't wait to be told what to do.



COMPENSATION & PERKS

Competitive Salary (Paid in PHP/USD equivalent) – We pay well for top talent.



Fully Remote – Work from anywhere in the Philippines, provided you have a highly reliable, fast internet connection and a quiet workspace.



READY?

Apply via this post and add a personalised note. The founders read every application themselves.



No generic cover letters. No fluff. Just tell us why you’re the exact person we are looking for.
