title: Business Development Sales Coordinator
description:
We are a professional home organizing and move management company specializing in decluttering, organizing, packing/unpacking, and preparing homes for sale or transition. Our work is hands-on and process-driven—we don’t just make spaces look good, we create functional systems that are easy for clients to maintain long-term.



We partner with real estate agents, senior communities, and homeowners to support life transitions, moves, and home preparation projects. As our business continues to grow, we are expanding our outreach efforts to build strong referral relationships and generate consistent new business.



This role is responsible for driving new business through outreach, relationship-building, and follow-up efforts. You will focus on developing referral partnerships, maintaining existing connections, and consistently generating qualified leads.

Key Responsibilities:



Business Development & Outreach

Develop new referral partners (real estate offices, senior communities, local businesses)

Maintain and strengthen existing relationships

Conduct consistent outreach to generate new business opportunities

Track all outreach activity in a CRM or tracking system

Minimum of 20 outreach attempts per week



Lead Development

Follow up with non-booked clients through House Call Pro

Conduct outreach to real estate agents, senior living communities, HOA’s, and new construction neighborhoods

Identify and develop leads from social media engagement

Leverage personal and professional networks to generate opportunities



Performance Expectations:

Minimum of 40 new outreach attempts per week

Minimum 30 follow-ups from Thumbtack and CRM

10-20 Relationship touchpoints

Consistent tracking of outreach and follow-ups

Focus on building long-term referral relationships

Generate qualified leads that convert into booked and completed jobs



Bonus Structure:

Qualified Lead Generation – $10 per Lead



A qualified lead is defined as:

New business that results in a booked job and completed job

Generated directly from:

Outreach efforts

CRM follow-ups

Relationship-building initiatives



Bonus is paid upon completion of the job.

title: IT Operations Administrator
description:
The IT Operations Administrator ensures reliable, efficient, and secure technology operations by delivering world-class support across systems, devices, and platforms for both domestic and international employees. This includes remotely troubleshooting tickets and problems both software and hardware related. This role drives operational excellence through the proactive use of modern IT tools (Okta, Jira, Google Workspace, MDM, and AI technologies) to manage the entire lifecycle of user accounts and their devices. The ideal candidate demonstrates a positive and curious attitude, supports employees worldwide with empathy and clear communication, and is committed to understanding their problems and removing friction so others can do their best work.



Key Functions of This Role:



? Conduct employee onboarding, offboarding, and new hire orientation, including hardware setup and software installation.



? Support Mac and Windows operating systems end to end, as well as mobile devices (Apple, Android).



? Manage user and software access through tools such as Okta, Jira, and Google Workspace.



? Update and maintain asset Inventory and manage hardware refresh cycles, including purchasing, provisioning, configuring, and shipping.



? Work with Legal/Compliance to ensure IT security meets or exceeds compliance requirements, including supporting AI tools.



? Document solutions, create guides, and explain steps when troubleshooting tickets.



Education and Experience Required:



? 2+ years of experience in IT



? An Associate’s degree or equivalent experience preferred



? Familiarity with a fully remote environment, zero-touch deployment architecture, and device management through MDM.



? Atlassian suite experience (Jira, Confluence, and Service Management)



Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities Required:



? Demonstrates ownership and accountability in all responsibilities



? Works effectively as a collaborative team member



? Dependable and consistent in meeting commitments



? Produces accurate, high-quality work with strong attention to detail



? Manages time efficiently while handling multiple priorities



? Communicates clearly and effectively, both verbally and in writing



? Applies sound problem-solving and critical-thinking skills



? Delivers professional, courteous, and customer-focused service



Essential Functions:



? Regular and reliable attendance is an essential function of this position.



? Ability to effectively communicate is an essential function of this position.



? Ability to utilize a computer for an extended period of time.



? Ability to self-manage while maintaining open communication with the team



? This role requires the ability to travel. The average travel requirements of this role are 10%







Salary indicated is based on intermediate/upper intermediate level. Please indicate your expectations based on your skills.



You can also apply here:

title: Job Title: Advanced Ai Social Media Content Creator ( Ai Reels + Static)
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant – Advanced Ai Social Media Content Creator (Reels + Static, and Ai Specialist)



Company: J Marie Skin Studio

Location: Remote

Job Type: Part-time

Engagement Type: Independent Contractor (1099)

Compensation: Depends on Experience



About Us: 

J Marie Skin Studio is a premier medical spa dedicated to enhancing client confidence and care. We are expanding our team and seeking a talented Virtual Assistant with a knack for photo and video editing, social media management, and audience engagement.



Please
 your resume or CV, a portfolio showcasing your sample Ai work. explaining why you are a great fit for this role to: 

Applicants with no AI Experience will not be notified.



Position Overview: 

The Social Media Content Creator (Reels + Static, AI-Driven Content Production) at J Marie Skin Studio is responsible for creating high-level, brand-aligned digital content with a strong emphasis on AI-generated and AI-assisted content production workflows.



Key Responsibilities:

AI-Driven Content Creation

- Create AI-assisted and AI-generated social media content, including Reels, static posts, and carousels

Use generative AI tools to develop:

Video concepts and scripts

AI-generated visuals and imagery

Voiceovers, captions, and hooks

Content variations for testing and optimization

Combine AI-generated assets with human editing to produce polished, high-end final content

Content Types & Production

Short-form video (Reels/TikTok-style), including AI-assisted editing and scene generation

Static graphics, promotional creatives, and carousel posts using AI design tools

AI-generated visuals for campaigns, education, and promotional content

Hybrid content creation (AI + real footage + brand assets)

Trend-based content adapted using AI tools for speed and scalability



Brand Strategy & Alignment

Translate aesthetic medicine services into visually compelling AI-enhanced storytelling

Maintain luxury, clinical, and educational tone consistent with J Marie Skin Studio

Align AI-generated content with campaigns, promotions, and brand launches

Ensure all AI content supports engagement, trust-building, and client conversion



AI Tools & Systems Integration

The contractor should demonstrate advanced use of AI tools, including but not limited to:

Generative AI (ChatGPT or equivalent for scripting, strategy, and captions)

AI video tools (Runway, Pika, Sora-type tools, CapCut AI, etc.)

AI image generation (Midjourney, DALL·E, Stable Diffusion, etc.)

AI editing and enhancement tools (auto-cut, auto-captioning, motion generation)

Workflow automation tools for content scaling and repurposing



Content Delivery & Execution

Deliver content on agreed timelines and production schedule

Maintain organized AI asset libraries and content systems

Provide multiple variations of content for testing and optimization

Collaborate on refining AI prompts and creative direction based on performance Required Expertise

Proven experience creating social media content using AI tools (not just traditional editing)

Strong understanding of generative AI workflows for content production

Experience producing both short-form video and static content at scale

Ability to combine AI-generated assets with brand storytelling



Strong knowledge of:

Hook-driven short-form video structure

Visual branding in aesthetics / luxury industries

Content optimization for Instagram and short-form platforms

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Content engagement rate (views, saves, shares)

Video retention and watch-through rates

Consistency and speed of AI-assisted content production

Quality and brand alignment of AI-generated content

Contribution to lead generation and client conversions



General Terms & Legal Disclosures

This is an Independent Contractor (1099) engagement and does not constitute employment.

Contractor retains full control over methods, tools, workflow, and scheduling.

Contractor may work with other clients and is not exclusive to J Marie Skin Studio.

Contractor is responsible for all federal, state, and local taxes, insurance, and business expenses.

No benefits, workers’ compensation, or unemployment insurance are provided.

All content created is considered work-for-hire and owned by J Marie Skin Studio, unless otherwise stated in writing.

Contractor must maintain strict confidentiality of all business, client, and operational information.

All content must comply with applicable advertising and industry guidelines for aesthetic medical marketing.



Perks:

Flexible, remote work arrangement.

Join a growing company with a vibrant team committed to top-tier client service.

Opportunity to influence and grow with a leading brand in the beauty industry.



Hours & Compensation:

Part-time position with 30 hours per week to start and potential for increased hours.

Competitive hourly rate, commensurate with experience.



ATTENTION

 your resume or CV, a portfolio showcasing your sample Ai work, and a brief cover letter explaining why you are a great fit for this role to:

 me your response along with your resume.

title: Outreach Specialist — Cold Email & Instagram DM (Aesthetics Clinic Niche)
description:
Job Title:

Outreach Specialist — Cold
 & Instagram DM (Aesthetics Clinic Niche)

Job Type:

Full-Time (9 am -5 pmm, Monday to Friday — UK timezone)

Salary:

£150/month base + performance bonuses (£25-50 per booked call, £100-150 per signed client)

Top performers earn £450-700+/month.

Number of Positions:

2



Job Description:

We're hiring 2 Outreach Specialists for PureVision Enterprise, a UK-based agency that builds automated patient booking systems for aesthetics clinics (Botox, fillers, laser treatments, skin clinics, med spas).

Your job is simple: find aesthetics clinics, send them personalised cold
s and Instagram DMs, start conversations, and book calls with our founder.

You are NOT selling anything. You are NOT closing deals. You are starting conversations and booking calls. That's it.

We provide everything you need — scripts, templates, conversation flows, SOPs, lead sourcing methods, and daily structure. You follow the system and hit your targets.



What You'll Do Every Day:



Source 50 new aesthetics clinic leads using Google Maps, Instagram, and
 Ad Library

Send 25 personalised cold
s per day using our proven templates

Send 25 personalised Instagram DMs per day using our organic conversation framework

Follow up with leads who haven't responded (Day 3, Day 7, Day 14)

Handle initial replies and guide interested leads toward booking a call

Post a daily activity report in Slack before the end of the day

Check replies and flag interested leads to the founder immediately





Weekly Targets:



250 leads sourced

125 cold
s sent

125 Instagram DMs sent

10-20 replies received

3-5 calls booked





What We Provide:



Complete SOPs covering every part of your role (8 documents)

Cold
 templates and follow-up sequences

Instagram DM conversation framework with example flows

Lead sourcing methods and targeting criteria

Daily workflow with exact time blocks

Slack workspace for communication and reporting

Weekly Monday team call (6:30 am -7:00 amm UK time) for check-ins

Dashboard access to track your performance





Requirements:



Strong written English (you'll be writing
s and DMs on behalf of a UK business)

Experience with cold outreach, lead generation, or appointment setting (preferred but not required if you're a fast learner)

Comfortable using Instagram for business outreach

Reliable internet connection and computer

Available to wor9 amam5 pm5pm UK timezone, Monday to Friday

Self-motivated — you'll be working independently and reporting via Slack

Comfortable following scripts and SOPs exactly as written

Honest and reliable — if something isn't working, you tell us





Bonus (Nice to Have):



Experience with Google Maps scraping or lead sourcing tools

Experience working with agencies or marketing companies

Familiarity with the aesthetics/beauty industry

Experience with CRM systems





Pay Structure:

Base: £150/month — paid monthly regardless of performance

Call Booked Bonus: £25-50 per call — paid for every call that is attended (not just scheduled)

Client Signed Bonus: £100-150 per client — paid when a client signs and pays

Example month: 8 attended calls + 1 signed client = £150 base + £300 call bonuses + £150 signing bonus = £600 total

The better you perform, the more you earn. We track everything transparently.



How to Apply:

Send a short message answering these 3 questions:



Have you done cold outreach 
 or DM) before? If yes, briefly describe what you did and the results.

Write a short Instagram DM (under 40 words) to a fictional aesthetics clinic called "Glow Skin Clinic" that does Botox and fillers. Show us how you'd open a conversation.

What hours are you available to work in the UK timezone?



Do NOT send a generic "I am a hard worker" message. We want to see that you can write well and follow instructions.



About PureVision Enterprise:

We're a small, fast-growing agency based in London, UK. We help aesthetics clinics stop losing patients to slow follow-up by installing automated booking and conversion systems. We're looking for two reliable outreach specialists to join the team and help us grow.

This is a ground-floor opportunity. If you perform well, there's room to grow as the agency scales.

title: Amazon KDP Growth Specialist (Marketing & Ads focus)
description:
I am the author of the book "The Greatest Marketer." The book is already live on Amazon, has A+ content, and initial reviews. Now, I am looking for a dedicated, ethical, and results-driven Amazon specialist to take full ownership of driving growth in its sales. I don’t want to manage the technical details; I want a partner who can handle the Amazon ecosystem independently.



Your sole focus is to increase daily sales volume and improve the book's organic ranking on Amazon.



Key responsibilities:

Amazon PPC Management: Set up, monitor, and optimize Sponsored Products/Brands ads. You must know how to lower ACOS and eliminate wasted spend (Negative Keywords).

Keyword & SEO Optimization: Continuously research and update backend keywords and categories to ensure maximum visibility.

Category Management: Monitor and request category changes to help the book achieve "Best Seller" tags in niche categories.

Review Strategy: Ethically reach out to book reviewers and influencers to increase social proof (following Amazon’s TOS strictly).

Reporting: Provide a simple weekly report on Spend, Sales, and ACOS.



Requirements:

Proven Experience: You have successfully managed Amazon KDP accounts and PPC campaigns before.

English Fluency: Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Work Ethics: You are honest, reliable, and proactive. You don’t wait for instructions; you bring ideas to the table.



Tech Savvy: Familiarity with tools like Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar is a huge plus.



Integrity: You follow Amazon’s Terms of Service strictly—no "black hat" tactics.



Why work with me?

I value your time and expertise.

I am looking for a long-term partnership.

If the book sells well, you will be rewarded with performance-based bonuses.



How to Apply:

Please send a brief message with:

A link to an Amazon book or product you have helped grow.

Your favorite strategy for lowering ACOS on a low-budget campaign.

Your available hours per week.

Book a 1:1 chat with me on this link

title: Facilities Technician
description:
Qualifications & experience



Candidate must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Electrical / Mechanical or 2-year related technical course.

Must have basic English oral and written communication skills; computer literate; able to read and interpret technical diagrams.

Candidate should demonstrate sufficient understanding of Facilities Management, particularly in the operational and maintenance aspects of critical systems such as air-conditioning units (AC) and Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS). Experience in routine repairs and troubleshooting for these systems is highly desirable.

Can drive preferably with a driver's license.

With NC II certification is an advantage but not required.



Responsibilities and Duties:



Regular monitoring, with a minimum frequency of daily or weekly checks (depending on the specific equipment), of the following systems: Closed-Circuit Television (CCTV) cameras, Fire Detection and Alarm System (FDAS), Air Conditioning (A/C) temperature, and Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS).

Quarterly maintenance, including cleaning, of air-conditioning equipment and other mechanical devices.

Timely response to service requests pertaining to the repair, repainting, and upkeep of furniture, fixtures, and equipment within the office premises.

Facilitation of vendors and contractors during maintenance or repair procedures.

title: Graphic Designer & Social Media Manager
description:
About the Role

We operate across multiple business brands and need a full-time creative professional to manage our graphic design and social media Monday to Saturday, 8 hours a day. You will handle several accounts at once, produce original daily content, and use AI tools to deliver consistent, high-quality work across all platforms. This is a remote role with direct access to decision-makers and long-term growth potential.



What You’ll Do

• Design graphics, templates, brochures, and flyers for multiple brands using Canva AI and Claude AI.

• Produce daily social media post designs tailored to each brand’s audience, tone, and platform.

• Create and edit short-form videos, reels, and motion content for TikTok, Instagram, and
.

• Manage TikTok, Instagram, and
 accounts — posting, scheduling, and community engagement.

• Build and maintain a monthly content calendar tailored to each brand’s audience and platform.

• Design print-ready and digital marketing materials including promotional flyers and event collateral.

• Monitor analytics across all accounts and report on performance with clear recommendations.

• Keep all brand visuals consistent and on-point across every channel and business.



What We’re Looking For

• Hands-on experience with Canva AI and Claude AI design tools — non-negotiable.

• Proven track record managing TikTok, Instagram, and
 for business accounts.

• Ability to design brochures, flyers, and print-ready marketing materials to a professional standard.

• Competent video editing skills for daily reels, TikTok clips, and short-form promotional content.

• Capacity to produce fresh daily post designs across multiple brand accounts without repeating styles.

• Ability to manage multiple brand accounts simultaneously without dropping quality.

• Self-managed, reliable, and comfortable working remotely without constant supervision.

• Mandarin or Cantonese language skills are a strong advantage for audience engagement.



AI Tools — Mandatory



?  Applications without demonstrated Canva AI and Claude AI experience will not be reviewed. Include examples of AI-assisted work with your application.



How to Apply

Send us the following and we will get back to you within 48 hours:



• ?  Portfolio or social media accounts you have managed.

• ?  Examples of work created with Canva AI or Claude AI.

• ?  Confirmation you are available full-time, Monday to Saturday, 8 hours per day.

• ?  Your expected salary or hourly rate and language skills.

Ask the right questions to understand their goals and struggles

Build trust through conversation

Guide the right people towards booking a call

Identify strong leads and pass them to me



This is the most important part of the role.



Content (Secondary but Important)

Format reels with captions and text

Write captions in my tone

Light admin tasks

DMs drive results.

Content brings people in.



Both matter, but DMs come first.

Content

3 to 4 carousels per week

Clean, minimal, on brand

Scheduled in advance

Follow up with leads

Guide people towards booking calls

Strong English communication

Reliable and consistent

$200 per month

£3 per qualified booked call that shows up



A qualified call means:



real conversation has happened

they are genuinely interested

they attend the call



Quality matters more than quantity.

No spa
ssaging.



GROWTH



For the right person:



hours will increase

pay will increase

responsibility will grow

WHY THIS ROLE IS A GOOD OPPORTUNITY

You will work directly with a growing online coaching brand

You will be part of building something long term

APPLICATION PROCESS

 APPLICATION

In your

Follow the page

title: Helpdesk Administrator
description:
This page will not be monitored please apply by using the link below.




=



Employment Type:  Independent Contractor. Please put salary expectation in PHP not in USD!





We strive for excellence. We work with integrity. We stay agile to customer needs. We are sustainable. We are fearless. These are the CRAFTEX brand principles that underly the success of our business and our identity in the facilities management soft services market. They drive our culture and collaborative approach to delivering solutions and give us a common purpose. We ALL collectively understand them, work towards them, and live by them every day.









Our personality is confident and sturdy. We are a safe pair of hands. We are not risk takers. Solutions-focused. We will always find a way to add value. Reliable. We are doers, and do what we say we will. A safe pair of hands. Pragmatic. We are realistic and easy to work with.









CRAFTEX - Total Cleaning Systems. We are the complete commercial cleaning system supporting facilities management professionals to win new and retain existing business. Our goal is to deliver concise, informative content without overcomplicating our offer.   ONE SOURCE FOR EQUIPMENT - One partner for every soft services contract. We ensure the right product for the right job delivered at the right time.   ‘ALWAYS ON’ SUPPORT - We are there when our clients are there. An ‘always on’, open-book asset management service to ensure they never miss a thing. Minimum downtime. Maximum efficiency.   PLANET-AWARE SUSTAINABILITY - Changing the meaning of greenwashing. We don’t just tick the boxes for sustainable operations, we help our clients redefine them.   FLEXIBLE SERVICE - Flexible to the demands of the job. With UK-wide service engineers and multiple service options available, we are always able to get the job done.



 



As a partner of choice, CRAFTEX’s client-base has spans leading UK, European & Global facilities management companies:  Mitie, EMCOR, Churchill, Carlisle, Excellerate, Sodexo, CBRE, ISS, ABM and OCS, to name but a few.



 



We have ambitious plans for our future and as a valued member of our team we look to you to share in, and embody, our vision – to make our journey your journey. We’re invested in you, and dedicated to fostering a vibrant culture that develops your skills, nurtures your potential, and stimulates your professional growth for a lasting career with us. This job profile will not remain static as you will be empowered to map out your own trajectory and showcase your abilities to ensure you reach potential and thrive.

OR

AND

·       Excellent judgment is essential.



·       Ability to switch gears at a 
nt’s notice.



·       You're an expert juggler; managing and juggling multiple projects simultaneously

Special Aptitudes

description:

We’re looking for individuals who are smart, honest, detail-oriented, and ready to jump into an exciting role with us. While we’re proud of the strong relationships we’ve built with our virtual assistants, we are eager to bring on someone who’s ready to thrive in a collaborative and fast-paced environment. As a member of our team, you’ll enjoy opportunities to grow while contributing to our mission.



What We’re Looking For:

Tech-savvy individuals who are comfortable working remotely and managing social media with ease.

A team player who values open communication and is excited to learn and grow.

Someone reliable, with a keen eye for detail, and able to handle tasks with precision.

Ready to work US business hours, collaborating with a dedicated and friendly team.



Key Responsibilities:

Develop and manage a creative, dynamic content calendar that keeps our audience engaged.

Write compelling, authentic captions that resonate with our community.

Distribute content seamlessly across various platforms to maximize impact.

Engage and grow our social media community through proactive interaction.

Manage administrative tasks like scheduling social media posts, creating graphics in Canva, and tracking key performance metrics.



If you're looking for a position where your contributions are valued and you can truly make a difference, apply today and be part of our exciting journey!



---



This position will start at $6/hour USD.



If this sounds like you, follow the steps below thoroughly, like your future depends on it, because this could be the dream job you’ve been looking for ...

/cgi-win/jtypes2.asp

2. Complete our job post form here: 
/to/dCp7UPAV



The opportunity for growth is here ... just show us your magic!

title: Digital Marketing Strategist (with Appointment Setting Experience)
description:
Overview:

We are looking for a results-driven Digital Marketing Strategist with proven experience in appointment setting. This role is ideal for someone who understands how to turn marketing efforts into qualified leads and booked calls. You will play a key role in driving growth by combining strategy, execution, and conversion-focused thinking.



Work Schedule: Night Shift (EST Hours)

Location: Remote



Key Responsibilities:



Develop and execute digital marketing strategies across multiple channels (social media,
, paid ads, etc.)

Plan and optimize campaigns focused on lead generation and appointment booking

Manage and improve funnels that convert traffic into scheduled calls

Handle outbound and inbound appointment setting (DMs,
s, CRM follow-ups)

Qualify leads and ensure a steady pipeline of booked appointments

Track performance metrics and continuously optimize campaigns for ROI

Collaborate with the sales team to align marketing and closing strategies



Requirements:



Minimum 2+ years of experience in digital marketing

Proven experience in appointment setting (B2B or B2C)

Strong understanding of lead generation funnels and customer journey

Experience with CRM tools and automation platforms

Excellent written communication skills (especially for outreach and follow-ups)

Data-driven mindset with the ability to analyze and improve performance

Highly organized, proactive, and results-oriented



Work Setup:



Must be willing to work night shift aligned with EST time zone

Stable internet connection and reliable work environment



Nice to Have:



Experience working with international clients (especially US-based)

Familiarity with tools like GoHighLevel, Meta, or similar platforms

Background in sales or closing is a plus



Why Join Us:



Opportunity to directly impact revenue and growth

Work with a fast-paced, performance-driven team

Room for growth and long-term collaboration



How to Apply:

Send your resume, portfolio, and a short summary of your experience with appointment setting and lead generation campaigns.
salary: depends on how experienced you are

title: Finance  & AI Systems Operator (Build Systems, Not Reports)
description:
Are you someone who does not just manage numbers — but builds systems around them?



Residentas is an international hospitality company operating premium properties in Europe and the United States.



We are building one of the most AI-integrated operations in our industry — including our finance function.



This is not a traditional finance role.



We are not looking for a bookkeeper.



We are looking for a Finance & AI Systems Operator — someone who understands financial operations deeply and immediately asks:



- how do I structure this

- how do I automate this

- how do I turn this into decisions



If you think finance is about reports, this role is not for you.



If you think finance is about building systems that drive the business — read on.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



Financial Operations (Foundation)

- Managing core finance workflows: invoicing, reconciliation, accounts payable/receivable

- Supporting cross-border finance (US & Portugal)

- Working with tools such as Stripe, Guesty, InvoiceXpress

- Liaising with external accountants and tax advisors



Systems & Control (THIS IS THE REAL JOB)

- Connecting and reconciling data across systems

- Identifying inconsistencies and fixing root causes

- Building financial visibility (cash, revenue, costs)

- Flagging risks before they become problems



Automation & AI

- Identifying manual processes and eliminating them

- Building automations (Zapier, Make, etc.)

- Using AI (ChatGPT, Claude) to:

          - analyze financial data

          - improve reporting

          - reduce manual work



Decision Support

- Creating dashboards and scorecards leadership actually uses

- Structuring data so it becomes decision-ready



QUALITIES WE VALUE



-- Financial Rigour: You understand numbers deeply and care about accuracy

-- Systems Thinking: You redesign processes, not just execute them

-- AI Fluency: You actively use AI to improve your work

-- Ownership: You take responsibility and solve problems

-- Judgment: You know when something is wrong — and act



REQUIREMENTS



-- Minimum 2 years experience in finance / accounting / operations

-- Strong Excel / Google Sheets

-- Experience using AI tools in real work

-- Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make or similar)

-- Strong English

-- Ability to work independently

-- Bonus: cross-border finance, Stripe, dashboards, hospitality



WHAT WILL DISQUALIFY YOU



- No real finance experience

- No examples of systems or automation built

- Generic applications

- Treating finance as data entry



THE BENEFITS



- Salary: 60,000 – 90,000 PHP per month

- Performance bonus based on impact

- 100% remote

- Direct exposure to leadership

- You will build the systems that run the company



HOW TO APPLY



1. Send a message on OnlineJobs with subject: FA1

2. You will receive a link to our application form

3. On the form:

- Complete all fields

- In the comments write: FA1

4. Selected candidates will be invited to:

- Submit a short Loom video (preferred), or a written response (exceptional clarity required)

- Complete a practical test



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: AI Automation & Operations Specialist
description:
We are looking for someone who builds systems using AI — not someone who just uses it.



At Residentas, you will:



+ automate real business processes

+ build AI workflows

+ improve operations across the company



This is not a typical VA role.



If you have already built automations using tools like ChatGPT, Zapier, Make or similar — keep reading.

 

Residentas is an international hospitality company with premium properties in Lisbon and the USA. We are building one of the most AI-integrated operations in the short-term rental space, and we need someone who lives at that frontier with us.

This is not a traditional role. We are not looking for a VA or a marketer or an analyst. We are looking for an AI Generalist -- someone who sees a problem and immediately asks: how do I use AI to solve this better, faster, and at a higher standard than a human team could alone.

 

If you think AI is a tool you use occasionally, this role is not for you. If AI is how you think -- read on.

 

WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:

+ Identifying repetitive or manual processes across our operations and automating them using AI tools and workflows. +Building internal tools, templates and systems using Claude, ChatGPT, Replit or similar platforms. 

+ Supporting our guest experience, listings,
 funnels and market research with AI-generated output that actually meets a luxury brand standard. 

+ Translating business problems into AI prompts, workflows and solutions -- without waiting to be told how. 

+Documenting what you build so the team can use it without you holding their hand. 

 

QUALITIES WE VALUE:

 

--Systems Thinking: You do not just complete tasks. You redesign them.

 

--AI Fluency: Claude, ChatGPT, Replit, Zapier, Make -- you move between tools and you know when to use which.

 

--Judgment: You know when AI output is good enough and when it is not. You do not ship garbage.

 

--Ownership: You treat problems like they are yours to solve.

 

--Integrity: You say what you think, especially when something is not working.

 

REQUIREMENTS:

 

-- You have used AI tools to build or automate something real -- not just write
s. 

-- Strong written English. Your output will represent a premium brand. 

-- Comfortable learning new platforms fast. We move quickly. 

-- Self-directed. You do not need daily instructions to make progress.

 -- Bonus: experience in hospitality, property management or e-commerce operations.

 

WHAT WILL DISQUALIFY YOU IMMEDIATELY:

 

+Applying without examples of real AI-assisted work you have produced.

+Generic applications that do not follow the instructions below.

+Treating AI as a shortcut rather than a standard-raiser.

 

THE BENEFITS:

 

+Starting pay: 30,000 PHP per month.

 

+100% Remote work.

 

+Direct line to the founder from day one.

 

+You will be building systems that define how this company operates for years.

 

+You will work with tools and methods most companies will not adopt for years.

 

HOW TO APPLY:

Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs. In the subject line, include the code AG1. I will then send you a link to our official application form. On that form, in the extra comments field, write AG1.

title: DM Sales Closer — $700–$1,400/mo (Paid Training + Uncapped Commission)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We're a US-based digital marketing agency hiring long-term DM sales closers to engage with customers and drive revenue for our clients.

Here's why our team stays for the long haul:



Paid from Day 1 — You earn during training, not after you prove yourself

Transparent comp — Base hourly + per-sale commission + monthly performance bonuses. Our top closers pull $1,500+/mo consistently

Real ops team, not a sweatshop — Small, tight-knit team. Your manager actually replies. Shifts are reasonable. We invest in people who stick around

Clear growth path — Senior closer ? shift lead ? team lead roles open up as we scale. We promote from within first



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



Chat with customers via DM using our tested conversation frameworks (no cold scripts — we hand you what works)

Build rapport, qualify buyers, and close sales

Log shift notes and sales numbers in our tracker

Work 8-hour shifts — AM, PM, and graveyard slots available (Philippine time)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



Strong written English — you can hold a natural conversation, not just send templates

Comfortable with American slang, tone, and pop culture references

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for your shift

40 hrs/week availability (we don't do part-time for this role)

Coachable — you take feedback and apply it the next shift

Sales or chat support experience is a plus but not required. We train from scratch if you have the right attitude

title: Real Estate VA Cold Caller
description:
***ATTENTION: READ THIS ENTIRE POST CAREFULLY***



How to Apply

• We hire based on the ability to follow exact protocols. To be considered, please complete the following steps precisely:

•
: Send your application to 
  Subject Line: Must include the word "ALABAMA".

•  The Tech List: In the body of the
, list every Real Estate CRM and Power Dialer you have mastered.

•  Attachments: Include your Resume and a 2-minute video introducing yourself and detailing your most impressive "save" on a cold call.



**Applications that skip any of these steps will be discarded immediately**



Who We Are

We are a high-performance Real Estate team looking for a World-Class ISA to lead our outbound prospecting. We don’t need a caller; we need a partner who takes full ownership of the pipeline and thrives in a high-volume environment.



The Mission

• Outbound Mastery: Execute high-volume prospecting to FSBOs, Expireds, and Pre-Foreclosures.

•  Precision Data: Maintain meticulous CRM records. If it isn’t in the notes, it didn’t happen.

•  The Result: Identify and book "ready-to-list" appointments for our agents(Quality Appointments)



Who You Are

• The Veteran: You have a proven track record in US Real Estate cold calling.

• The Tech Expert: You can navigate multiple dialers and CRMs (KVCore, Vulcan7, etc.) simultaneously without breaking a sweat.

• The KPI Machine: You hit your daily targets for Dials, Contacts, and Appointments, no excuses.



What’s In It For You?

We reward results, not just hours. We are looking for a long-term partner to grow with our team.



• Base Pay: $4.00 USD per hour.

• Aggressive Bonuses: Earn significant commissions for every Appointment Met and every Closed Deal.

• Career Path: This starts as a Part-Time role with a direct path to Full-Time for a proven "KPI Machine."

• Ownership: You aren't just a caller; you are a key stakeholder in our lead routing and conversion strategy.

title: Elite ISA - Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
Are you a master of the phones? Do you have the "gift of gab" and the grit to turn a "No" into a "Yes"?



HOW TO APPLY (Follow Carefully)

We value attention to detail. If you miss a step, your application will not be considered.

Send an
 to: 

1. Subject Line: You MUST put the word "PINEAPPLE" in your
 subject line.

2. Resume & Cover Letter: Tell us why you’re the best fit for this role.

3. 1-2 Minute Video: Introduce yourself and tell us about your biggest sales win or your toughest "save" on a cold call.



We are a high-performance Real Estate team, and we are looking for a world-class ISA / Cold Caller to dominate our outbound prospecting. We don’t just want a caller; we want a partner who takes pride in booking quality appointments and managing the pipeline like a pro.



WHY JOIN US?

Proven Systems: No guesswork. We provide clear lead statuses, defined core values, and all the business facts you need to succeed.



Elite Culture: We operate with integrity, service, and results. You aren't just a freelancer; you are a vital part of our growth.



Consistency: We provide the leads; you provide the energy.



THE MISSION: Fill the Calendar

Your primary focus is high-volume outbound prospecting to build our listing inventory.

The Targets: Proactively call FSBOs, Expired listings, and Pre-Foreclosures.

The Grind: Lead qualification, meticulous CRM management, and relentless follow-up.

The Result: Booking high-quality, "ready-to-list" appointments for our agents.



WHO YOU ARE:

The Hunter: You have a proven track record in US Real Estate cold calling.

The Professional: You are highly organized and follow structured processes (CRM notes are your best friend).

The KPI Machine: You hit your daily targets for Dials, Contacts, and Appointments Set.

The Communicator: Your English is energetic, persuasive, and easy to understand.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS:

Quiet home office environment (Noise-canceling headset is a must).

High-speed internet with a stable backup.

Experience with Real Estate CRMs and power dialers (Mojo, Vulcan7, etc.).



Are you ready to dominate the phones? Apply now!

title: TikTok/Reels Editor — $600–$1,300/mo (Paid from Day 1 + Viral Bonuses)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We're a US-based creator management agency hiring long-term short-form editors to cut viral TikToks, Reels, and Shorts for our creators.

Here's why our editors stick around:



Paid from Day 1 — You earn during the trial and training, not after

Clear comp structure — Base pay per edit + monthly bonus tied to views/performance. Top editors clear $1,300+/mo

Real creative team,  We care about quality and give you time to actually make the cut hit

Growth path — Senior editor ? lead editor ? head of content roles open as we scale creators. We promote from within



WHAT YOU'LL DO:





Add captions, SFX, transitions, and trending audio that fits the creator's style

Follow our style guide and QA checklist (we hand it to you — you don't guess)

Flag best clips from raw dumps and suggest hook variations





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



Strong CapCut skills (required) — Premiere/After Effects is a plus but not needed

You actually watch TikTok/Reels and understand what makes a US audience stop scrolling

Good sense of pacing, hook timing, and caption rhythm

Reliable internet + a machine that can handle 1080p/4K footage without crashing

40 hrs/week availability, Philippine time — AM, PM, or graveyard shifts

Coachable — you take feedback notes and apply them the next edit, no ego

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
APPLICANTS WITHOUT RELEVANT EXPERIENCE WILL NOT BE ANSWERED!!! READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING:



***APPLICANTS MUST HAVE PROVEN VIRTUAL ASSISTANT EXPERIENCE WITH FACILITIES OR PROPERTY SERVICE BUSINESSES (E.G., PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, REAL ESTATE OPERATIONS, FACILITIES MANAGEMENT, TENANT SERVICES, OR BUILDING MANAGEMENT)***



We're looking for a reliable, detail-focused Virtual Assistant to join us.



In this role, you’ll work closely with our office managers. Your job is to handle the day-to-day admin and documentation tasks so our managers can focus on higher-level client support and business growth.



If you enjoy structured work, staying organized, and helping small businesses run smoothly, this could be a great fit.

• Process registrations, documentation, and related records

• Complete and submit required forms and paperwork

• Assist with permits, applications, and administrative documentation as needed

• Create simple, professional social media posts

• Organize digital files and maintain accurate records

• Provide general administrative support to managers and tea
mbers as needed

• Helping with customer-related follow-ups when needed



What We're Looking For:

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal) — MUST

• Solid experience as a Virtual Assistant or in an administrative support role — MUST

• Background in supporting facilities or property service businesses such as Property Management, Real Estate Operations, Facilities Management, Tenant Services, or Building Management — MUST

• Experience handling rebates, permits, or compliance paperwork — ADVANTAGE

• Comfortable creating basic social media content

• Tech-savvy and confident, learning new systems quickly

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

• Able to work independently and manage multiple tasks without constant supervision



Work Details:

• Full-time, remote position

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week



To apply for this position, please follow the steps below:

   1. Use ""VA"" as the subject line of your application

   2. Submit a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience

   3. Include a link to your CV



****WE WILL NOT CONSIDER APPLICATIONS WITH NO CVS/RESUMES.***

title: GHL Systems Architect & AI Strategy Lead
description:
We have a capable team of tech staff and GHL support, but we are missing the Architect. We need a visionary GHL expert who can look at our current data structure, identify bottlenecks, and design sophisticated AI-driven solutions. You won't just be "taking tickets"; you will be telling us what we need to build, how to build it, and guiding our team to execution.



Core Responsibilities

Systems Design: Audit our current CRM, Funnels, and Pipelines to create a more efficient data architecture.



AI Roadmap: Design and suggest AI Sales Agent integrations (MCP, Claude, n8n) to automate lead engagement and conversion.



Logic Leadership: Mapping out complex workflow logic and "If/Then" scenarios for the tech team to follow.



Technical Oversight: Act as the "SME" (Subject Matter Expert) to troubleshoot high-level breaks and ensure full data security and PDPA compliance.



Efficiency Audits: Proactively suggest recommendations to reduce manual tasks and improve lead velocity.



What We Are Looking For

The "Architect" Mindset: You can visualize a full sales ecosystem before a single tag is created.



GHL Mastery: Deep knowledge of the GHL API, Custom Objects, and sophisticated workflow triggers.



AI Fluency: You understand the logic behind AI Sales Agents and how to maintain security while using LLM integrations.



Communication: Ability to work along and guide a tech team, explain complex logic simply, and provide clear documentation.



Nice to Have: Experience in the education, EdTech, or training sector.



How We Work: You will report to our Operations and Marketing lead and collaborate daily with our tech and marketing team. We use Google Workspace for communication and documents. We value people who ask good questions, speak up when something does not make sense, and take ownership of their area without needing to be chased.



This is a part-time engagement to begin with, 10-15 hours per week. For the right person, there is potential to expand scope and hours as our GHL environment grows.



Your application must include:



A brief introduction (3–5 sentences, no fluff, keep it genuine). 

Two to three specific GHL case studies following the format above: problem, what you built, the result.

Your GoHighLevel experience level (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced) and any certifications or training completed.

Confirmation that you are available Mon–Fri, 9am–5pm MYT.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a short video interview.

title: eCommerce VSL Video Editor
description:
Company Description



We are a fast-growing ecommerce store that sells different products through such acquisition platforms as Meta ads, Google ads, Amazon, Klaviyo, Tiktok, Instagram, etc.







Role Description



This is a remote contract role for an Ecommerce Video Editor. The video editor will be responsible for editing new VSL, UGC, mashup, and other types of videos on weekly basis using the scripts provided, and offering data-driven insights to shape overall strategy. In this role, you will also be tasked with honing new skills such as working with AI tools, creating motion designs, researching the content on Instagram, Tiktok, Youtube etc.







Qualifications



Proven experience in creating high-converting video ads for ecommerce brands, with a strong understanding of VSLs and UGC content editing.

Strong analytical skills to assess video performance metrics and optimize for engagement, conversion rates, and return on ad spend (ROAS)

Deep proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or similar) and familiarity with motion graphics, transitions, and dynamic text overlays.

Experience in editing videos for paid media platforms, including
 Ads, Google Ads (Performance Max etc), and YouTube Ads.

At least 3 years of experience in ecommerce video editing, specifically for direct-to-consumer (DTC) and VSLs (long video-sales letters)



Excellent command of English (C1 level or higher) for seamless team communication and collaboration.



Availability to work on Eastern Standard Time (EST) with flexibility for tight deadlines and occasional weekend work.

Key traits we value: proactiveness, creativity, adaptability, attention to detail, and the ability to take brand storytelling to the next level.





How to Apply:

title: eCommerce VSL Video Editor
description:
Company Description



We are a fast-growing ecommerce store that sells different products through such acquisition platforms as Meta ads, Google ads, Amazon, Klaviyo, Tiktok, Instagram, etc.







Role Description



This is a remote contract role for an Ecommerce Video Editor. The video editor will be responsible for editing new VSL, UGC, mashup, and other types of videos on weekly basis using the scripts provided, and offering data-driven insights to shape overall strategy. In this role, you will also be tasked with honing new skills such as working with AI tools, creating motion designs, researching the content on Instagram, Tiktok, Youtube etc.







Qualifications



Proven experience in creating high-converting video ads for ecommerce brands, with a strong understanding of VSLs and UGC content editing.

Strong analytical skills to assess video performance metrics and optimize for engagement, conversion rates, and return on ad spend (ROAS)

Deep proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or similar) and familiarity with motion graphics, transitions, and dynamic text overlays.

Experience in editing videos for paid media platforms, including
 Ads, Google Ads (Performance Max etc), and YouTube Ads.

At least 3 years of experience in ecommerce video editing, specifically for direct-to-consumer (DTC) and VSLs (long video-sales letters)



Excellent command of English (C1 level or higher) for seamless team communication and collaboration.



Availability to work on Eastern Standard Time (EST) with flexibility for tight deadlines and occasional weekend work.

Key traits we value: proactiveness, creativity, adaptability, attention to detail, and the ability to take brand storytelling to the next level.





How to Apply:



Option 1 - Google Form (preferred): Please complete this form if you are interested:










Option 2 - No Google Form: To apply, please click on the "Apply" button on the listing and follow the instructions to submit your resume in English. Ensure your resume highlights your relevant experience to clearly demonstrate how your skills meet the specific requirements outlined in the job description.

title: Accountant / Bookeeper : Excel & AI Financial Specialist (Contract)
description:
Excel & AI Financial Specialist — 12-Month Remote Contract (Remote | Full-Time | Start ASAP)

We are seeking a highly skilled Excel and AI financial specialist to join our team on a 12-month remote contract, working 8 hours per day, Monday to Friday. The role begins with a full historical clean-up and audit, then transitions into ongoing accounts maintenance across 6 business entities.



The role includes:



Auditing and consolidating 4 years of financial records across 6 businesses

Extracting financial data from
, WhatsApp and other non-traditional sources

Using Advanced Excel (Power Query, macros, pivot tables, VBA) to clean and automate data

Using Claude AI to accelerate reconciliation, categorisation and reporting

Preparing and reconciling BAS statements for ATO lodgement

Tracking invoices and monitoring payments across all entities

Maintaining partner investment records and calculating returns and distributions

Building automated financial reporting templates for ongoing use



You will need:



Expert-level Microsoft Excel including VBA automation and Power Query

Hands-on experience using Claude AI or similar AI tools for financial/business tasks

Strong auditing skills with ability to identify and fix errors in complex records

Solid understanding of Australian GST, BAS and ATO compliance

Experience managing accounts across multiple business entities

Bookkeeping or accounting background (Cert IV or above preferred)

Experience with Xero, QuickBooks or MYOB (desirable but not essential)

Ability to work independently and manage priorities in a remote environment



To apply, send your CV and examples of your Excel and AI work

title: AI Course Content & Media Producer
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, AI-savvy Course Content & Media Producer to help create online course content at scale. This role is focused on content generation and media production, not course building in Rise.



You will be given a syllabus, module outline, textbook chapters, and other source materials. Your job will be to turn those materials into polished module content packages quickly and accurately.



For each module, you will typically produce:



Learning objectives

Lecture script / narration

Quiz questions

Interactive eLearning activity concepts and learner-facing content

AI-generated lecture video drafts using tools such as HeyGen and/or Google NotebookLM

Supporting media prompts and visual ideas as needed



This is a production-heavy role. We need someone who is extremely proficient with AI and knows how to use it to speed up content creation while still checking for accuracy, clarity, grammar, and alignment with source material.



Requirements:



Excellent written English

Strong AI workflow skills

Experience creating educational, training, or eLearning content

Ability to turn dense source material into learner-friendly content

Ability to work independently and meet weekly output goals

Strong attention to detail and fast turnaround times



Nice to have:



Experience with real estate, compliance, or professional education content

Experience writing quiz questions and scenario-based learning activities

Experience with HeyGen, Google NotebookLM, ChatGPT, or similar AI tools



Success in this role means consistently producing 4+ high-quality module content packs per week with minimal revisions needed.



When applying, please share samples of educational content you have created and briefly explain how you use AI in your workflow.

title: YouTube Shorts Editor — Long-term, high-volume (6 videos/day)
description:
We're a small operation running multiple YouTube Shorts channels. We're adding 2 editors to our team for a long-term, stable workflow.

The work:

6 Shorts per day, 6 days per week (guaranteed volume, stable income)

Style: fast-paced, punchy, retention-focused viral Shorts with TTS voiceover

We provide: script, ElevenLabs voiceover file, style guide with 5 reference videos to match exactly

You deliver: finished vertical 9:16 video, 24h turnaround

Requirements:

Premiere Pro + After Effects (non-negotiable)

Solid portfolio of Shorts/Reels — TTS-style content is a big plus

Understands retention editing: jump cuts, pattern interrupts, hook in first 1.5s

Reliable daily delivery — this is not a side gig

Clear English communication (Spanish is a plus, not required)

Compensation:

5 USD per Short (flat rate, piece-rate)

At 6 videos/day × 6 days = 180 USD/week = 780+ USD/month, stable

Paid weekly through the platform

Paid test video at full rate before we commit

Why this role is worth it:

Guaranteed volume from day one — no searching for the next gig

Clear briefs, no creative guesswork (we know exactly what works)

Long-term stability: our top editors have been with us 18+ months

Simple feedback loop, no committee revisions

To apply, send:

3 links to Shorts/Reels you've edited (TTS or viral-style ideally)

Confirm you can handle 6 videos/day at 24h turnaround

Write "weekly payment" at the top of your reply so we know you read this

We read every application. Tests go out within 48h.

title: Social Media & Automation Specialist
description:
Job Description

We are looking for a Lean-Pro Social Media & Automation Specialist to help grow and manage the online presence of our client. This role is perfect for someone who is emotionally mature, takes initiative, handles feedback well, and has a strong sense of honesty, clarity, and integrity. The ideal candidate will start by assisting with content posting and creation on Instagram and
, as well as video editing using Captions app. As the role evolves, there will be opportunities to manage automations and
s using GoHighLevel, along with future client scheduling responsibilities. This is a great opportunity for someone looking to grow alongside a client’s business and make a significant impact as they scale.



Responsibilities:

Content Creation & Posting:

• Post content on Instagram and
 to maintain an active online presence.

• Create content from client testimonials and other materials using Canva.

• Manage minor video editing tasks using Captions app for short-form video content.

GoHighLevel &
 Management (Future):

• Help with client
 campaigns and ensure that they run smoothly.



Client Scheduling (Future):

Clear and Open Communication:

Requirements:

• Proficient in creating visually appealing and engaging content for Instagram and
 using 
.

• Strong understanding of Instagram and
 platforms, including content posting, engagement, and community management.

 campaigns is preferred, with a willingness to grow and develop this skill set.

• Ability to handle tasks and feedback with emotional maturity, communicate clearly, and work autonomously.

description:
We are looking for a Customer Support & Inside Sales Executive to support a growing D2C baby care brand. This role focuses heavily on inbound calls, customer engagement, objection handling, and driving conversions.



You will combine product expertise with strong communication and sales skills to guide customers toward the right purchase decisions while delivering a high-quality support experience.



Key Responsibilities

Handle 40–50 inbound customer calls daily with a focus on conversion and support

Understand customer needs and recommend suitable products

Manage objections and suggest alternatives to close sales

Send follow-up
s with product recommendations and links

Re-engage potential customers to drive conversions

Maintain a consultative, conversational approach (not purely transactional)

Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction, empathy, and personalization

Document interactions for tracking and reporting



Requirements

3–4 years of experience in customer support and/or inside sales

Experience in baby care, parenting, or similar product-based industries

Strong objection handling and persuasive communication skills

Experience handling high-volume inbound calls (40–50/day)

Ability to understand and navigate large product catalogs

Excellent spoken and written English (US-facing role)

Neutral or US-preferred accent



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with D2C brands in baby care, parenting, or lifestyle categories

Familiarity with similar product segments is a plus



Key Skills & Capabilities

Strong sales mindset with ability to upsell and cross-sell

High empathy and customer-centric approach

Ability to recommend alternatives when products are unavailable

Balance between support and sales-driven conversations

Strong conversational and relationship-building skills



Important Note



This is a conversion-focused role, not just customer support.

Success in this role depends on your ability to:



Drive purchase decisions

Handle objections confidently

Actively upsell and cross-sell

Build trust through meaningful conversations

title: Amazon Listing & AI Integration Specialist
description:
***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***



We are seeking a meticulous, data-driven Amazon Listing Specialist who leverages cutting-edge technology to scale brand performance. The ideal candidate is an expert in the Amazon ecosystem and an early adopter of AI-driven workflows. You will navigate complex technical workflows, manage account health, and use AI to optimize asset management and PDF editing.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Technical Platform & AI Integration

• Create new product listings (ASINs) from scratch in Seller Central while ensuring full data and compliance accuracy.

• Manage bulk data uploads and complex template transformations using flat files.

• Use AI tools to streamline the creation and editing of product documentation and PDF assets, ensuring professional-grade formatting.

• Troubleshoot and resolve complex Parent/Child variation issues to ensure a seamless customer experience.

2. Account Health (AHR) & Crisis Management

• Monitor and maintain the Account Health Rating (AHR) by independently resolving "High Severity" policy violations, such as restricted claims or image issues.

• Diagnose and fix sudden drops in organic ranking or sales using a structured, data-driven approach.

• Swiftly resolve suppressed ASINs to minimize revenue loss.

• Develop an immediate action plan for compliance warnings to protect the store's standing without outside help.

3. Content Optimization & SEO

• Develop sophisticated keyword strategies across Titles, Bullet Points, and Backend Search Terms to maximize visibility.

• Write high-converting copy that balances aggressive SEO with human readability.

• Design and implement A+ Content (Enhanced Brand Content) to drive significant sales lifts.

• Analyze low Conversion Rates (CR) and implement critical content changes to improve performance.

4. Quality Control & Prioritization

• Maintain a meticulous personal checklist to ensure 100?curacy in product data before publishing.

• Manage a high-volume queue, prioritizing tasks such as fixing suppressed ASINs over new listing creation when necessary to protect the bottom line.



Required Qualifications & Skills

• Amazon Expertise: Expert-level proficiency in Amazon Seller Central, inventory flat files, and variation logic.

• AI & Technical Skill: Proven experience using AI tools for content generation and PDF editing/manipulation.

• Policy Knowledge: Deep understanding of Amazon compliance to maintain a strong Account Health Rating.

• Strategic SEO: Advanced knowledge of Amazon’s search algorithm and keyword placement.

• Meticulous Execution: A highly reliable work ethic with a focus on precision to avoid costly data mistakes.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Full-Stack Web Developer (Strapi Expert)
description:
We are looking for a versatile Full-Stack Web Developer with a deep love for headless CMS architecture—specifically Strapi—to join our engineering team. You’ll be the bridge between elegant, high-performance frontends and robust, scalable backends.



If you enjoy building customizable content APIs, optimizing database schemas, and crafting seamless user experiences, we want to talk to you.



Key Responsibilities

Architect & Build: Design and implement scalable backend architectures using Strapi (Node.js) and integrate them with modern frontend frameworks.



API Development: Develop and maintain custom REST and GraphQL APIs.



Plugin & Customization: Create custom Strapi plugins, lifecycle hooks, and middlewares to extend core functionality.



Frontend Integration: Build responsive, performant user interfaces using React, Next.js, or Vue.js that consume Strapi-managed content.



Database Management: Design and optimize schemas in PostgreSQL or MySQL.



Performance & Security: Ensure high-speed content delivery through caching strategies (Redis) and implement robust authentication/authorization (RBAC, JWT).



Deployment: Manage CI/CD pipelines and cloud deployments on platforms like AWS, DigitalOcean, or Strapi Cloud.



### Technical Requirements

Strapi Mastery: Proven experience configuring, customizing, and scaling Strapi (v4/v5).



Backend: Strong proficiency in Node.js and TypeScript.



Frontend: Expertise in React.js (Next.js experience is a huge plus) and modern CSS frameworks like Tailwind CSS.



Database: Solid understanding of relational databases and SQL optimization.



API Design: Experience with both RESTful services and GraphQL.



DevOps: Familiarity with Docker, GitHub Actions, and cloud infrastructure.



### Qualifications & "Soft" Skills

Problem Solver: You don’t just find bugs; you find the root cause and the most efficient fix.



Clear Communicator: You can explain technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders.



Adaptive Learner: The headless CMS landscape moves fast; you’re excited to stay updated on the latest Strapi releases and web standards.



Experience: 3+ years of professional web development experience, with at least 1 year focused on headless CMS projects.

title: Degen CEO Needs an Enforcer / Executor. No Polite Softies. (chief of staff / EA X PA to founder)
description:
My sht is literally on fire. 300 unread iMessages, 400 WhatsApps, 30 missed calls, WeChat, IG, FB Messenger, Alibaba, Slack blowing up. Clients, suppliers, friends from 3 weeks ago, fam, all falling through. I’m a NYC founder running a physical biz, an ecom biz, renoing a house, flying 20-40x /yr, taking care of my dad, managing China suppliers, and a whole team.



I also like to have fun and be a bit of a degen, good dinners, nice hotels, nights with the boys, leisure + biz trips. I plan, do, and ask for wild things. I’m not a 50 year old exec in bed by 10.



The real mess is the hundred little things in DMs and group chats where people wait on me and I never get to it. I need an enforcer, not a reporter. Intercept, handle what you can, chase people, push vendors, plan dinners, gifts, trips. Only flag what actually needs me. EA and PA, business and personal. If you only do calendars and inboxes, pass.



Three deliverables:

 1. Do the work. Chase my contractor, book dinners, source gifts, handle supplier threads. Make me FEEL that I have an enforcer, don’t tell me I have one.

 2. Leave a clean SOP and playbook for how my life runs, and how to handle my shit.

 3. Help me vet, hire, and onboard the long-term junior who’ll run by that playbook. Could that be you? Possibly. Maybe not.

4.  YOU run YOUR onboarding. If I have to design your training plan, wrong person.



Where my last EA failed:

 • No gameplan, I wasted weeks onboarding her

 • Couldn’t intercept iMessage/WhatsApp/WeChat, just told me what I already knew

 • Generic travel and restaurant suggestions, worse than what I’d Google myself

 • Broken 1Password, couldn’t work around YubiKey for Gmail Delegation, technical mess

If any of that’s you, don’t apply.



What I want:

 • 5+ years EA/ops for founders, not general VA

 • You push, follow up, close loops, plan before I ask

 • Serious points and travel hacks. Layovers, itineraries, finding gems abroad

 • You know how to find and book what’s popping. Resy, Infatuation, concierge connects, industry newsletters. If I’m in Tokyo next week, you know where we’re eating

 • Real hotel/restaurant/itinerary taste

 • Opinionated, thick skin

 • 1Password Teams + Gmail Delegation with YubiKey, you know the clicks

 • Real bandwidth, not a side project on top of 4 other clients



What I don’t want:

 • VAs waiting for instructions

 • Agency placements with a junior from someone’s bench

 • Anyone who needs me to design their onboarding

 • Anyone who sends summaries instead of handling things



Scope: 4-6 weeks. Week 1 learn me and start executing. Weeks 2-4 run the playbook. Last stretch, onboard the junior. Propose your price. Work together after? Maybe. Maybe not.





Answer 3 qs:

 1. Why you? Not a polished paragraph about “seamless partnership.” 7-9 sentences, human writing, like we wrote 3 years ago.



 2. Send 2 screenshots of group chats or WhatsApp threads in your phone right now (redact names) that show the kind of shit you handle.



 3. Name 3 bars, lounges, or restaurants in NYC that are trendy, sexy, hard to get into right now. Then name 3 a mid-level EA would confidently recommend that are actually played out or mid. Explain the difference. If you’re using AI on this, I guarantee your answer is cooked before you started.



Heads up: I write copy with AI all day, it’s literally my business. If your answers aren’t by hand, don’t bother.



If answers are good, we schedule a call.

title: Social Media + DM Setter Assistant for Online Fitness Coach (Canva + Instagram)
description:
SOCIAL MEDIA & DM ASSISTANT – ONLINE FITNESS COACH

IMPORTANT — PLEASE READ



I’ve had a high number of applications for this role.



I will only review candidates who follow the instructions and complete all tasks properly. Attention to detail and effort matters.



ABOUT THE ROLE



I’m an online fitness coach based in Dubai, helping women lose fat, build confidence, and feel in control of their routine.



My coaching is not about extremes or quick fixes. It’s about building structure, consistency, and a lifestyle that actually works long term.



I’m looking for a reliable, proactive assistant to support me with content, DMs, and general organisation to help grow the brand and support clients.



This role is not just about posting content. It’s about understanding the brand, communicating with women in a natural way, and helping turn conversations into real clients.



YOUR ROLE

DMs & Outreach (MAIN PRIORITY)

Replying to Instagram DMs daily in my tone

Starting conversations with potential clients (warm outreach only)

Asking the right questions to understand their struggles and goals

Following up with leads consistently

Building trust through conversation

Guiding people towards booking calls or signing up



This is a key part of the role. You are not just replying, you are helping move conversations forward.



Content Support (SECONDARY BUT IMPORTANT)

Creating Instagram carousels in Canva (I provide ideas and direction)

Formatting reels (captions and on-screen text)

Writing captions in my tone

Helping organise and plan content



Content brings people in. DMs convert them into clients.



General Support

Helping organise client check-ins

Light admin tasks

Supporting anything that helps free up my time

WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR

Strong Canva skills (clean, minimal design)

Good written English

Confident communicating in DMs (friendly, natural tone)

Organised and proactive

Reliable and consistent

Able to follow instructions but also think independently

THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

Your English is not strong

You have little understanding of Instagram or content

You are not comfortable speaking to people

You need constant supervision

BONUS IF YOU

Understand the fitness / coaching space

Have experience with DM setting or sales

Have helped grow Instagram accounts before

DETAILS



Start: ASAP

Hours: Part-time (10–20 hours per week to start)

Rate: $4–$6/hour depending on experience

Opportunity to grow into a full-time role



APPLICATION PROCESS

STEP 1 — INSTAGRAM TASK



Go 



Take time to properly review my content before messaging.



Then send me a DM including:



A short introduction about you

What you understand about my journey

What you think I’ve been through

Why you think I do what I do now

What you think I help women with



Keep it natural, clear, and based on what you’ve seen. Not generic.



This is an important part of the process. I want to see how well you understand my brand and how you communicate.



STEP 2 —
 APPLICATION



Send your application to:





Include:



Screenshots or links to your Canva work

Any experience with Instagram or DM setting

Your hourly rate

STEP 3 — DM TASK



Reply to this message as if you were me:



"Hey, I’ve been following you for a while but I feel stuck with my food and workouts"



STEP 4 — CASE TASK



A woman replies to a story:



"I feel like I’m doing everything right but not seeing results. I also struggle with consistency."



Write:



Your first reply

2 follow up questions

How you would guide the conversation towards a call

STEP 5 — OUTREACH TASK



Show how you would start conversations on Instagram.



Include:



2 example messages to a new follower

1 example reply to a story interaction

How you would guide the conversation towards booking a call

STEP 6 — CONTENT TASK



Create one carousel in Canva based on:



"high protein meals that actually keep you full"



Requirements:



5 to 7 slides

Clean, minimal design

Aligned with my Instagram style

Practical and realistic (not generic)

Strong hook on slide 1

Clear, useful content



Send as a Canva link (editable).



FINAL NOTE



I’m looking for someone who is reliable, easy to work with, and can communicate naturally.



This role can grow quickly for the right person.

title: AI Marketing & LinkedIn Growth Specialist (B2B SaaS, Remote)
description:
## AI Marketing & LinkedIn Growth Specialist (B2B SaaS, Remote)



### About ProductFlight



We are building **ProductFlight**, an AI platform that automates product data integration for retailers and suppliers.



Think:



* Excel chaos from suppliers

* Complex systems like GDSN, PIMs, APIs

* Manual mapping that takes months



We replace all of that with AI.



---



### Role



We’re looking for someone to grow our visibility and generate inbound leads via LinkedIn.



We want someone who can think, write, and execute.



---



### Responsibilities



* Write **3–5 LinkedIn posts per week** for a B2B SaaS audience

* Turn real use cases into content (case studies, insights, opinions)

* Research competitors and market trends

* Support inbound lead generation via content and outreach

* Work directly with the founder



---



### Requirements



* Strong written English

* Ability to write **clear, non-generic content**

* Interest in AI / SaaS / B2B marketing

* Ability to **think independently**, not just execute tasks



**Bonus:**



* LinkedIn growth experience

* Experience with AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT)



---



### Salary



* Send in your hourly rate

* Part-time or full-time possible



---



### Application Instructions (Important)



To apply, you MUST:



1. Start your application with: **PF-2026**

2. Complete the test task below



Applications without the test task will be ignored.



---



### Test Task



**1. Write 3 LinkedIn posts for ProductFlight:**



* One problem-focused

* One case/results-based

* One bold/opinionated



**2. Rewrite this sentence:**



> We help companies manage product data better with AI and automation and improve workflows.



**3. Answer:**



> How would you get 10 inbound leads in 30 days using LinkedIn?



---



### Why join



* Early-stage product ? real impact

* No corporate bureaucracy

* Growth opportunity into a key role



---



If you’re proactive and want to build something real — apply.
