title: GoHighLevel Customer Success Manager (CSM)
description:
Reports to: Teresa G. Sivak

Company: TGS Marketing



About TGS Marketing



TGS Marketing helps contractors, home service pros, and veteran-owned service businesses build structured brands, stronger online visibility, and cleaner systems that actually help them get found, get trusted, and get booked.



A major part of what we provide is our Smart Website + CRM system (TGSM), built for service businesses that need more than “just a website.” We help clients capture leads, follow up faster, automate key touchpoints, and stay organized without drowning in tech.



We’re looking for a GoHighLevel Customer Success Manager (CSM) who understands both:



GoHighLevel / HighLevel CRM

Contractors and home service business owners



This is not a generic customer support role.

This is a client success, onboarding, adoption, retention, and relationship management role.



You will be the person helping clients actually use what they’re paying for, stay engaged, get wins, and stick around long-term.



About the Role



The Customer Success Manager (CSM) is a strategic client-facing role responsible for helping TGS Marketing clients get real value from their website, CRM, automations, and systems.



You will serve as the primary point of contact for assigned clients after onboarding begins, making sure they understand the platform, complete important next steps, adopt the tools, and stay moving forward.



Your job is to reduce confusion, increase adoption, prevent avoidable churn, and strengthen long-term client relationships.



In simple terms:

You help make sure clients don’t pay for a system they never use, blame the wrong thing, disappear mid-project, or cancel because they didn’t follow through.



What You’ll Do



You will manage client success for TGS Marketing clients, especially contractors and home service businesses using our Smart Website + CRM system.



You will:



Serve as the main client point of contact after onboarding starts

Guide clients through onboarding and setup expectations

Make sure clients complete required steps (access, assets, forms, approvals, domain info, etc.)

Help clients understand how to use TGSM Solutions / GoHighLevel in a simple, non-technical way

Follow up with clients who are not responding, stalling, or missing required deliverables

Track onboarding progress and client milestones

Monitor whether clients are actually using the system (CRM, inbox, pipeline, automations, forms, etc.)

Encourage platform adoption and proper usage

Identify when a client is confused, disengaged, frustrated, or at risk of churn

Proactively step in before issues become cancellations

Coordinate with internal team members (website, content, automation, ads, support) to keep client accounts moving

Escalate technical issues, design concerns, or service concerns to the correct internal team member

Help clients understand what is included, what is not included, and what next steps are needed

Reinforce realistic expectations around websites, CRM, automations, and marketing timelines

Help identify upsell opportunities when appropriate (additional services, add-ons, better fit packages), without being pushy

Maintain clean notes, follow-up records, and client communication history

Help protect retention by keeping clients informed, supported, and engaged



Key Responsibilities

Client Onboarding + Activation

Walk clients through onboarding stages

Make sure agreements, intake forms, assets, and required info are completed

Help clients understand “what happens next”

Reduce onboarding delays caused by missing communication or missing materials

Platform Adoption + Usage

Help clients use TGSM Solutions / GoHighLevel confidently

Encourage use of key features like:

Unified inbox

Pipeline management

Missed-call text back

Review requests

Forms

Automations

Lead follow-up tools

Mobile app basics

Identify when a client is underusing the platform and intervene early



Retention + Relationship Management

Build trust with clients through consistent communication

Check in proactively, not just when there’s a problem

Spot red flags early:

- Ghosting

- Missed approvals

- Unrealistic expectations

- Lack of usage

- Frustration

- Billing tension

Help reduce churn by keeping clients aligned, informed, and moving forward



Internal Coordination

Communicate clearly with Teresa and the internal team

Keep account updates organized

Flag blockers fast

Ensure no client falls through the cracks because of internal confusion or lack of follow-up



Who This Role Is For



This role is for someone who:



Understands GoHighLevel well enough to guide clients confidently

Understands how contractors and home service pros think

Can explain systems in simple language without sounding robotic or overly technical

Knows how to balance being helpful while also holding clients accountable

Can manage multiple client accounts without chaos

Knows how to keep things moving without babysitting every detail

Can spot churn risk before it turns into a cancellation



What This Role Is NOT



This is not:



A generic customer support rep role

A ticket-only help desk role

A pure sales closer role

A tech developer role

A “just answer questions when they pop up” role



This is a proactive success + retention role.



You are here to:



Help clients adopt the system

Keep them moving

Reduce avoidable churn

Protect long-term account value



Required Skills

Strong working knowledge of GoHighLevel (HighLevel)

Experience helping clients use CRM systems, funnels, automations, or marketing platforms

Strong understanding of contractors / home service businesses

Advanced to near-native English communication skills (written and verbal)

Clear, confident speaking voice with little to no accent and strong verbal clarity for client-facing communication

Ability to explain tech simply to non-technical business owners

Strong follow-up and accountability skills

Comfortable managing onboarding timelines and client expectations

Strong organization and note-taking

Ability to identify red flags and act proactively

Ability to work independently and communicate clearly with leadership

Calm, professional, but direct communication style



Preferred / Nice-to-Have

Experience in a Customer Success Manager, Onboarding Specialist, Account Manager, or Client Success role

Experience inside a marketing agency or SaaS company

Experience with:

GoHighLevel

Lead Connector app

Meta / Google lead workflows

Review automation

Website/CRM onboarding

Pipeline management

Familiarity with service-based client objections and common contractor behavior

Ability to identify simple upsell or expansion opportunities



Tools We Use

GoHighLevel / Whitelabled: TGSM

Lead Connector app

Slack

Loom

Zoom

Internal SOPs / onboarding systems



Work Hours + Availability

Part-time or full-time depending on experience

Must overlap with Eastern Time (USA)

Must be responsive during business hours for client communication and internal coordination

Some flexibility is okay, but reliability matters more than “availability on paper”



What Success Looks Like (KPIs)

Clients complete onboarding faster with fewer delays

Clients understand what’s happening and what comes next

Higher adoption of TGSM / GoHighLevel features

Fewer clients going inactive or ghosting

Fewer avoidable cancellations / churn

Better retention across assigned accounts

Faster escalation of issues before they become problems

Cleaner client communication and account notes

Clients feel supported, informed, and confident



Notes

This is a client-facing role, so strong English communication is non-negotiable.

You must be able to communicate clearly and naturally with U.S.-based contractors and home service business owners across
, SMS, Zoom, Loom, and phone/voice communication when needed.

If your English is not advanced, or your verbal clarity makes client communication difficult, this role is not the right fit.

We are not looking for someone who just “answers messages.”

We need someone who can guide, follow up, simplify, and protect the client relationship.

Contractors and home service pros are busy, sometimes disorganized, sometimes skeptical, and often need simple direction, not more tech talk.

If you understand that, and you know how to keep clients moving without mess, you’ll do well here.

We move fast, but we do things clean.

This is a long-term, full-time role for the right person.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Long-Form Video Editor (Agency Full Time Job)
description:
About Us

We’re The 1% Studio — a fast-growing editing agency that helps creators, entrepreneurs, and brands scale their online presence through high-quality content. We specialize in creating high-performing YouTube videos, Reels, and TikToks that drive growth, engagement, and authority.



About the Role

We’re looking for a highly skilled Long-Form YouTube Editor to join our team and create high-quality trading education content. This is not basic editing — we want someone who can bring concepts to life through clean visuals, strong storytelling, and advanced motion graphics.



You’ll be editing in-depth trading videos that break down strategies, concepts, and market analysis in a way that is both engaging and easy to understand. The goal is to turn complex information into visually compelling, high-retention content.



You must be able to edit at a very high level, similar to top creators in the finance and education space, with a strong focus on motion graphics, animation, and clean visual storytelling.



You’ll need to be able to edit videos like this:

youtu.be/JCU7s2rxbH8?si=wOiLeO60auSUHHgq

youtu.be/pmEmwpZX_KQ?si=YKPuSlQuqHBhbJbL



Responsibilities



Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–20 minutes) focused on trading education

Use advanced motion graphics and animation to simplify and explain trading concepts

Create engaging intros (30–60 seconds) using the strongest hooks, visuals, and key 
nts

Design clean, high-quality on-screen visuals (charts, diagrams, overlays, annotations)

Maintain a consistent, premium visual style across all content

Structure videos for maximum retention, pacing, and clarity

Communicate clearly, take feedback well, and deliver edits on time



Requirements



Expert-level video editing skills (Premiere Pro / Final Cut / After Effects)

Strong motion graphics and animation ability (this is essential)

Experience editing educational or finance-related content is a big plus

Deep understanding of pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention

Ability to turn complex topics into simple, engaging visuals

Strong attention to detail in sound design, color grading, and overall polish

title: Operations & Marketing Assistant
description:
Job Description



Who We’re Looking For



Age With Vitality is looking for a dependable, proactive, and warm Operations & Marketing Assistant to help our studio run smoothly and grow—supporting middle-aged clients as they reclaim strength, mobility, and confidence through Pilates. This is a full-time, remote role working Monday–Friday, 9:00am–5:00pm PT, with a strong focus on follow-up, systems, client support, and social media execution.



Responsibilities



- Manage GoHighLevel day-to-day: pipelines, automations, forms, campaigns, calendars, and reporting.

- Build and maintain integrations and ensure automations run correctly.

- Own CRM accuracy: consistent tagging, notes, task creation, and follow-up sequencing.

- Execute client lead follow-up and nurture workflows (new leads, no-shows, cold leads, past clients).

- Provide timely customer support via
/text/DMs (answers, scheduling help, issue resolution).

- Assist in building and organizing SOPs for the company.

- Manage social media posting and scheduling; maintain a content calendar aligned with brand voice.

- Support social media strategy: campaign planning, content themes, promos, and offers.

- Manage inbox and calendar: triage, organization, drafting responses, and scheduling.

- Ability to check details thoroughly. The password for the job application is "Risen"

- Track expenses, organize receipts, and support bookkeeping and budget reporting.

- Create simple weekly/monthly reports to keep leadership informed and decisions clear.



Experience



- 2+ years in operations, executive assistant, marketing coordinator, or client success support roles (or equivalent).

- Hands-on experience and mastery of GoHighLevel (necessary).

- Experience with automation tools and other marketing outbound tools to help maintain the CRM.

- Social media management experience (creating calendars, scheduling posts, basic performance tracking).

- Comfortable with spreadsheets, basic finance tracking, and recurring reporting.

- Excellent written communication and ability to represent a heartfelt, empowering brand voice.



How We Will Help You Succeed



- Priority-setting so you always know what “winning” looks like.

- Direct access to leadership for decisions, feedback, and fast answers.

- The space to build systems and bring structure—your improvements will be implemented and appreciated.

- A mission-driven team and a brand story you can feel proud to share.



We will only be considering applications who fill out our form here:

title: Growth / Performance Marketing Specialist
description:
The Role



We’re hiring a Growth / Performance Marketing Specialist to own the data-driven side of our marketing. While our Content Creator handles the creative output, you’ll focus on where and how that content (and paid media) drives actual results. You’ll run paid campaigns, optimize our app store presence, analyze performance data, and build the acquisition funnels that scale our apps. This role is equal parts analytical thinking and hands-on execution.



What You’ll Do



Paid Acquisition & Ads (40%)



• Plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns across Apple Search Ads, Google Ads (UAC), and Meta Ads

• Manage ad budgets and allocate spend based on CPI (cost-per-install) and ROAS targets

• A/B test ad creatives, audiences, placements, and bidding strategies

• Work with the Content Creator to develop high-performing ad creatives from organic content

• Explore additional channels: TikTok Ads, Unity Ads, influencer paid partnerships



App Store Optimization — ASO (25%)



• Optimize app store listings for both App Store and Google Play (keywords, titles, descriptions)

• Plan and run screenshot and icon A/B tests to improve conversion rates

• Monitor keyword rankings and competitor listings

• Coordinate app store assets with new feature releases and updates



Analytics & Reporting (20%)



• Track and report on key metrics: downloads, CPI, retention rates, LTV, ROAS, funnel conversion

• Set up and manage analytics tools (Firebase, Adjust, AppsFlyer, or similar)

• Build dashboards and weekly/monthly reports showing what’s working and what needs adjustment

• Use data to identify growth opportunities and inform content and ad strategy



Growth Strategy (15%)



• Develop and execute user acquisition strategies across organic and paid channels

• Identify and test new growth channels: cross-promotion, partnerships, referral programs

• Research competitor marketing strategies and industry benchmarks

• Collaborate with the founder on launch plans for new apps in the pipeline

Requirements

• 2–4 years of experience in performance marketing, growth marketing, or user acquisition

• Hands-on experience running paid campaigns on at least two of: Apple Search Ads, Google UAC, Meta Ads

• Strong understanding of mobile app metrics: CPI, ROAS, LTV, retention, funnel conversion

• Experience with App Store Optimization (ASO) for App Store and/or Google Play

• Comfortable with analytics tools and data-driven decision making

• Proficient in Excel/Google Sheets for reporting and data analysis

• Ability to manage budgets and report on spend efficiency

• Strong written and verbal communication skills

• Self-starter who can work independently and prioritize without hand-holding



Nice to Have



• Experience in mobile gaming or app marketing specifically

• Familiarity with attribution platforms (Adjust, AppsFlyer, Branch, Singular)

• Experience with Firebase Analytics, Google Analytics, or Mixpanel

• Knowledge of TikTok Ads or in-app ad networks (Unity Ads, ironSource, AdMob)

• Understanding of mobile app monetization models (IAP, subscriptions, ad revenue)

• Experience with influencer marketing campaigns and measuring their ROI



What We Offer



• Flexible remote work — full-time or part-time arrangement available

• Ownership of the growth function — you’ll build this from scratch

• Work across multiple app titles with varied audiences and strategies

• Opportunity to grow into a marketing lead role as the studio scales

• Direct access to the founder — fast decisions, no red tape

• Performance bonuses tied to growth milestones (negotiable)



How to Apply



Send us the following:



• A brief intro about yourself and your experience in performance/growth marketing

• Examples of campaigns you’ve managed — what platforms, what budgets, what results

• Any case studies, dashboards, or reports you can share (anonymized is fine)

• Your expected monthly salary and availability (full-time or part-time)



Bonus: Tell us how you’d approach launching a paid acquisition campaign for a new mobile game with a limited budget (?50,000/month ad spend). We want to see how you think.

title: Meta Ads Creative Strategist
description:
WE NEED SOMEONE WITH EXPERIENCE IN HEALTH & WELLNESS AND/OR CONSUMABLE PRODUCTS (e.g. Supplements, powdered drinks, etc.)



Position Type: Full Time

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: Mon-Fri, 9:30am-6:30pm Singapore 

 

About the Company



Our client is a fast-growing Direct-to-Consumer health and wellness brand with sales in the USA and Singapore. Headquartered in Singapore, we operate as a remote-first team across four countries.



Over the last four years, we’ve grown to 7 figures in annual revenue with 60–80% year-on-year growth. As we scale toward 8 figures, we’re building a performance-led marketing engine driven by systems, data, and creative excellence.

 

About the Role



If you’ve only run ads for fashion brands, boosted posts, or content-first accounts, this role is not for you.

 

This role is for a data-driven Meta Ads Creative Strategist who can own the client’s entire Meta ads system, including scripting and media buying, to hit clear revenue, ROAS, CPA, and budget targets.

 

You won’t be guessing or “posting content.” You’ll be building a repeatable system that delivers consistent performance through structured creative testing and optimization.



As a creative strategist, you will fully own:



- Scripting

- Concept ideation

- Creative testing

- Production workflows

- Performance scaling

 

Responsibilities

 

- Strategic Ad Creative System: Build and operate a creative machine delivering 5–10 weekly video ads, tailored to different customer pain points and awareness levels.



- End-to-End Script Development: Write value-based, conversion-driven scripts using direct-response frameworks (AIDA, PAS) and create precise creative briefs for execution.



- Creative Testing Frameworks: Design and run systematic tests (e.g. 5 hooks × 3 angles × 2 lengths = 30 variations) to identify winning patterns.



- Performance Scaling: Launch structured tests with statistical significance, scale winners systematically, kill losers fast, and document learnings.



- Data Analysis & Optimisation: Monitor daily metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC, CVR, AOV), refresh creatives weekly to combat fatigue, and deliver monthly reports with actionable insights.



- Creator & Production Management: Coordinate creators in the US and Australia, manage production timelines, quality control output, and build repeatable templates for consistent delivery.



- Budget & ROAS Ownership: Take full ownership of scaling profitably while maintaining target ROAS and building predictable growth models.

 

Competencies and Qualifications



Must-Have



- 3+ years scaling Meta ads for DTC eCommerce brands

- Proven track record managing $5,000+ USD/month profitably

- Has scripted and/or created 30+ short-form video ads

- Strong direct-response copywriting skills (AIDA, PAS, etc.)

- Can clearly explain how CTR, CPM, CVR influence CAC

- Ability to break down funnels and diagnose bottlenecks (e.g. what to fix when CPC rises)

- Experience building systematic creative testing frameworks

- Expert-level proficiency in Meta Ads Manager

- Comfortable owning outcomes, not just execution

 

Nice-to-Have



- Experience managing remote creators and production workflows

- Experience scaling spend beyond $20k+ USD/month

- Strong documentation habits for systems and learnings

- Interest in mentoring or leading a team as the company scales

 

Key Attrributes



- Decisive: Able to make confident, data-backed decisions quickly; scales winners and cuts losers without hesitation

- Inquisitive: Naturally curious about why ads work or fail; constantly tests, questions assumptions, and seeks better angles

- Goal-Oriented: Driven by clear targets (ROAS, CPA, revenue) and focused on outcomes, not activity

- Analytical: Interprets performance metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC, CVR, AOV) to diagnose issues and guide creative and scaling decisions

- Detail-Oriented: Meticulous with scripts, test variables, data review, and execution; spots small issues before they become costly problems

title: eBay Listing Optimisation & SEO Specialist for Natural Wellness Brand (Australia)
description:
We are looking for an experienced eBay Specialist and Wordpress/Elementor/Woocommerce Specialist to join our growing Australian natural wellness and skincare business.



This role is focused on optimising our eBay store and Woocommerce stores and product listings to improve traffic, conversions, and sales performance.



Our business includes natural skincare, hormone support creams, herbal wellness products, and wellness services, and we are looking for someone who understands how to make eBay listings stand out in a competitive marketplace.



About Us



We are an established Australian wellness and natural health brand with multiple online sales channels, including our own websites and eBay store.



Our focus is on high-quality natural products, beautiful presentation, strong customer trust, and excellent online shopping experiences.



We are now looking for a dedicated eBay expert to help us increase visibility, improve listing performance, and grow sales.



Your Main Responsibilities



You will be responsible for improving our existing eBay store and product listings, including:



Reviewing and optimising all current product listings

Rewriting SEO-friendly titles using strong keyword research

Improving product descriptions to increase conversions

Updating product features, benefits, specifications, and usage instructions

Ensuring correct categories, item specifics, tags, and attributes

Improving product images and image sequence recommendations

Suggesting pricing, bundles, and promotional strategies

Researching competitors and top-performing listings

Identifying underperforming products and recommending improvements

Optimising shipping profiles and return settings where needed

Improving store layout, branding, and customer experience

Monitoring impressions, clicks, and conversion performance

Recommending strategies to increase sales and repeat customers



What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who has:



Proven experience managing and optimising eBay product listings

Strong understanding of eBay SEO and search ranking factors

Experience increasing sales through listing optimisation

Excellent written and spoken English (zoo
etings each week)

Strong attention to detail

Experience with product research and competitor analysis

Ability to work independently and provide recommendations

Good communication and responsiveness

Canva and image editing



Bonus if you also have experience with:



Australian eBay marketplace

Wellness, skincare, beauty, or health products

WooCommerce / Shopify / Amazon experience



Hours & Rate



This is a part-time contractor role for 18 hours per week to begin, with potential for increased hours for the right person.



Pay rate: AUD $10 per hour

(AUD $180 per week)



This role includes an initial 4-week probation period.

There is strong potential for ongoing long-term work and increased hours as our eBay store continues to grow.



Performance bonuses may also be offered for exceptional results and sales growth.



How to Apply



Please include:

title: Video Editor for Ecommerce Dropshipping (Meta Ads Specialist)
description:
Are YOU an experienced video editor specializing in Meta Ads for physical products and dropshipping? Can you look at a competitor’s winning ad and immediately understand how to replicate it technically, or transform a script into a winning creative using the most advanced AI tools? If you answered an enthusiastic “YES” to both questions above, KEEP READING.

We run multiple international companies in the ecommerce and education space and we’re looking for a Video Editor (Meta Ads Specialist) to join our creative team.

We need someone to take responsibility for:

Sales-Focused Ad Production: Crafting clean, high-conversion ads (1 to 5 minutes) including Mini-VSLs, AI-UGC, and "Product in Hand" content.

Asset Management & Sourcing: You will be provided with a folder of our selected B-rolls. However, if additional clips are needed, you must source them autonomously and innovatively. The use of traditional stock footage (Shutterstock, Envato, etc.) is strictly FORBIDDEN.

From Script to Finished Product: We provide the scripts; your job is to interpret them visually, choosing the right clips and editing them to create a dynamic, persuasive, and technically flawless product.

AI Tool Research & Implementation: This is your passion. You must stay constantly updated on new AI releases (editing, UGC avatars, video generation). In our weekly calls, we expect you to pitch new software that can revolutionize our workflow.

AI Asset Generation: Hands-on use of the AI Stack (Higgsfield, Sora 2, Veo 3, Arcads, MakeUGC) to create or enhance content.

Visual Optimization: Implementing textual hooks, kinetic typography, and scroll-stopping subtitles.

Position Requirements:

At least 2 years of specific experience: A solid background in Meta Ads for ecommerce brands. You must have worked as an editor for brands generating at least $10k/month in revenue. While respecting privacy, you will be asked to provide examples of these collaborations in the following stages.

Deep Passion for Innovation: This isn't just a job; you must love technology. We want an AI "killer" who stays ahead of the market.

Excellent Problem-Solving Skills: If instructions aren't crystal clear or assets are missing, you don't stop. You find a solution and complete the task with excellence.

Availability & Commitment: Starting with a part-time collaboration (20h/week) with a clear intention of moving to Full-Time shortly. We work 5 days a week, but availability on Saturdays and Sundays is required for emergencies. Please note: we are looking for a dedicated partner, not an "Upwork or Fiverr style" freelancer juggling 5-6 different companies. If you cannot guarantee us top priority and absolute mental focus, do not apply.

Obsessive Precision & Anti-Mediocrity: Subtitles, cuts, and details must be perfect. Mediocrity is not allowed in our team.

Fluent in English: The team communicates in English. Deep proficiency is mandatory to manage multilingual content (IT, FR, ES, DE, NL).

What We Offer:

Performance Bonuses: Potential for bonuses up to $1000+ per month based on the results of the videos produced.

Career Growth: A real opportunity to become Head of Video Editing.

Active Involvement: You will actively participate in the growth of an international company, testing the most powerful AI tools on the market.

title: Marketing & Digital Strategy LeadRole Overview

We are seeking a strategic and execution-focused Marketing & Digital Strategy Lead to drive the development, coordination, and implementation of all marketing activity across both the clinic and academy.

This role sits at the centre of the business’s growth engine, responsible for ensuring that every piece of marketing reflects the brand’s philosophy, strengthens positioning, and supports measurable business outcomes.

The successful candidate will oversee content creation, marketing campaigns, brand messaging, automation systems, and digital growth initiatives. They will manage a team of remote VAs and specialist contractors, ensuring efficient execution across content production, social media management, funnel automation, and campaign delivery.

This individual will combine strategic thinking with operational excellence, ensuring marketing remains structured, aligned with brand values, and driven by meaningful results rather than volume or noise.

o Blog visuals

• Maintain structured content libraries including video, images, and campaign materials

• Ensure all content is labelled, archived, and accessible for future use

• Source relevant assets for marketing campaigns and educational initiativesTeam Leadership & Project Management

• Manage and coordinate a team of remote VAs responsible for:

o Video editing

o Content scheduling

o Go High Level automations

o Social media support

• Manage and direct external contractors including video editors and designers

• Provide clear briefs, task allocation, and quality control for marketing outputsReporting & Campaign Analysis

• Monitor performance of marketing campaigns and social media initiatives

• Provide regular reporting on key marketing metrics including:

o Engagement

o Lead generation

o Conversion rates

o Campaign ROI

• Identify opportunities for optimisation and growthRequired Skills & Experience

• Proven experience in digital marketing strategy and campaign execution

• Strong understanding of social media platforms and content marketing

• Experience managing marketing automation systems (Go High Level preferred)

• Experience managing Meta advertising campaigns

• Proficiency in graphic design tools such as Canva or Adobe

• Strong copywriting skills and ability to adapt to brand tone of voice

• Experience managing remote teams or contractors

• Strong organisational and project management skillsDesirable Experience

• Experience in medical aesthetics, dentistry, healthcare, or education sectors

• Experience supporting thought-leader brands or expert-led businesses

• Knowledge of SEO and website content optimisation

• Video editing experience or familiarity with content production workflowsPersonal Attributes

The successful candidate will demonstrate:

• Strategic thinking combined with strong execution capability

• Attention to detail and high standards for quality

• Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• Strong communication and leadership skills

• Alignment with values of integrity, mentorship, and clinical excellenceSuccess in This Role

Success in this role will be defined by the ability to:

title: Junior Social Media Content Assistant
description:
About TGS Marketing



TGS Marketing helps home service pros and veteran-owned service businesses build structured brands, create powerful content, and stay consistent online. We work fast, but we do things clean. Our mindset is simple: everything is content.



We’re looking for a Junior Social Media Content Assistant to support our Social Media Director, with day-to-day content production for both TGS Marketing and client accounts.



This is an entry-level support role for someone who is organized, creative, coachable, and ready to grow inside a real marketing agency environment.



This role is primarily focused on content creation, organization, and execution, with light engagement support when needed.



What You’ll Do



You will support Nic in the execution of social media content across TGS Marketing and assigned client brands.



You will help with:



Assisting with content calendars and weekly content planning

Creating simple branded graphics in Canva using existing templates or new ones

Repurposing raw client footage into basic short-form content (Reels, Shorts, TikTok-style)

Turning client reviews into clean testimonial/review posts

Helping create “portfolio win” posts when we launch websites or complete projects

Formatting captions, hashtags, CTAs, links, phone numbers, and posting details

Scheduling content or preparing it neatly for scheduling

Organizing client folders, assets, naming systems, and versions in Google Drive

Pulling together content pieces so they are easy for Nic to review and approve

Following content systems and SOPs already built by TGS Marketing

Helping keep content output consistent and on time every week

Monitoring simple DMs and comments when assigned

Replying to basic inquiries by directing people to the correct website, booking link, or client inquiry form

Flagging important leads, unusual questions, or anything needing escalation to Director or the team



What This Role Is



This role is for someone who can:



Follow clear direction

Learn quickly

Keep things organized

Make content look clean and on-brand

Help take workload off the Social Media Director

Handle simple inbound engagement professionally without overcomplicating it

Understands Contractor, home service businesses, trade industry or service based businesses



Core Weekly Responsibilities

Build simple Canva graphics using templates

Resize/adapt content for different platforms

Help edit basic short-form videos

Organize raw footage and client assets

Prepare review/testimonial posts

Prepare portfolio win / project completion posts

Assist with captions and post packaging

Help keep weekly content batches organized and ready

Maintain clean folders, naming, and version control

Check assigned DMs/comments and respond with simple direction when needed

Route inquiries to the proper website, form, or booking link

Flag anything important that needs escalation



Required Skills

Basic to intermediate Canva skills

Basic short-form video editing ability (CapCut or similar)

Good eye for clean layout and simple design

Strong organization skills

Clear written communication

Ability to follow brand guides and instructions

Comfortable working from templates and improving them slightly when needed

Able to reply professionally and simply in DMs/comments

Reliable communication

Able to meet deadlines without being chased constantly

Coachable and open to feedback



Nice to Have

Experience helping with content for small businesses

Experience with home service or service-based brands

Familiarity with Meta Business Suite

Familiarity with GoHighLevel / HighLevel Social Planner

Familiarity with Google Drive + Slack

Understanding of what makes a review post, before/after post, or short-form video actually feel engaging

Comfortable knowing when to reply simply vs. when to escalate a message



Work Hours + Availability

Part-time to start

Must overlap at least 2 hours/day with Eastern Time (USA) for communication

Potential to grow into a bigger role or full time over time



What Success Looks Like

Content support is delivered on time every week

Minimal chasing for updates or deadlines

Clean, organized files and folders

Content stays on-brand and easy to review

Nic is able to move faster because prep work is handled well

Review posts, portfolio wins, and basic content are consistently ready to go

Simple DMs/comments are handled cleanly and directed properly

The team spends less time fixing avoidable mistakes



How to Apply [Include ALL]

Your portfolio or sample work link 
 (Canva designs and/or short-form edits)

2–3 examples of:

A simple branded social post

A testimonial/review post

A short-form video or Reel you edited

Your weekly availability



Confirm you are comfortable with:

Canva

Basic short-form editing

Organizing files/assets

Content creation + scheduling support

Light DM/comment replies

Directing inquiries to websites/forms

Working under a Social Media Director



Notes

We move fast. 
 This is a long-term role, not a one-off gig.

title: Product Upload and Description Update - Australian Time Zone
description:
We are a furniture brand in Australia. We need a reliable product uploader to load new products into our Magento 2 store. Strong Photoshop skills are more important to us than any specific platform. If you have uploaded products to Shopify, Amazon, or any similar platform, you can learn our admin process in a week.

What you will do



• Pull the five render images for each product from our shared folder.

• Resize, compress, and prepare the images in Photoshop to our supplied specification.

• Log in to the store admin through the scoped user account we provide (you only see the areas you need).

• Create the product, upload the images, assign categories from a supplied list.

• Use a supplied ChatGPT prompt to draft the product title, meta fields, and descriptions, then check the output against the product data sheet.

• Save the product. We review and publish it.

• Log the work in a shared Google Sheet.



Must have

• Two or more years uploading products to any e-commerce platform. Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, or similar are all acceptable.

• Strong Photoshop skills, or equivalent (Affinity Photo, GIMP). You can resize, crop, compress, and clean up product images without supervision.

• Comfortable using ChatGPT to draft product content from a brief.

• Professional written English.

• A reliable internet connection and a dedicated work computer.

• Available to work 10am to 5pm Sydney Australian time (AEST, UTC plus 10), Monday to Friday. This is a fixed schedule,       not flexible hours.







1. Send a cover letter of no more than 200 words, in your own words. Do not use ChatGPT or a template to write this. The cover letter must include the word "banquette" so we know you read this advert, and it must answer these three specific questions: (a) what is the maximum file size we require for product images, (b) what image editing software do you use and what version, (c) how many products can you upload in a full working day when you are fully trained on a product type.



2. Send your resume in PDF format, not Word. Maximum two pages. List each e-commerce platform you have worked with and the approximate number of products you have personally uploaded on each.















3      State your hourly rate in US dollars and your preferred start date.



Applications missing any of items 1 to 6 will not be considered. Do not apologise and resend. We have a high volume of applicants and cannot reply to everyone.



Our hiring process



4      Written application review

5 A small test, the  task: you upload three sample products to our sandbox in three hours. 

regardless of outcome.

6 A 10 minute interview via google where we will invite you

title: Meta Ads Video Editor for Scaling 7-Figure Ecommerce Brand
description:
Job Description:

We're a scaling 7-figure ecommerce brand spending significant budget on Meta ads daily, and we need a sharp, fast, creative Video Editor who lives and breathes direct response video content. This isn't a "make it pretty" role — we need someone who understands what makes people stop scrolling and buy.

You'll be cutting UGC, statics-to-video, hook variations, and full ad creatives that we'll test and scale across
 and Instagram. A huge part of this role is generating and editing AI UGC using Hicks Field AI to create authentic-looking user-generated content at scale.

What You'll Be Doing:



Generating AI UGC videos using Hicks Field AI with strategic prompting to create realistic, conversion-focused ad content

Crafting detailed Hicks Field AI prompts that result in authentic-looking testimonials, unboxings, and product demos

Editing AI-generated UGC footage into high-converting ad variations

Creating multiple hook variations (first 3 seconds) for every winning concept to batch test

Adding captions, b-roll, text overlays, zooms, sound effects, music, and pattern interrupts to AI UGC

Editing traditional UGC, statics-to-video, 
-style ads, testimonial compilations, and problem/solution formats

Iterating on winning ads — creating 5-10 variations of proven winners

Sourcing stock footage, trending audio, and visual references when needed

Exporting in correct specs for Meta (9:16, 4:5, 1:1) with captions burned in

Organizing project files and maintaining a clean asset library



Required Skills & Experience:



Expert proficiency with Hicks Field AI — you should know how to craft prompts that generate realistic, high-converting AI UGC that doesn't look obviously AI

Advanced AI UGC understanding — you know the difference between good and bad AI generations, how to prompt for different ethnicities, ages, settings, emotions, and

You said: keeep goinkeeep goin12:33 AMClaude responded: Required Skills & Experience (continued):Required Skills & Experience (continued):



Advanced AI UGC understanding — you know the difference between good and bad AI generations, how to prompt for different ethnicities, ages, settings, emotions, and product interactions

Proven experience editing Meta/Facebook ads for 
 
 brands — portfolio required

Expert in Premiere Pro, CapCut, or After Effects (CapCut Pro proficiency is a huge plus for speed)

Deep understanding of direct response principles — hooks, pattern interrupts, retention, CTAs

Familiarity with UGC ad formats, testimonial ads, VSL-style creatives, and 
 ads

Fast turnaround — able to deliver multiple concepts per week

Strong sense of pacing, rhythm, and when to cut

Ability to add clean, readable captions (auto-caption tools + manual cleanup)

Reliable internet for uploading/downloading large video files and generating AI content

English comprehension strong enough to cut footage based on dialogue and meaning



Nice to Have:



Experience with other AI video tools (Runway, Sora, Kling, Veo, HeyGen, Arcads)

Experience with brands in [your niche — supplements, beauty, apparel, home, etc.]

Familiarity with winning ad libraries (Foreplay, Atria, Motion,
 Ad Library)

Basic motion graphics / After Effects skills for kinetic typography

Thumbnail/static ad design skills (Photoshop, Canva, Figma)

Understanding of Meta Ads Manager metrics (hook rate, hold rate, CTR, ROAS) so you know what you're optimizing for



What We Offer:



Long-term role with a brand that's scaling aggressively

Consistent creative volume (you won't run out of work)

Paid training on our creative frameworks, winning ad formulas, and Hicks Field AI prompt library

Performance bonuses tied to winning ads you edit

13th month pay, paid time off, and holiday bonuses

Growth path into Senior Editor or Creative Strategist role



To Apply:

Please reply with:



Your portfolio / reel (Google Drive, Vimeo, or 
 links) — must include Meta ads you've edited AND examples of AI UGC you've generated with Hicks Field AI (or similar tools)

The DTC brands you've worked with (even if under NDA, share what you can)

Your editing software of choice and how many concepts you can deliver per week

2-3 sample Hicks Field AI prompts you've used that produced winning AI UGC — paste them in your reply

A short Loom video (under 2 minutes) walking me through ONE ad you edited — explain the hook choice, pacing decisions, and why you made the cuts you made

Your available hours per week



Applications without a portfolio, AI UGC samples, or Loom will be ignored. The Loom is how I know you can think, not just edit.

Wage/Salary:

$750 - $1,500/month (paid per concept / per edited video — final rate depends on experience, speed, and quality of AI UGC output)

Desired No. of Hours Per Week:

40 (or 20 for part-time)

Business or Contact Name:

Your brand name or personal name — whatever you're comfortable showing publicly.

Apply now and help us create ads that don’t just look good – they perform.

title: SEO ANALYTICS & REPORTING SPECIALIST
description:
About StudioHawk:

At StudioHawk, there are no generalists here; just damn good SEOs.



We’re happy we’ve nabbed some awards like SEMRush’s ‘Agency of the year’, APAC Search Awards ‘Best Large SEO Agency’, Global Agency Awards ‘Best Agency Culture’ and Optus Media Marketing and Advertising Business of the Year. And we’re stoked about working with over 400+ brands like New Balance, OfficeWorks, Good Guys, Cue, Aje Athletica, PetStock, Reject Shop & many more.



But our “why” extends beyond just business. From offering employment opportunities to those often overlooked, to boosting client success, to partnering with the Lighthouse Foundation - it's all about creating a positive impact in every aspect of what we do. 



Our Values:

Create WOW ????????????

We are passionate about SEO. We want to WOW our clients, our tea
mbers, and our business partners. Creating WOW in our SEO Campaigns is what makes us exceptional.





Continuous Growth and Learning ????????????????

Believe in the power of growth - both personally and professionally. We want our employees to constantly challenge themselves and strive for more. Everyone has untapped potential, and we want to give people that opportunity to grow.





Humble Hawks, Take Accountability ??

While we’ve accomplished a lot, there’s always more to do. As a company, we’ve won countless awards in SEO and business, but no matter what happens, we will always be humble, and take accountability when we’ve missed the mark.



We’ve Got Each Other’s Backs ????????

We understand that a strong culture of collaboration is crucial to our success. We're not just a team, we're a cast of Hawks. All of us foster an environment that's friendly, warm, and exciting, and we value diversity in ideas, opinions, and perspectives. You swoop in when a Hawk needs a hand in a tough situation.

Perks of joining the Hawk’s nest:

???? Annual Leave/ Vacation Leave

???? Birthday leave & surprise 

???? Sick Leave

????? Lunch & learns

???? Mental health programs

???? Wheel spin prizes

???? Team events & activities

& lots more! 

Your Role:

We are seeking a highly skilled and data-driven SEO Analytics & Reporting Specialist to join our SEO agency. This role exists to help tell a story and provide deeper insights into the number we report on. The objective is to highlight the performance of the SEO campaign through a robust report. 





In this role, you will take ownership of SEO analytics, measurement frameworks, data quality, and reporting across our client base.





You will be responsible for ensuring analytics platforms (such as Google Analytics 4, Adobe Analytics, and other client-specific solutions) are correctly implemented, trusted, and aligned with SEO and business objectives.





A core responsibility will be designing and maintaining easy-to-use reporting templates that allow SEO specialists to confidently interpret performance without needing deep analytics expertise.





You will work closely with the Head of SEO and our SEO Specialists to translate SEO goals into clear, actionable reporting for both e-commerce and service-based clients.

Key Responsibilities:

Include but not limited to; 

Configure, implement, and audit analytics tracking across GA4 and other client platforms, partnering with developers and tag management tools to close tracking gaps, maintain data accuracy, and provide subject matter expertise aligned with SEO and business goals.

Integrate Search Console, Business Profile, analytics and rank-tracking data into unified reports, ensuring accurate segmentation or clicks/ impressions/ CTR/ position and aligning Search Console with GA4 and PPC to surface opportunities and cannibalisation.

Design and maintain standardised, user-friendly Looker Studio reports and documentation that translate GA4/ SEO data into clear KPIs, allow safe customization without breaking data integrity, and recommend alternative reporting tools when needed.

Integrate keyword ranking data into Looker Studio dashboards, aligning rankings with traffic, engagement, and conversions to define meaningful KPIs and demonstrate impact on business outcomes.

Analyse GA4, Search Console, and keyword data to surface trends, anomalies, and opportunities, advise the SEO team on performance drivers and strategic decisions (journey, funnel, attribution), and drive reporting automation, efficiency and scalability.

Resolve GA4 issues and conduct priority client audits while acting as internal analytics SME, partnering with SEO specialists to refine dashboards, educate teams on best practices, and maintain consistent reporting standards across clients.

Participate in tea
etings and support the execution of the company’s strategic initiatives.

The Ideal Candidate:

3+ years experience working with digital analytics platforms (GA4 required; experience with Adobe Analytics or other platforms highly regarded).

Strong experience building Looker Studio dashboards from scratch.

Solid understanding and experience working with Adobe Analytics, GA4, Google Search Console, and Google Tag Manager.

Solid understanding of SEO metrics, APIs, and workflows.

Experience integrating third-party data sources.

Strong analytical thinking and ability to explain data clearly.

Demonstrated ability to adapt analytics frameworks across different platforms and client setups.

Experience working remotely with offshore or distributed teams.

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

Experience working in an SEO agency environment.

Familiarity with Supermetrics.

Experience with e-commerce GA4 setups (events, conversions, funnels)

Experience creating reporting templates for non-technical users.

Ready to Soar with the Hawks?

If you’re excited about the opportunity to contribute to the success of StudioHawk and possess the skills we’re looking for, we can’t wait to meet you. Send us your CV and a cover letter explaining why you’re the perfect fit for this role. Be sure to include your favourite hobby in your cover letter so we know you’ve read this! 



Apply Via:

Google Forms Link: 



Note: Due to the high volume of applications we receive, only applications received via the Google Form link will be considered.
salary: PHP 450-600 per hour depending on exp

title: SPANISH SPEAKING -Home Health Intake & Staffing Coordinator
description:
Position Summary



We are seeking a highly organized and service-oriented SPANISH SPEAKING Virtual On-Call Support Specialist to provide remote administrative and coordination support  full time 8 hours a day Pacific Time (CA)

This role supports intake operations, scheduling follow-up, patient call management, customer service, care coordination assistance, QA support, and EMR documentation tasks.

The ideal candidate has prior healthcare experience, strong computer proficiency, excellent English communication skills (oral and written), and the ability to remain calm and professional during urgent situations.



Key Responsibilities



Intake & Administrative Support



• Assist with intake processing and referral coordination

• Upload and track physician orders in EMR

• Upload and monitor endorsement reports

• Ensure timely documentation processing and electronic filing

• Maintain organized and accurate digital records



Scheduling & Care Coordination



• Schedule and confirm follow-up visits

• Support communication between field clinicians and office staff

• Assist with care coordination activities

• Escalate urgent or clinical matters to appropriate leadership



Patient & Customer Service Support



• Answer and triage incoming patient and caregiver calls

• Provide professional, courteous, and compassionate customer service

• Accurately document all calls in EMR

• Route concerns appropriately and promptly



Quality Assurance (QA) Support



• Assist with documentation tracking and follow-up

• Support compliance monitoring processes

• Help ensure required documents are uploaded and complete

• Maintain organized electronic QA files



Qualifications & Requirements



Required



• Prior healthcare experience (home health, hospice, clinic, hospital, or medical office)

• Strong English language proficiency (oral and written)

• Excellent customer service skills

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail

• Strong computer skills and proficiency in Microsoft Office

• Ability to multitask and work independently

• Ability to work after-hours, evenings, and weekends (U.S. Pacific Time) when needed

• Reliable high-speed internet and professional work environment



Preferred



• Home Health experience preferred

• EMR experience preferred

• Medical background (RN, LVN, Medical Assistant, or allied health) preferred

• Clinical licensure preferred





How to Apply



• Please send a short cover letter highlighting your experience relevant to the role you are applying for, and include your answers to the questions below:

1. Please describe your healthcare experience in detail. Include the setting (home health, hospice, clinic, hospital, etc.), your role, how long you worked there, and the specific administrative or coordination tasks you handled.

2. How many years of experience do you have specifically in Home Health?

3. How many years of experience do you have within Home Health?

4. How many years of experience do you have scheduling Home Health clinicians?

5. What Home Health EMR systems have you used (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Homecare Homebase, Axxess, etc.)?

6. Describe your experience handling intake and patient calls in Home Health.

title: Digital Marketing, GHL Automation Specialist and Leads Management
description:
Digital Marketing & GHL Automation Specialist (Remote)

Work with a fast-growing international consultancy transforming businesses across Australia, New Zealand, Dubai, and beyond!



We’re looking for a highly skilled, proactive, and creative Digital Marketing & GHL Automation Specialist to join our team. You’ll manage everything from funnels, landing pages, CRM automation, and AI tools to ads,
 campaigns, and WhatsApp integrations — driving measurable results and helping us scale globally.



If you live and breathe automation, love system efficiency, and can make funnels convert like magic — we want you.



IF YOU CAN'T DO ALL OFF THIS AND PROVIDE EVEIDENCE OF IT PLEASE DON'T APPLY - OUR TIME IS VALUBLE AS IS YOURS



RESPONSIBILITIES

GHL OPTIMISATION & MANAGEMENT

• Finalise and optimise Go High Level (GHL) setup (branding, integrations, domains,
/SMS settings)

• Build and refine automations & workflows for lead nurturing, follow-ups, and appointment reminders

• Structure CRM pipelines and tagging for clear lead tracking and reporting

• Create forms, surveys, and chat widgets for engagement

• Build, launch, and manage
 & SMS campaigns (including reactivation sequences)

• Maintain dashboards and performance reports for marketing and sales tracking

• Conduct regular audits to ensure smooth operation across all systems



LANDING PAGES & FUNNELS

• Design and build high-converting landing pages and funnels within GHL

title: Short-Form Content Strategist & Video Editor (AI Proficient)
description:

title: Performance Marketing & Creator Partnerships Manager (Meta / YouTube / TikTok / Reddit)
description:
About StoryChat.app



StoryChat is an AI character chat and interactive storytelling platform with a fast-growing global subscriber base.



We’re hiring a Performance Marketing & Creator Partnerships Manager to help us grow paid subscribers through hands-on paid acquisition and ad creative execution.



This is not a general admin or social media support role.



We’re specifically looking for someone who has personally run paid ads, tested audiences and creatives, improved campaign performance, and can also support creator outreach and short-form content execution.



You’ll work directly with the founding team and see the impact of your work in real time.



?



What You’ll Own



1) Paid Acquisition (Main Priority)



You will be responsible for directly managing and improving paid campaigns across:



*
 / Instagram Ads

* YouTube Ads

* TikTok Ads

* Reddit Ads



This includes:



* Planning, launching, and optimizing paid ad campaigns

* Setting up audiences, targeting, placements, and campaign structure

* Running A/B tests on creatives, hooks, copy, and targeting

* Improving CTR, lowering CPC/CPA, and helping increase paid subscriber conversion

* Monitoring campaign performance and making decisions based on data



2) Ad Creative Production (Main Priority)



You should be comfortable creating or directing ad creatives fast.



This includes:



* Writing ad copy designed to maximize CTR and conversion

* Producing short-form video ads for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and paid ads

* Creating or adapting images/videos using AI tools and/or design tools

* Testing different hooks, formats, angles, and messages to find winners



Tools can include things like:



* CapCut

* Canva

* Photoshop / Premiere / similar tools

* AI tools such as Midjourney, Runway, Sora, ElevenLabs, Claude, Grok, etc.



3) Creator Outreach & Partnerships (Secondary)



You will also help identify and contact creators who could be strong partners for StoryChat.



This includes:



* Finding YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram creators who fit our audience

* Reaching out to creators directly

* Managing conversations and follow-ups

* Negotiating partnership terms within budget

* Helping us build repeatable creator partnership workflows



4) Organic Social Support (Secondary)



You may also help us post and grow StoryChat’s own:



* TikTok

* Instagram

* YouTube Shorts



This is a secondary responsibility, not the main focus of the role.



?



Must-Haves



* English proficiency test score taken within the last 5 years

    (include the test name, score, and date in your application — OnlineJobs.ph test or equivalent is fine)

* At least 1 year of hands-on experience directly running paid ads on:

    *
 / Instagram and/or

    * YouTube and/or

    * TikTok

        Reddit Ads experience is a strong plus

* Experience with:

    * audience targeting

    * campaign setup

    * A/B testing

    * creative testing

    * performance optimization

* Ability to create or edit ad creatives for performance marketing

* Experience using AI tools for image/video generation or creative support

* Comfortable with Excel / Google Sheets / Google Drive

* Comfortable doing cold outreach to creators and managing partnership conversations

* Comfortable with short daily check-ins and async written updates



?



Nice-to-Haves



* Strong direct-response copywriting skills

* Proven history of improving CTR, CPC, CPA, or ROAS

* TikTok or YouTube Shorts performance marketing experience

* Reddit paid ads experience

* CapCut or other video editing proficiency

* Portfolio showing real campaign results



?



Schedule



* Full-time, Monday to Friday

* 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Manila time

    (8 working hours + 1 hour lunch)

* 3 quick daily stand-ups

    (~5–10 min each: start of day, mid-day, end of day)

* 100% remote / work from home



?



Compensation & Evaluation



* ?6,000 per week

    (approx. ?26,000 per month)

* Paid weekly

* 3-month evaluation period

* Confirmed long-term full-time role upon successful review



?



What “Successful Review” Looks Like (Month 3 Targets)



You’ll be evaluated using clear, measurable KPIs.



Hitting most of these means strong performance for full-time confirmation:



* Paid ad CTR

    * Average ? 1.5% on
 / Instagram feed ads

    * Average ? 0.8% on YouTube in-stream ads

* Cost per new paid subscriber (CPA)

    * Under $12 by the end of month 3

    * Or at least 20% improvement from initial baseline campaigns

* Creative output

    * At least 3 new short-form ad creatives per week

    * Approx. 12 per month

* Creator outreach

    * Minimum 40 creators contacted per month

    * At least 3 active creator partnerships / collabs landed by month 3

* Reporting

    * Weekly performance report submitted every Friday, on time, with no gaps

* Communication

    * Present and responsive in all 3 daily stand-ups

    * Proactive in flagging blockers and next steps



?



Important Note Before You Apply



This role is best for someone who has personally operated paid ad campaigns.



If your background is mostly:



* general virtual assistance

* admin support

* social media scheduling

* posting content without managing paid campaigns directly



then this role is probably not the right fit.



We are specifically prioritizing candidates who have owned performance marketing execution themselves.



?



How to Apply



Please send all 3 required items below.

Applications missing any item will be skipped.



Required



1. Your updated resume

2. Your English proficiency test score

    (test name, score, and date taken)

3. Portfolio or examples of campaigns you directly handled

    Please include screenshots, links, or performance numbers such as:

    * CTR

    * CPC

    * CPA

    * ROAS

    * subscriber growth

    * cost per result



Bonus (Optional but Recommended)



1. A 1–2 sentence note on the best-performing ad campaign you personally ran and why you think it worked

2. Connect with me on LinkedIn and send a message here:

    
/in/albertahn

________________________________________

________________________________________

APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (IMPORTANT)

title: Experienced B2B Appointment Setter (Cold Caller) For Huge Commission Role ($100-$500)
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 hard working appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.  I am looking to hire immediately.



I help small business owners with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads, leads are not provided.

-- Call 80+ small business owners and offer them a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- Schedule them for a free consultation if they seem interested.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You are not someone who relies on your hourly wage, but someone who is motivated by performance and earning more through high commissions.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $4/hour base 

-- $20 each qualified appointment that shows up

-- 1st monthly sale = $100

-- 2nd monthly sale = $150   ($250 total)

-- 3rd monthly sale = $300   ($550 total)

-- 4th monthly sale = $350    ($900 total)

-- 5th monthly sale = $400    ($1,300 total)



MATH EXAMPLE (At Only 3 Sold + 12 Show-Ups)

-- $320: 20 hours/week at $4/hour

-- $240: 12 show-ups 

-- $550: 3 sold 

-- Total: $1,110/month

-- Most new reps aim for 2-3 per month - that's where you can do very well here.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "I Love To Dial" as your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) What is more important to you (a base hourly to be safe, or huge commissions to earn even more money):
