I run a serious operation. I expect the same from whoever takes

this role.





--- WHAT YOU'LL OWN -----------------------------------------



PERSONAL BRAND (50% of time):

  - Research and pitch 125+ podcasts per week for guest spots

  - Write and pitch guest articles to niche blogs and mid-tier

    publications

  - Track and improve my name's ranking on Google (page 1

    domination is the goal)

  - Build and manage media kit, pitch templates, and outreach

    CRM

  - Coordinate with any external PR specialists I bring in



BUSINESS SEO (50% of time):

  - Full on-page SEO audits + implementation (titles, meta,

    schema, internal linking)

  - Technical SEO monitoring (GSC, Core Web Vitals, crawl

    errors, mobile usability)

  - Off-page SEO — build high-quality backlinks through

    outreach, guest posting, niche directories

  - Keyword research and content briefs for writers

  - Weekly competitor SERP analysis

  - Monthly full-site SEO audit with action plan



REPORTING (always):

  - Daily EOD report in WhatsApp — short, bullet format

  - Weekly audit report every Friday in Trello

  - Monthly performance overview: rankings, backlinks,

    placements, bookings





--- KPIs — THIS IS WHAT YOU'RE MEASURED ON ------------------



DAILY:

  * 25+ cold outreach pitches sent (podcasts + articles combined)

  * 8+ on-page or off-page SEO tasks completed on the site

  * Pipeline CRM updated with every response, follow-up, status

  * EOD report submitted before end of your workday



WEEKLY:

  * 125+ podcast pitches sent

  * 50+ article pitches sent

  * 25+ new quality backlinks built or earned

  * Full SEO progress report delivered every Friday

  * Keyword ranking tracker updated for all target keywords



MONTHLY:

  * 15+ confirmed podcast bookings

  * 10+ article placements live and indexed

  * 80+ quality backlinks built to company site

  * Measurable SERP movement on target keywords

  * Full monthly audit with wins, misses, next-month plan



MONTH 1 (RAMP-UP — REDUCED EXPECTATIONS):

  * Complete full SEO audit on main company website

  * Build podcast outreach pipeline of 500+ targeted shows

  * Send 400+ podcast pitches

  * Land first 5 podcast bookings

  * Identify and pitch 80+ article opportunities

  * Land first 5 article placements

  * Build 40+ backlinks to company site





--- REQUIREMENTS --------------------------------------------



MUST-HAVE:

  + 3+ years experience in SEO and/or PR outreach

  + Native-level written English

  + Proven portfolio — 3+ live placements or bookings I can

    verify

  + Hands-on experience with Ahrefs OR Semrush, Google Search

    Console, GA4

  + Strong research skills — you can find any podcast host's

   
, any journalist's contact

  + Clear, direct communication — you say what you mean and

    deliver what you commit to

  + Ownership mindset — you don't wait to be told what to do.

    You see the work, you do the work.



NICE-TO-HAVE:

  - Experience in trading, finance, real estate, or

    entrepreneurship niches

  - Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL)

  - Strong content writing skills (to support pitch drafting)

  - Advanced technical SEO (schema, site speed, JS rendering)



DEAL-BREAKERS:

  X "SEO generalists" with no specific pitch/outreach experience

  X Anyone using generic automated outreach templates as their

    main workflow

  X Freelancers who want to juggle 3 other clients on the side

  X Portfolios built on PBNs, press release farms, or low-DA

    link farms





--- HOW TO APPLY --------------------------------------------



Real work upfront. If you can't put in effort before being

hired, you're not the person for this role.



Send me ONE message with ALL of the following:



  1. SUBJECT LINE:

     "Growth Specialist — [Your Name]"



  2. PORTFOLIO

     3+ live links to podcasts you've booked or articles you've

     placed for past clients. I will verify every link.



  3. "SAI DONTI" GOOGLE AUDIT

     Search "Sai Donti" on Google. Screenshot page 1. Tell me:

       - What's currently ranking

       - What's missing or weak

       - Your first 3 moves to dominate page 1 for this name



  4. COMPANY WEBSITE SEO AUDIT

     Find my company website (AllWin Academy). Run it through

     your tools (Ahrefs, Semrush, PageSpeed, etc.) and share:

       - On-page SEO issues you spotted

       - Technical SEO problems

       - Backlink profile observations

       - Your top 5 priority fixes for the first 30 days



  5. BOOK POSITIONING AUDIT

     Search "Currency of Mindset Sai Donti" on Google + Amazon.

     Tell me:

       - How the book is currently positioned

       - What's hurting its visibility

       - 2 concrete ways to leverage it as a ranking asset for

         my personal brand



  6. PODCAST PITCH SAMPLE

     Write me a 100-word cold pitch to a business podcast

     pitching me as a guest. Show me you can write.



  7. YOUR AVAILABILITY

     Hours per day, any other commitments, any planned time off

     in the next 90 days.



  8. WHY THIS ROLE

     3 sentences on why you want THIS role specifically — not

     why you want "any VA role."





If you skip any of the 8 items above, I will ignore your

application. If you send a generic cover letter or anything

that reads as copy-pasted, I will ignore your application.





--- WHAT YOU GET --------------------------------------------



  - Clear SOP from Day 1 — no guessing about what to do

  - Direct access to me — you report to the business owner, not

    a middle manager

  - Quarterly performance reviews — hit all KPIs = bonus

    eligible, amounts d
 at each review based on results

  - Real long-term role with scope expansion as the business

    grows — not a task-rabbit gig

  - Work that actually moves the needle, with measurable impact

    you can point to



If you're a high-performer looking for a serious long-term role

where your work actually matters, this is it.



If you're looking for an easy $1K/month to coast on, this isn't

for you.



Apply seriously or don't apply.

title: Hubspot Implementation Specialists
description:
HubSpot Implementation Specialist (Part-Time, Remote – Offshore)



Company: NEXTGEN AV

Location: Remote (Philippines / Asia preferred)

Type: Part-Time (10–20 hrs/week to start)



About Us



At NEXTGEN, we don’t just deliver events — we engineer experiences.



From high-impact brand activations to large-scale corporate productions, we combine technical precision, creative execution, and operational excellence to deliver events that perform.



Now, we’re building the same level of performance into our sales and enquiry systems — and that’s where you come in.



The Role



We’re looking for a HubSpot Implementation Specialist to take ownership of our CRM setup and transform how we manage client enquiries.



This is not a VA role.



This is a systems + automation role focused on building a high-performing sales engine.



Key Responsibilities

1. CRM & Pipeline Setup

Build and optimise our HubSpot sales pipeline

Define deal stages aligned with our sales process

Implement lead capture from website forms (Gravity Forms integration)

2. Automation & Workflows

Create automated
 responses for inbound enquiries

Build follow-up sequences to improve response speed + conversion

Implement task automation for internal sales follow-up

3. Dashboard & Reporting

Set up real-time dashboards for:

Enquiry volume

Conversion rates

Deal values

Provide insights on pipeline performance

4. CRM Structure & Optimisation

Clean and structure contact & company data

Ensure proper tagging, segmentation, and lifecycle stages

Recommend improvements to increase efficiency + conversion

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience with HubSpot CRM implementation

Strong background in:

Sales pipelines

Marketing automation

Workflow creation

Ability to think commercially (not just technically)

Experience with service-based or B2B businesses (preferred)

Excellent English communication

Bonus (Highly Valued)

Experience integrating forms (e.g. Gravity Forms ? HubSpot)

Experience improving lead conversion rates

Understanding of sales processes in events, AV, or agencies

What Success Looks Like

Every enquiry is captured, tracked, and responded to instantly

Sales team has clear visibility of pipeline + next actions

Automated follow-ups are driving higher conversion rates

CRM becomes a revenue-driving system, not just a database

Engagement Details

Part-time (10–20 hours per week)

Potential to grow into an ongoing role

Remote / offshore (Asia preferred)

How to Apply



Please include:



Examples of HubSpot setups you’ve built

A short explanation of how you would structure a sales pipeline for a service-based business

Your availability + hourly rate Final Note



We’re not looking for someone to “manage HubSpot.”



We’re looking for someone to build a system that drives growth.

title: Email Retention Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Content Marketer to own our content strategy across platforms, with a primary focus on
 marketing (Klaviyo) and website (Shopify). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelancer or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Plan, write, and execute
 campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo.

- Create and optimize website copy, landing pages, product descriptions, and other on-site content.

- Collaborate with graphic designers to produce visuals aligned with campaigns.

- Analyze
 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve content and campaign performance.

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve messaging, tone, and overall content effectiveness.

- Analyze website behavior and implement content-driven CRO strategies to improve conversions on landing pages, product pages, and key funnels.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC content marketing trends and
 best practices.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret content performance data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain insights to non-technical teammates

- Organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently



Nice To Have (but not required)

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Shopify or website analytics

- Experience in content marketing or CRM/CRO for DTC brands

- Familiarity with user behavior analytics, heatmaps, or funnel optimization



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: &quot
 Retention Specialist – (Your Name)". Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there? 

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job? 

3) Describe one (or more) test/experiment you tried that didn't work as expected? What did you learn, and what would you do differently now? 

4) Submit your portfolio. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles. 

5) Pick one project from the portfolio in question (4) that you are proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project. 

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?



Keywords

creative copywriter, creative copywriting, DTC, CRM, SEO, copywriter, e-commerce copywriter, sales conversion, content writing, direct response copywriting, persuasive copywriting, performance ads, lifecycle marketing, retention marketing,
 copywriter, copy strategy, sales funnel, marketing strategist, copy strategist,
 strategist,
 specialist, copy specialist, sales copywriter, website copywriting, klaviyo, mailchimp, omnisend, performance marketing, postscript, SMS marketing, brand strategist, CRO, landing page, web copy,
 copywriting,
 marketing,
 lifecycle management,

title: Meta Paid Ads Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.

- Remote position

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



What We Offer

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job?

- Familiarity with user behavior analytics, heatmaps, or funnel optimization



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Klaviyo Specialist – (Your Name)". Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job?

3) Describe one (or more) test/experiment you tried that didn't work as expected? What did you learn, and what would you do differently now?

4) Submit your portfolio. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the portfolio in question (4) that you are proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project.

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller To Help Schedule Appointments
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 hard working appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.  I am looking to hire immediately.



I help small business owners with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads, leads are not provided.

-- Call 80+ small business owners and offer them a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- Schedule them for a free consultation if they seem interested.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You are not someone who relies on your hourly wage, but someone who is motivated by performance and earning more through high commissions.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $4/hour base 

-- $20 each qualified appointment that shows up

-- 1st monthly sale = $100

-- 2nd monthly sale = $150   ($250 total)

-- 3rd monthly sale = $300   ($550 total)

-- 4th monthly sale = $350    ($900 total)

-- 5th monthly sale = $400    ($1,300 total)



MATH EXAMPLE (At Only 3 Sold + 12 Show-Ups)

-- $320: 20 hours/week at $4/hour

-- $240: 12 show-ups 

-- $550: 3 sold 

-- Total: $1,110/month

-- Most new reps aim for 2-3 per month - that's where you can do very well here.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "I Love To Dial" in your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) What is more important to you (a base hourly to be safe, or huge commissions to earn even more money):

title: Creative Strategist | Meta Ads
description:
We’re a fast-growing 7-figure DTC brand looking for a full-time Creative Strategist to take full ownership of our ad creative direction.



This is not a “come up with a few ideas” role.



This is a high-output, high-learning, high-ownership role where you’ll drive 15–20 new ad concepts per week and work directly with the founder to scale winning creatives inside a live Meta ad environment.



If you want to grow with a real brand (not just freelance random projects), this is for you.



???? What You’ll Own



Develop 15–20 new ad concepts weekly



Turn data + learnings into iteration plans



Analyze winners & losers inside Meta



Build structured creative testing roadmaps



Write hooks, angles, scripts, and briefs



Work closely with our video editor



Lead weekly learnings calls (collaborative, not reporting)



You are not just ideating.

You are driving creative strategy that directly impacts revenue.



???? Our Environment



7-figure DTC brand



Daily ad spend



Structured CBO testing



Rapid feedback loops



Clear KPIs



We test aggressively and iterate fast



We believe:



No “random testing”



No ego on concepts



Data > opinions



Learnings compound weekly



Our learnings calls are collaborative.

We review performance together, break down direction, and d
 next moves as a team.



???? What Success Looks Like



Strong concept hit rate



Clear documentation of learnings



Faster iteration cycles



Scaling winners



Improving CPA & creative efficiency over time



???? Who This Is For



You’ve worked with DTC brands before



You understand Meta creative testing



You can explain why an ad won (not just that it did)



You can create structure from chaos



You want long-term growth, not gig work



You want to rise with a growing brand



???? Not For You If



You need heavy micromanagement



You struggle with high output



You don’t enjoy performance pressure



You’ve never managed creative in a paid ads environment



???? Role Details



(20 hrs/week) - Subject to change



Long-term position



Competitive salary (based on experience)



Performance bonus structure available for scaled winners



???? To Apply



Send:



Portfolio (ads you worked on)



The best performing ad you helped scale (include spend + CPA/ROAS)



How many concepts per week you’ve handled before



A short Loom explaining your creative testing process



Subject line:

“Creative Strategist – I Drive Winners”

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Role Overview:



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Service Officer to support debt collection and

follow-up activities for the Australian market. This role is primarily
-based, with outbound calls

required when necessary. The ideal candidate has strong written communication skills, can respond

promptly, and is comfortable liaising with multiple stakeholders including customers, insurance

companies, and solicitors.



Duties and Responsibilities:

? Primarily manage customer and stakeholder communication through
, ensuring timely and professional responses.

? Conduct outbound calls when necessary to follow up on pending matters.

? Handle debt collection follow-ups, including tracking outstanding payments and coordinating resolutions.

? Liaise with customers, insurance companies, and other relevant parties to obtain updates, documents, and payment statuses.

? Coordinate with solicitors when needed and seek guidance on specific cases or instructions.

? Monitor and track all cases, ensuring follow-ups are completed within expected timelines.

? Maintain accurate and detailed records of all communications, updates, and outcomes in the system.

? Escalate delays, issues, or complex cases to the appropriate team or supervisor.

? Contribute to overall customer satisfaction by ensuring consistent and proactive follow-ups.



Qualifications and Experience:

? At least 2 years of experience in customer service, BPO, or a similar role.

? Experience supporting the Australian market is an advantage.

? Strong written English communication skills with the ability to draft clear, professional, and concise
s.

? Good verbal communication skills for handling necessary outbound calls.

? High responsiveness and ability to manage multiple follow-ups efficiently.

? Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

? Ability to work independently in a remote, part-time setup.

? Reliable, proactive, and results-oriented.

? Experience in debt collection or accounts receivable follow-ups is an advantage (but not

required).

? No legal background required, but ability to coordinate with legal professionals (e.g., solicitors) when needed.



Technical Requirements:

? Reliable high-speed internet connection (minimum 20 Mbps) with backup connectivity.

? Quiet and professional work-from-home environment.

? A modern laptop or desktop computer with a high-quality noise-canceling headset.



To apply, kindly fill out this form:

title: Part Time Zapier Automation & Real Estate Sales and Marketing Assistant - 20260421
description:
Must answer all questions in job description. Candidate who do not read through details and apply without ansewr to the evaluation questions will not be contacted.



About the Role

I am a realtor and interior designer based in Canada seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Remote Real Estate Virtual Assistant to support daily operations. This role is ideal for someone experienced in zapier automation with customization and some custom code editing, real estate research, data organization, scheduling, and marketing support. You will work closely with me to help streamline operations, transactions, research properties, and maintain marketing activities.



Key Responsibilities



1. Simple Web and Automation Support

- Experience in updating Wordpress websites

- Experience in setting up task automation usng Zapier or Maker



2. Property Research

- Search for properties based on specific client criteria using MLS and other real estate platforms

- Compile property lists for buyers and investment opportunities

- Monitor new listings and notify the realtor of relevant opportunities



3. Price & Market Analysis

- Conduct competitive market analysis (CMA) on comparable properties

- Research recent sales, active listings, and neighborhood trends

- Prepare organized reports and spreadsheets summarizing market data



4. Appointment Coordination

- Schedule property showings, meetings, and client appointments

- Coordinate calendars and confirm appointments with clients and vendors

- Send reminders and maintain organized schedules



5. Marketing Support

- Assist with social media posting and online marketing campaigns

- Prepare listing marketing materials (flyers, brochures,
 campaigns)

- Support CRM updates and lead tracking

- Help organize open house marketing and follow-ups



6. Administrative Support

- Maintain property and client databases

- Organize documents and files related to listings and transactions

- Assist with basic
 communication and task coordination



Qualifications

- Previous experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant is a must; not just property management

- Familiarity with Zapier a must

- Strong research and data organization skills

- Familiarity with real estate terminology and basic market analysis

- Experience with spreadsheets (Google Sheets or Excel)

- Experience with CRM systems and marketing tools is a plus

- Strong written English communication skills

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines but also able to collaborate in team environment and do zoo
etings daily



Preferred Skills

- Experience with web develop tools and process automation tools a must

- Experience working with North American real estate agents preferred

- Knowledge of MLS systems, Zillow, or similar platforms

- Graphic design experience (Canva or similar tools)

- Familiarity of AI assisted content generation: writing, images, and video

- Social media management experience (Instagram,
, LinkedIn)



Compensation

- fixed pay; will not consider hourly

- Long-term opportunity and potentially convert to full time if interested



How to Apply, Please submit:

1. Are you able to work 4 hours a day / 5 days a week Sunday to Thursday PST during PST office hours?

2. Your resume

3. A short introduction about your experience working on Zapier

4. A short introduction about your experience working with real estate agents

5. Portfolio examples of any automation, real estate, marketing work, administrative support, website work you have done

6. Your expected monthly pay for part time 4 hours a day / 5 days a week role

title: Marketing Content Creator
description:
The Role



We’re looking for a Marketing Content Creator who can produce scroll-stopping short-form video content for our apps. You’ll be the creative force behind our TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and other social content — turning gameplay footage, screen recordings, and app features into videos that people actually want to watch and share. You’ll work across multiple apps, so the content stays fresh and varied.



What You’ll Do



• Create 8–15 short-form videos per month across our app portfolio (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

• Record and edit gameplay clips, screen recordings, app walkthroughs, and demo videos

• Write hooks and captions that drive engagement and downloads

• Add voiceover, captions, text overlays, and trending audio to content

• Stay on top of TikTok and Reels trends, formats, and sounds in the gaming and app space

• Adapt your content style for different apps — a mobile game needs different energy than a utility app

• Manage and grow studio social media accounts (TikTok, Instagram, X/Twitter, YouTube)

• Build and maintain a content calendar across all apps and platforms

• Engage with the community — reply to comments, DMs, and app store reviews

• Collaborate with our Growth/Performance Marketer on content that supports paid campaigns and launches



Requirements



• 1–3 years of experience in content creation, social media, or video production

• Strong portfolio of short-form video content — show us your TikTok, Reels, or YouTube Shorts

• Proficient with video editing tools (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

• Comfortable with voiceover and screen recording (face on camera optional, voice required)

• Strong understanding of what performs on TikTok and Reels — hooks, pacing, trending formats

• Good copywriting instincts for captions, CTAs, and video text overlays

• Self-motivated, reliable, and comfortable working independently

• Genuine interest in mobile gaming, apps, or tech



Nice to Have



• Existing audience or following in the mobile gaming or app review niche

• Experience creating content for both iOS and Android apps

• Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma, Photoshop)

• Ability to create content in multiple styles — hype/entertainment, tutorial, review, reaction

• Experience with social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Later, Hootsuite)

• Basic motion graphics or thumbnail design skills



What We Offer

• Flexible remote work — full-time or part-time arrangement available

• Creative freedom to shape the studio’s brand voice from the ground up

• Work across multiple app titles — variety keeps things interesting

• Opportunity to grow with the studio as we scale our portfolio

• Direct access to the founder — no corporate layers or bureaucracy



How to Apply



Send us the following:



• A brief intro about yourself and why this role interests you

• Links to your TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, or any content you’ve created

• Your expected monthly salary and availability (full-time or part-time)



Want to stand out? Record a quick 30–60 second TikTok-style video about any mobile game or app you enjoy. Show us your style — that’s worth more than any resume.

title: Sales and Marketing Growth Manager
description:
Job Title: Sales and Marketing Growth Manager

Department: Sales & Marketing

Reports To: CEO

Location: Remote - Reliable Internet Connection Required (No Exceptions)

Employment Type: Full-Time | 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM PST



Position Summary

The Sales and Marketing Growth Manager at Food Grid owns the full spectrum of marketing and sales functions. This role is responsible for building and driving the company's go-to-market engine through integrated strategies that increase brand visibility, generate qualified leads, grow pipeline, and convert sales. This is a critical leadership position ensuring that the customer journey from awareness to closed sale is seamless, data-driven, and built for scale.



Key Responsibilities

Marketing Leadership



- Own and execute the company's marketing strategy across digital, brand, and content channels.

- Manage and develop a team of 4-6 including Lead Gen, SDR, CSM, and Marketing Content Creator roles.

- Build and manage SEO strategies and backlink initiatives to improve organic search visibility.

- Lead content creation across blogs, newsletters, case studies, and other inbound marketing channels.

- Drive social media presence with a focus on executive thought leadership via LinkedIn and related platforms.

- Launch and continuously optimize lead generation funnels through digital and outbound tactics.

- Oversee targeted
 campaigns, outbound call scripts, and SMS workflows.

- Supervise marketing design, branding consistency, and creative direction across all channels.



Sales Enablement and Management



- Manage a team of Sales Development Representatives (SDRs), guiding performance from prospecting through closing.

- Oversee and optimize both outbound and inbound sales strategies.

- Implement and maintain CRM systems to support a high-conversion, repeatable sales process.

- Map and continuously improve the full customer journey from lead to client success, tracking all KPIs with month-over-month growth targets.

- Ensure sales targets are consistently met or exceeded through rigorous pipeline management, coaching, and training.



Growth and Operations



- Integrate marketing and sales functions to ensure consistent messaging and measurable ROI across all initiatives.

- Leverage data analytics and reporting tools to drive decisions and surface new growth opportunities.

- Continuously refine customer personas, positioning, and campaign targeting based on real performance data.

- Collaborate cross-functionally with product, operations, and executive leadership to align go-to-market strategy with company objectives.





Qualifications



- 7+ years of proven experience managing both sales and marketing functions in a high-growth B2B environment.

- Demonstrated proficiency with AI tools and automation platforms to drive workflow efficiencies - this is a hard requirement, not a nice-to-have.

- Strong command of SEO, content strategy and
 marketing. 

- Zoho CRM experience is a must.

- Hands-on experience managing SDR teams and running full sales cycles from first outreach to closed deal.

- Familiarity with branding, digital design tools, and marketing automation platforms.

- Exceptional communication, analytical, and leadership skills.





Ideal Attributes



- Strategic thinker who executes with urgency in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

- Creative storyteller with a performance-driven, results-first mindset.

- Collaborative leader who can manage up, down, and across departments with equal effectiveness.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and genuinely passionate about growth.

- Deep fluency in sales and marketing strategy and modern SalesTech stacks.





Why Food Grid

Food Grid is a B2B natural ingredient distributor on a clear path to $100M in revenue. We operate across three product divisions - Sprinkles, Shortening and Margarine, and Animal Nutrition - and serve food manufacturers, commercial bakeries, and agricultural operations across North America. This role is a ground-floor opportunity to build and lead the full commercial engine of a fast-moving company with real 
ntum and a founder who is deeply invested in your success.



How to Apply

Please submit your resume along with the following:



- A brief description of the most impactful sales or marketing initiative you have led and the measurable results it produced

- The CRM and marketing platforms you work with most

- Your availability and expected salary range

- Any relevant portfolio links, case studies, or work samples

title: Legal Intake Specialist – Call Center | Outbound Sales | Full-Time | Bonuses
description:
Legal Intake Specialist – Call Center | Outbound Sales | Full-Time | Bonuses



Join a well-established law firm intake team that has been successfully helping clients for over a decade. In this role, you will speak with potential clients seeking legal assistance and help determine whether their case may qualify for representation.



This position involves primarily outbound outreach, along with some inbound calls, to connect with individuals who may need our services. Our firm operates on a contingency basis, meaning clients typically do not pay legal fees unless we win or settle their case.



This is consultative selling, not high-pressure sales. We focus on understanding each person’s situation, providing guidance, and helping them take the next step toward resolving their legal matter.



If you are a motivated closer with sales experience and a genuine desire to help people, this opportunity may be a great fit.



We offer both individual performance incentives, daily target bonuses and team-based incentives to support your growth and reward your success.



Responsibilities



* Conduct outbound calls to potential clients

* Answer inbound inquiries and assess legal needs

* Qualify potential clients based on firm criteria

* Clearly explain the firm’s process and contingency fee structure

* Provide a professional, empathetic, and helpful experience

* Accurately document call details and client information

* Collaborate with tea
mbers to meet performance goals



Qualifications



* Sales, legal experience or client-facing experience preferred

* Strong communication and listening skills

* Ability to build trust quickly with potential clients

* Comfortable working in a goal-oriented environment

* Professional, reliable, and detail-oriented

* Interest in helping individuals with legal matters



Schedule



* 40 hours per week

* PST business hours

* Full-time role



What We Offer



* Individual performance incentives

* Team-based bonuses

* Supportive and experienced intake team

* Opportunity for growth within the firm

* Meaningful work helping people access legal services



Apply Now by sending your resume and a short video introduction.

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant to the CEO. Department: Operations .Reports To: CEO .Location: Remote - Reliable Internet Connection Required (No Exceptions). Employment Type: Full-Time (9:00AM-5:00PM PST)

 

About Food Grid

Food Grid is a global B2B natural ingredient distributor specializing in producing, formulating, and distributing premium natural food ingredients to manufacturers, commercial bakeries, and agricultural operations. Our trading activity spans North America, South America, Europe, Southeast Asia, India, and the Caribbean. Backed by years of deep industry expertise, we pride ourselves on delivering valuable solutions to every partner, distributor, and customer we serve - through exceptional products, logistics, and hands-on support.



We are growing fast and we need people who can keep up.

 

Position Summary

We are looking for a sharp, tech-forward Executive Assistant who thrives in a fast-paced environment and operates with a high degree of autonomy, precision, and professionalism. This is not a traditional EA role. You will work directly alongside the Founder and CEO, managing critical day-to-day operations while also serving as a frontline point of contact for clients and partners. If you are highly organized, deeply proficient in AI and automation tools, and energized by complexity - this role is built for you.

 

Must-Have Requirements

• 5+ years of experience in an executive assistant or senior administrative role

• AI and technology stack proficiency at a 9-10 out of 10 - this is non-negotiable

• Advanced Excel skills at a 9-10 out of 10 (formulas, pivot tables, data management)

• Hands-on experience with automation tools to systemize and streamline recurring workflows

• Solution-oriented mindset with a strong ability to think outside the box

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills - phone and
 etiquette are critical

• Strong relationship-building and interpersonal skills

• Reliable, punctual, and highly accountable

 

Key Responsibilities

CEO Support

• Manage the CEO's inbox, calendar, and daily priorities with speed and accuracy

• Coordinate domestic and international travel arrangements, including travel hacking strategies to optimize cost and logistics

• Anticipate needs, remove friction, and ensure the CEO is always prepared and on schedule

Operations and Administration

• Monitor and communicate risk exposure to management as needed

• Manage multiple priorities simultaneously without dropping the ball

• Leverage AI tools and automation platforms to reduce manual work and improve team efficiency

• Maintain proficiency across the full Microsoft Office suite - Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook

Client Relations and Customer Success

• Build and maintain strong relationships with existing clients and prospective new partners

• Provide responsive, courteous customer support and resolve issues efficiently

• Follow up with team and customers on all open projections, purchase orders, and commitments across monthly, quarterly, and annual cycles

• Complete customer request forms and distribute appropriate certificates and documentation as needed

 

Why Food Grid

Food Grid is on a clear path to $100M in revenue. You will have direct access to the founder, real responsibility from day one, and the opportunity to grow alongside a company that is scaling across multiple divisions and global markets. We invest in our people and we reward performance.

 

How to Apply

Please apply only if you have 5+ years of Executive Assistant experience and meet the qualifications listed above.

Submit your current resume along with a video of up to 3 minutes to 
 addressing the following five questions:

1. Why are you interested in this position?

2. What do you know about Food Grid?

3. What is your ideal work environment?

4. What are your strengths?

5. Where do you see yourself in five years?

We appreciate the time and intention behind every application and look forward to learning more about you.



Cheers,

Jonathan

title: Meta Media Buyer
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Media Buyer to take over the day-to-day management of our Meta ad account.



This is NOT a creative strategist role.

We already have a strong creative pipeline and testing system in place.



Your role is simple:

Execute, monitor, optimize, and scale what’s working.



About the Account:

- E-commerce brand in the health/supplement space

- Spending: $200k–$300k/month

- Structure: Simple CBO setup



Workflow:

- Launch ads into CBO

- Let Meta optimize

- Turn off underperformers

- Scale winners



We are not looking for someone to overcomplicate things. We want someone who is excellent at operating a simple system with precision.



Your Responsibilities:

- Launch new ads into existing CBO campaigns

- Monitor performance daily

- Turn off underperforming ads quickly and confidently

- Identify winners and scale budgets appropriately



Manage and organize:

- Whitelisting / partnership ads

- Account structure

- Campaign hygiene

- Create new campaigns/pages if required

- Communicate clearly with daily and weekly updates

- Daily Communication (Very Important)



You must provide a daily short loom (5-minutes max) plus a short written summary. Each day, clearly explain:

- What you turned off

- Why you turned it off

- What you scaled up or down

- Why you scaled it

- What you are monitoring closely



We want simple, clear, data-driven communication.

- Weekly Reporting (Every Monday)



You will also provide a weekly report covering:

- Performance Overview

     - Last 7 days

     - Last 14 days

     - Last 30 days

     - Key Metrics

     - MER

     - CPA

     - ROAS

     - Spend

     - Revenue trends

     - Insights & Actions

     - What is improving

     - What is declining

     - What actions were taken

     - What should be scaled, cut, or watched next

     - Creative Feedback

     - What types of ads are working

     - What is clearly not working

     - Patterns the creative team and founder should know

This report will be reviewed by the founder and creative strategists.



What We’re Looking For:

- Proven experience managing $100k+/month in Meta ad spend

- Extremely high attention to detail

- Strong judgment around when to cut, hold, or scale

- Process-driven and consistent

- Clear communicator

- Comfortable providing Loom updates regularly

- Someone who genuinely cares about performance and ownership



What This Role Is NOT: 

- Not a creative strategist role

- Not a copywriting role

- Not a beginner role

- Not for someone who needs constant hand-holding



Position Type

- Open to part-time or full-time depending on experience and availability.

- This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.



Compensation:

- Monthly retainer based on experience

- Performance bonus potential for the right person



TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY:



We will only consider candidates who follow the steps below.

1) Record a Loom Video (Required)

In your Loom, please:

- Introduce yourself and your experience

- Show ad accounts you currently manage or have managed

- Walk through how you operate inside the account

- Show how you review performance on a daily basis



2) Most Important Part of the Application

The most important question is this:

- How do you d
 when to turn off a non-performing ad, when to leave it running, and when to scale it?

- In your Loom, we want you to answer this in as much detail as possible.



Please walk us through:

- The metrics you look at

- The timeframes you use

- How you judge spend vs performance

- How you think about CPA, ROAS, MER, CTR, hook rate, hold rate, conversion rate, etc.

- How you avoid killing ads too early

- How you avoid letting bad ads run too long

- How you d
 when an ad deserves more budget

- How you think about scaling inside a CBO structure



We are looking for the most detailed and thoughtful explanation possible.



The candidate with the clearest, most detailed Loom explaining how they d
 to kill non-performers and scale winners will stand out the most.



Also Answer These Questions:

- What is the largest monthly ad spend you’ve managed?

- What does your daily workflow look like?

- Have you worked with CBO-heavy structures before?

- What types of e-commerce brands have you worked with?

- Please share screenshots or examples of results from accounts you’ve managed



FINAL NOTE:

This role is about trust, detail, and ownership. We are looking for someone who:

- Checks the account every day

- Makes smart decisions without overcomplicating things

- Communicates clearly

- Understands exactly when to turn ads off and when to scale



If that sounds like you, apply with your Loom.

title: Remote Operations & Car Parts Coordinator (Automotive)
description:
Location: Remote



We are a fast-growing, digital-first car dealership based in Sweden, specializing in online car sales with nationwide delivery. We are now looking for a highly structured and detail-oriented Remote Operations & Parts Coordinator to become a key part of our logistics and workshop operations.



This is NOT a passive admin role. You will act as a central “control tower” in our operations — ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



Parts & Suppliers:

- Identify and order car parts based on internal requests

- Communicate with suppliers (pricing, availability, delivery times)

- Track all orders and ensure timely delivery

- Follow up on delays and missing shipments



Operations & Flow Control:

- Monitor all vehicles in our system (Airtable)

- Identify cars that are “stuck” or delayed in the process

- Flag issues proactively (missing parts, unbooked services, delays)

- Ensure every car always has a clear next step

- Coordinate with internal tea
mbers via Slack



Daily Execution:

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date data in Airtable

- Post daily summaries of priorities and issues

- Follow up with tea
mbers until tasks are completed



---



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



- No car is “forgotten” or left without a next step

- Parts are ordered quickly and tracked accurately

- Delays are identified BEFORE they become problems

- The team always knows what needs to be done next



---



 WHO YOU ARE



- Extremely organized and structured

- Proactive — you don’t wait for instructions

- Comfortable managing many tasks at once

- Strong communicator in English (written)

- Detail-oriented and reliable

- Problem-solver mindset



---



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience in automotive industry

- Experience with Airtable, Slack or similar tools

- Experience in logistics, operations, or supply chain



---



 TOOLS YOU WILL USE



- Airtable (main system)

- Slack (team communication)

- Google / supplier websites



---



WHY THIS ROLE IS UNIQUE



- You will play a critical role in a fast-scaling company

- High level of ownership and responsibility

- Clear structure, but also freedom to improve processes

- Opportunity to grow into a larger operations role over time



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:

1. A short video introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with similar roles

3. An example of how you stay organized when handling many tasks



---



We are looking for someone reliable, structured, and hungry to grow. If you enjoy creating order, solving problems, and being the person who keeps everything running smoothly — this role is for you.

title: Link Acquisition & Digital PR Specialist
description:
Remote | Full-Time | Work with a Global Creative Team



About Penji

We’re not your typical SEO team—and we’re not looking for a typical link builder.

Penji is an on-demand design service trusted by brands worldwide. We don’t believe in spammy backlinks, low-quality directories, or generic outreach. Instead, we focus on earning placements on high-authority design, marketing, and SaaS publications.

If you know how to turn outreach into real partnerships—and backlinks into brand visibility—you’ll fit right in.



Your Mission

s That Get Replies – Personalized, compelling outreach (no templates, no spam)

description:

We are looking for a dedicated, highly responsive, full-time virtual assistant to help manage daily operations including phone support, customer service, shipping coordination, lead follow-ups, and logistics.

 and messenger support. You will be responding to leads using Microsoft Outlook Webmail,

Training will be provided, but you must remain attentive throughout your shift, respond quickly, and communicate clearly with U.S.-based customers at all times.



We are looking for long-term, career-minded applicants who want stable, full-time work. If you are just looking for the highest-paying job you can find this week, this role is not a good fit.

s using Outlook Webmail (GoDaddy-hosted)

Create and send prepaid shipping labels using

Respond to
 messages and comments quickly

Confirm customer payout method and amount and relay details to the payment manager

Stay attentive and responsive to phone calls,
s, and messages throughout the shift



REQUIREMENTS:



Excellent spoken English with clear pronunciation and natural grammar

Strong verbal communication skills and comfort speaking with U.S. customers on the phone

Excellent written English and professional communication skills

Previous tech or computer-related experience such as IT support, tech support, systems administration, or similar roles

Very detail-oriented and organized

Fast and reliable internet with a quiet, distraction-free environment for phone calls

Familiar with Google Voice, OpenPhone (Quo), Outlook, and 
 or able to learn quickly

Must be available during U.S. business hours and evenings/weekends as listed below

Experience in customer service, eCommerce, logistics, or phone-based support is a plus

Must consistently monitor and respond to calls,
s, and messages throughout the workday

title: Geologist / Geological Engineer
description:
GEOLOGIST / GEOLOGICAL ENGINEER (OFF-SITE / REMOTE)

(ca. 32-40 hrs/week)



Geoprofile Ltd. is a small and fast-growing geotechnical company, operating in Switzerland, Liechtenstein and near-border zones of surrounding countries. We provide information about the subsoil and develop solutions for various geotechnical problems. We focus on the design, dimensioning and control of shallow and deep foundations, and construction pit excavations.

We are currently seeking a motivated and proactive Geologist / Geological Engineer to join our team in a fully remote position. In this role, you will support our ground investigation team in data processing, analysis, and interpretation. 



Your tasks include:

- Data processing and interpretation of cone penetration test (CPT) and dynamic probing (DPSH) results, primarily using Excel, with future development toward programming-based workflows (Python)

- Data quality control (data error detection, monitoring of zero values and calibration files, verification of field-measured coordinates)

- Daily coordination with other remote team members and project managers via Teams for task assignment and feedback

- Quarterly preparation of project statistics (project costs and field team efficiency)



Your profile:

- Degree in Earth Sciences, Geology, or Geological Engineering

- Preferably experience with loose (unconsolidated) soils, soil mechanics, geomorphology, and

sedimentology

- Strong command of English (written and spoken)

- Experience with CPT and DPSH data interpretation is an advantage (training will be provided)

- Experience in programming, coding, or scripting (preferably Python) is highly valued

- Strong motivation to further develop programming skills

- Ability to work independently, manage your own schedule, and prioritize tasks reliably



What we offer:

We value long-term collaboration built on trust, reliability, and professional growth. You will work independently within clearly defined priorities while being part of a supportive and experienced international team. We offer flexibility, structured onboarding, and opportunities to develop technical and programming expertise. If you are interested in this position, please reply so that we can get to meet each other. We are looking forward to welcoming you as part of our team!

title: Systems & Automation Specialist (SuiteDash VA)
description:
Job Overview:

We are looking for a Systems & Automation Specialist to help build and optimize internal workflows using SuiteDash.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys organizing systems, building automations, and improving processes. You will work independently in a fully remote, async environment where output and quality matter more than hours.



Responsibilities:

Phase 1 — Cleanup

• Audit and clean up all custom fields in SuiteDash: remove, consolidate, or rename as needed.

• Conduct a full overhaul of products, items, and subscriptions in SuiteDash, ensuring everything is properly set up for efficiency.

Phase 2 — Recurring Task Automation

• Build recurring task templates for monthly, quarterly, and annual tasks (both internal and client-facing).

• Ensure templates are client-specific (e.g., bank account names, service details) rather than generic placeholders, while keeping them adaptable for future clients.

• Roll out automated recurring tasks across existing clients, making this the first major deliverable of Phase 2.

Phase 3 — New Client Funnel & Onboarding Automation

• Design and build visually polished intake and inquiry forms for new client outreach on the website.

• Use CSS and SuiteDash's design tools to ensure forms are beyond the default styling.

• Include a unique identifier for tracking referral sources.

• Forms should trigger automated outreach or follow-up sequences in SuiteDash once submitted.

• Automate onboarding processes once a prospect converts to a client.

• This includes service selection, document requests, engagement letter delivery/signing, payment setup, and activating recurring tasks.

Phase 4 — Documentation (Ongoing)

• Technical Configuration Guide: Create and maintain a detailed record of SuiteDash configurations, automations, and triggers, and the reasoning behind each decision.

• Internal User Guide: Develop a step-by-step guide for internal team use, covering workflows, client onboarding, and task setups.

Client-Facing Guides: Produce two guides:

1. A portal user guide explaining client interaction with their dashboard.

2. An onboarding guide with visuals, screenshots, and possible short video walkthroughs.

Documentation should be either static or ideally built as interactive playbooks using Notion.

Ongoing Tasks

• Provide daily check-ins and check-outs via Slack, detailing the day’s progress, future work, and any support needed.

• Be self-managed in day-to-day tasks but responsive to immediate priorities when needed.



Requirements

• At least 1 year of experience in systems and automation roles, with proficiency in SuiteDash.

• Proficient in HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript for developing web-based tools. Knowledge of Claude AI is a plus, with experience in creating tools for bookkeeping and client process optimization.

•Notion experience is highly desirable, especially for building interactive documentation and playbooks.

• Excellent communication skills, particularly via Slack for daily check-ins/check-outs.

• Experience with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets) for process documentation and task management.

• Strong problem-solving and systems thinking, with the ability to work independently and flexibly.

title: Creative Director

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Hours: US time zones, weekends included



Roots Global is looking for one sharp, confident communicator to own our discovery call stage. This isn't a prospecting role. Every person you speak with has already raised their hand, picked a time, and added it to your calendar.



Your job is simple: show up, run the call, make the call.



The Role in Plain Terms



You'll handle inbound discovery calls — quick 10 to 15 minute conversations where you figure out whether a lead is the right fit for what we do. Some you'll pass forward. Others you'll politely send on their way. Either way, you're the first real voice behind the brand, which means how you show up matters.



Think of it as the bridge between marketing and sales. Not quite a setter, not quite a closer — something in between, and arguably more important than both.



Your Day-to-Day



Running pre-booked calls from your calendar. Asking sharp, well-timed questions. Reading people quickly and making a clear call on fit. Logging notes cleanly so the next person in the chain isn't flying blind. Being reliably online during US hours.

That's it. No dialing cold lists, no nurturing sequences, no "just checking in"
s.



What's In It For You



A base salary with commission on top. A steady stream of warm, inbound bookings. A tested call framework so you're never guessing what to ask. And real reps in a seat where your skill level shows up in the numbers every week.



Who We're Looking For



Someone fluent in English with a confident phone presence. Someone who can run a focused conversation without it feeling like an interrogation or a script. Prior experience in setting, closing, or any sales-adjacent role is a plus, though what matters more is how you think on a call. You need to be comfortable with US hours and weekend availability, and you need to actually want a role where output is visible.



To Apply



Record a short video — keep it under two minutes — and walk us through:



What kind of call experience you've had (setting, closing, qualifying, or anything related)

Your availability across US time zones and weekends

How you'd approach a 15-minute discovery conversation with a warm lead

title: Part-Time / Freelance Content Creator & Social Media Manager
description:
We’re looking for a talented Content Creator & Social Media Manager to join our growing wellness brand. If you love creating high-quality visual content, understand how social media actually works, and enjoy building brands with meaning — this role is for you.



This is a part-time / freelance role (up to 10 hours per week) with flexible hours and room to grow.



About Us



We design and sell premium saunas and hot tubs focused on wellness, lifestyle, and meaningful experiences. Our content is not just about products — it’s about connection, relaxation, and quality time.



What You’ll Do



Create engaging photo & video content (reels, shorts, longer-form)

Edit content for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube

Plan and execute content that showcases products, customers, and lifestyle

Take charge of social media accounts (Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn)

Engage with followers and build a strong community

Set up and manage
 / Meta Ads

Create product and marketing listings on WordPress (no coding required)

Stay on top of trends and bring fresh content ideas



What We’re Looking For



Strong skills in video editing and visual storytelling

Experience managing social media for brands

Understanding of different platforms (IG, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn)

Experience with Meta Ads

Comfortable using WordPress

Organised, proactive, and able to work independently

Bonus: Interest in wellness, lifestyle, or sauna space



This Role Is For Someone Who



Can create and execute (not just edit)

Works independently and takes initiative

Values quality over quantity



This Role Is NOT For



Someone who only edits but doesn’t understand marketing

Someone who needs constant direction

Someone who avoids website/content management tasks



How to Apply?



Please send:



Your hourly rate or project-based pricing

Links to social media accounts you manage

Samples of your content work

Brief experience with WordPress or website content

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: VIDEO AD EDITOR - SUPPLEMENT & HEALTH DROPSHIPPING BRAND | EUROPE
description:
VIDEO AD EDITOR - SUPPLEMENT & HEALTH DROPSHIPPING BRAND | EUROPE



Location: Remote (CET timezone required)

Type: Full-Time

Pay: $70/week, paid every Monday + performance bonuses



---



WHO WE ARE



We are a fast-scaling supplement and health & beauty dropshipping brand running aggressive Meta Ads across European markets. We test fast, scale winners, and cut losers without hesitation. Small team, no politics, no pointless meetings. Just real money and real results.



---



THE ROLE



We need a video editor who knows the dropshipping ad game. You are not here to make pretty videos. You are here to produce direct response ads that stop the scroll and convert. You will be given a product, a competitor link, and access to our tools. From there you work independently - no hand holding, no micromanaging.



This is a pure video editing role. No media buying required.



Reports To: COO



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



-> You receive a product name and a competitor ad library link

-> You go through competitor ads and find the high performing ones we have not ripped yet by checking our internal sheet

-> You download the winning ads using our tools

-> You rip and adapt them - swap the voiceover using ElevenLabs, add captions in CapCut, tweak the hook and scroll stopper

-> You deliver ready-to-launch creatives fast and at volume

-> You stay updated on what is performing and what is not so your next batch is better

-> You produce a minimum of 3-5 creatives per day

-> You are online and responsive during CET hours



---



WHAT A NORMAL DAY LOOKS LIKE



Morning - Log in, check which products need new creatives, review our sheet for ads not yet ripped.

Mid Morning - Find and download winning competitor ads, start ripping and adapting.

Afternoon - Deliver finished creatives, get feedback, start next batch.

End of Day - Update the sheet, flag anything relevant to the team on 
.



---



TOOLS WE PROVIDE



-> CapCut

-> ElevenLabs

-> CaptionsAI

-> GetHookd

-> Trendtrack

-> Google Sheets

-> 



---



RESULTS WE EXPECT



-> Minimum 3-5 ready-to-launch creatives delivered per day

-> Fresh hooks, swapped voiceovers, captions - every single ad

-> Zero need for follow up - you deliver without being chased

-> Creatives that are based on what is actually performing, not random choices

-> Fast turnaround - if we need a creative today it is done today



---



4R MODEL



Role - You are the person responsible for keeping our creative pipeline full at all times. The ads team needs fresh creatives every day. That is on you.



Responsibilities - Find winning ads, rip them, adapt them, deliver them. Every day.



Results - 3-5 creatives per day minimum. Fast. Independent. No excuses.



Requirements



-> Proven experience editing video ads for dropshipping brands specifically

-> Comfortable with CapCut and ElevenLabs from day one - no training provided

-> Experience ripping and adapting competitor ads

-> Familiar with UGC, VSL, and direct response ad formats

-> Available CET timezone daily

-> Fast, independent, and reliable - you figure things out yourself

-> Portfolio with examples of ads you have edited required



---



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



-> Beginners who need to be taught everything

-> People who need constant feedback to deliver

-> Anyone who takes days to turn around a simple edit

-> People looking for a creative director role - this is hands on execution



---



COMPENSATION



-> $70/week fixed, paid every Monday

-> Performance bonuses for creatives that become winning ads

-> Long term role with a fast growing team



---



HOW TO APPLY



-> Your experience editing video ads for dropshipping brands - what niches, what formats

-> Examples or portfolio of ads you have edited

-> Confirmation you can use CapCut and ElevenLabs independently from day one

-> Your answer to this: We give you a product and a competitor link. Walk us through exactly what you do from there.



Keep it short and specific. We respond to serious candidates fast.

title: Funnel Builder & Ads Manager
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and tech-savvy Virtual Assistant Funnel Builder & Ads Manager to design, implement, and optimize high-converting sales funnels and paid advertising campaigns. This role combines funnel development with ad strategy to drive traffic, generate leads, and increase conversions.



Key Responsibilities

Build and manage sales funnels using platforms such as ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel, Kajabi, and Kartra

Create landing pages, opt-in forms, sales pages, and thank-you pages

Integrate
 marketing systems like Mailchimp or ActiveCampaign

Set up automation workflows, tagging, and lead nurturing sequences

Connect payment gateways such as Stripe and PayPal

Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns using Meta Ads Manager and/or Google Ads Manager

Conduct A/B testing on funnels and ads to improve performance

Monitor analytics and KPIs (CTR, conversion rate, CPA, ROAS)

Troubleshoot funnel and ad issues to ensure smooth performance

Collaborate with marketing and content teams to align messaging and branding



Required Skills & Qualifications

Proven experience building and optimizing sales funnels

Experience managing paid ads campaigns 
/Instagram and/or Google)

Strong understanding of digital marketing strategy and customer journey

Familiarity with CRM systems and marketing automation tools

Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS is a plus

Experience with integrations (Zapier or similar tools)

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications

Experience writing or optimizing ad copy and funnel copy

Knowledge of retargeting and audience segmentation strategies

Familiarity with eCommerce or course-based funnels

Understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO)



3 Core Skills for This Role

Funnel Development & Automation – Ability to build, integrate, and automate complete funnel systems across platforms like Kartra

Paid Advertising Management – Expertise in creating, managing, and scaling campaigns using Meta Ads Manager and Google 



Ads Manager

Conversion Optimization & Analytics – Ability to analyze data and improve performance across funnels and ads



Work Environment

Remote / Virtual position

Flexible hours with performance-based goals and deadlines

title: Cartoon, Storybook & Animation Graphic Designer
description:
We are seeking a creative and versatile Cartoon, Storybook & Animation Graphic Designer VA to bring stories to life through engaging illustrations and simple animations. This role is perfect for someone passionate about children’s content, character development, and visual storytelling across both static and animated formats.



Key Responsibilities

Design and illustrate original cartoon characters, environments, and storybook scenes

Create engaging illustrations for children’s books (print and digital)

Develop short animations (GIFs, motion clips, simple storytelling animations)

Collaborate with writers and tea
mbers to visually interpret story concepts

Maintain consistent character design, style, and visual identity across projects

Format artwork for publishing platforms (e.g., Amazon KDP, print-ready files)

Create animated and static assets for marketing (social media, promos, ads)

Revise designs and animations based on feedback

Organize and manage digital creative assets



Required Skills & Qualifications

Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, After Effects, Procreate, or similar

Strong illustration and cartooning skills (portfolio required)

Basic to intermediate animation skills (2D animation, motion graphics, or frame-by-frame)

Understanding of storytelling through both static and animated visuals

Ability to follow creative direction and meet deadlines

Strong attention to detail and creativity



Preferred Qualifications

Experience creating children’s books or educational content

Familiarity with animation tools (Toon Boom, Blender, After Effects, etc.)

Experience with book formatting tools (Canva, InDesign)

Knowledge of self-publishing platforms like Amazon KDP



Basic video editing skills

Key Competencies (3 Core Skills)

Visual Storytelling: Ability to bring stories to life through both illustration and animation

Creative Design & Animation: Strong originality in character creation and motion design

Time Management: Ability to manage multiple creative projects and meet deadlines



Work Setup

Remote (Virtual Assistant role)

Flexible hours with project-based deadlines



How to Apply



Submit your portfolio including both illustration and animation samples, along with a brief introduction.
