title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: HR Recruiter (Startup | Result-Driven Only)
description:

Job Responsibilities

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer
description:
YouTube Thumbnail Designer Wanted



Join Vibez Creative, Australia’s fastest-growing video podcast agency,  and help us launch 1,000 high-impact video podcasts.



We work with top-tier founders, CEOs, and industry disruptors to create video podcasts that scale their authority and drive millions of views. We're now looking for an elite YouTube Thumbnail Designer who understands the art and science of getting people to click.



This isn’t just about making things look good,  it’s about creating attention-grabbing visuals that stop the scroll, drive CTR, and grow channels. If you live and breathe YouTube design, study the algorithm, and can reverse-engineer virality, we want you.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Design High-CTR Thumbnails: Create custom YouTube thumbnails that are bold, clean, and magnetic, with a deep understanding of contrast, facial expression, typography, and composition.

- Visual Storytelling: Translate titles and video topics into powerful visual narratives that demand attention.

- Trend Awareness: Stay tapped into viral YouTube design trends and top creator styles (MrBeast, Colin & Samir, Hormozi, etc.) — and know when to innovate vs imitate.

- Performance-Driven Iteration: Collaborate with our team to test, track, and improve thumbnail performance based on CTR and viewer retention insights.



Must Haves:



- Proven YouTube Thumbnail Portfolio, with real view counts and case studies attached

- Experience designing YouTube thumbnails for podcasts, personal brands, or media channels

- Deep understanding of YouTube SEO, algorithm behaviour, and thumbnail/title synergy

- Expert-level Canva or Photoshop skills

- High attention to detail, text spacing, colour correction, cropping and clarity matter

- Fast turnaround times

- Great communicator with proactive updates and clear timelines

- Able to work between 8AM–5PM AEST



Why Join Vibez Creative?



- Career Growth: This role has potential to evolve into a full-time position leading thumbnail strategy across all client accounts.

- Massive Impact: Your designs will appear on channels viewed by hundreds of thousands, with measurable impact on performance.

- Creative Freedom: Collaborate with a world-class team while bringing your own flavour and ideas to every design.

- Learn from the Best: Work with 7–8 figure brands, leading creators, and a fast-growing agency that’s obsessed with performance.



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Link to your thumbnail portfolio with view counts or performance examples.

2. 30–60 second video introducing yourself and why you’re a fit for this role.

3. Any relevant case studies or before/after examples of how your thumbnails improved performance.



We're hiring immediately, if you're obsessed with YouTube design and want to create work that actually gets seen, apply now.



Good Vibez, 



Kal, COO

title: Proactive E-commerce & Admin Assistant (Part-Time / High Autonomy)
description:
About the Role:



I am a busy entrepreneur running a car dealership alongside an active e-commerce business in Singapore. I do not have the time to micromanage. I am looking for a highly organized, independent, and proactive Virtual Assistant to take complete ownership of my daily task checklists.



You must be the kind of person who solves problems before I even notice them, suggests improvements to my systems, and can be trusted to manage the daily workflow flawlessly.



Schedule & Compensation:



Rate: $5.50 / hour (Approx. $500 / month)



Hours: 3 hours per day.



Schedule: 7 days a week with flexible off days as needed



Core Responsibilities:



E-Commerce Daily Operations (Shopee/Lazada/1688): Fully manage the daily health and operations of multiple e-commerce stores. This includes executing customer service, processing specific pre-orders and 1688 orders, managing returns/refunds, monitoring inventory thresholds, entering platform campaigns, and actively checking for banned or deleted listings.



Automotive Business Admin (Fitz Automobile): Maintain back-end organization for a car dealership. This involves syncing vehicle prices across multiple listing platforms, diligently tracking and alerting me of road tax expirations, and organizing incoming invoices and new car data into Google Sheets.



Requirements



Must have own Photoshop (or willing to purchase)

Must have stable internet AND active phone number for OTP

Must have experience with Shopee/Lazada seller center

Must be comfortable with basic photo editing (cropping, touch-ups, healing tool)



Extreme attention to detail. you execute daily checklists with zero missed steps.



High level of autonomy; you know how to find answers and troubleshoot issues independently without waiting for instructions.



Strong organizational skills and the ability to work highly efficiently within a 3-hour daily window.



Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):



If you do not follow these instructions exactly, your application will be automatically deleted.



Subject Line: Make the subject line of your application: "Proactive VA: [Your Favorite Color] - [Your Name]"



"Internet Speed Test: Please include a screenshot of your speed test



Video Introduction: Record a 1-to-2-minute video introducing yourself. In the video, explain why you are a good fit for a highly autonomous role and give one example of a time you proactively solved a problem for a past client without being asked.



Written Question: In your application message, answer this briefly: If a product listing gets unexpectedly deleted by Lazada and I am unreachable, what are your immediate next steps?

title: Part Time | Content Creator — Personal Brand (Health, Identity and Online Business)
description:
WE’RE HIRING: Part Time | Content Creator — Personal Brand (Health, Identity and Online Business)



We’re looking for a content creator who deeply understands personal brand storytelling — not just posting. This person will bring voice notes, raw ideas, and the brand’s movement to life across short form video and written content, helping grow audience connection and conversion.

_______________________ 



About the Client & Brand

Country mum • former chef • online business owner building an authentic personal brand that blends whole food, nourishment, body - led living, identity & self - leadership, simple sustainable online income, and grounded rural life. The content is emotional, story - driven, and created to move women from survival into self - trust, energy, and aligned income.

_______________________ 



Key Responsibilities

• Transform raw thoughts, voice notes, and messy ideas into magnetic content

• Create Reels (hooks, structure, captions) and carousel posts

• Produce short - form written content optimized for engagement and shareability

• Repurpose content across platforms for reach and consistency

• Contribute to content strategy focused on growth + connection

• Support regular content cadence and 
ntum 

_______________________ 



Who You Are

• Comfortable with grounded, real - life audiences (especially rural women/mothers)

• Skilled in emotion - led marketing and storytelling

• Able to translate messy input into clear, high impact content

• Creative, intuitive, proactive — brings ideas and initiative

• Values aligned with health, personal growth, freedom, and online business

_______________________

• Reels strategy, viral hooks, and short form video know how

• Ability to think in series/story arcs and audience psychology

• Experience repurposing long - form into growth - focused short content

_______________________  



Vibe & Cultural Fit

• Grounded, real, and powerful energy

• Emotionally intelligent, humble, and courageous storyteller

• Excited to build a movement and connect authentically with an audience 

_______________________  



What We Offer

• Location: Remote (must be available Sydney time zone: 10:00 AM–1:00 PM AEST)

• Type: Part time, ongoing

• Hours: 2–3 hours/day to start (potential to increase)

• VA Rate: AUD $ 7 - 10 / hour (depending on experience and expertise)

_______________________  



How to Apply? 

Click the application form here 
 

_______________________  



Important Note: 

This role requires demonstrated YEARS of social media experience and examples of MEASURABLE results. 



If you lack hands-on experience managing brand accounts, please DO NOT apply. 



We appreciate your understanding and encourage qualified candidates to submit their applications.

title: Ecommerce Executive/Specialist (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN ECOMMERCE



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Oversee day-to-end e-commerce operations (catalog, price checks, campaign execution, inventory management, shipping, logistics, customer service and returns) for the Seller Center Stores and the international House of Hur accounts across Singapore, Malaysia, Taiwan, and Vietnam.

- Manage product listings across online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies within Margin Chart, Platform Ads (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok Seller Center) and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management with business insights and clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with team and provide ad-hoc support for special events and projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–4 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Bigseller Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.

title: Financial Planning & Analysis with Procurement  experience
description:
We are seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Planning & Analyst professional with procurement experience to support financial planning, budgeting, forecasting, cost optimization, and procurement-related financial operations. The role will work closely with finance, procurement, and business teams to manage budgets, analyze spend patterns, optimize vendor costs, and support strategic financial decision-making.



Key Responsibilities



Financial Planning & Analysis



Prepare annual budgets, financial forecasts, and long-term financial plans

Conduct variance analysis between actuals, budgets, and forecasts

Develop financial models to support business decisions

Monitor profitability, revenue trends, and operational expenses

Prepare monthly MIS reports, dashboards, and financial presentations for leadership

Procurement Financial Management



Partner with procurement teams for vendor budgeting and spend forecasting

Analyze procurement spend and identify cost-saving opportunities

Monitor purchase orders, vendor contracts, and payment schedules

Evaluate procurement costs and support negotiation strategies

Ensure optimal utilization of procurement budgets

Vendor & Contract Analysis



Review vendor agreements from a financial perspective

Track contract renewals, pricing structures, and payment terms

Ensure procurement compliance with internal financial policies

Reporting & Controls



Prepare procurement spend reports for management review

Ensure data accuracy and financial control measures

Support internal/external audits related to procurement spending

Cross-functional Collaboration



Work closely with Finance, Procurement, Operations, and Leadership teams

Support strategic initiatives involving cost planning and procurement decisions

Required Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Commerce, Economics, Supply Chain, or related field

MBA Finance / CA / CMA preferred

Experience



3–8 years of experience in Financial Planning & Analysis, Procurement Finance, Strategic Sourcing, or related roles

Required Skills



Financial planning and forecasting

Procurement budgeting

Spend analysis

Cost optimization

Financial modeling

Advanced Excel

ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite, etc.)

Power BI / Tableau (preferred)

Vendor management understanding

Strong negotiation support skills

Key KPIs



Budget accuracy

Forecast accuracy

Procurement savings achieved

Vendor cost optimization

Reporting accuracy and timeliness



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: Advanced GoHighLevel Consultant – Funnels, AI Agents & Claude Expert
description:
Full-Time Advanced GoHighLevel Consultant – Funnels, AI Agents, Automation & Claude Expert.



Are you a GoHighLevel pro who loves building powerful systems and helping clients grow their businesses? We're on the hunt for someone just like you to join our fast-growing (and fun!) remote team.



You can start Part-Time, but must be available to move to Full-Time within first month — we've got new projects rolling in and need someone ready to hit the ground running.



The role starts at $24/hour after your first weeks of onboarding and training (USD). We value skill, reliability, and results — and reward tea
mbers who consistently deliver.



Only applications submitted through the Google Form below will be reviewed. Be sure to follow the instructions carefully — including entering the secret keyword in the correct place. (Yes, we're serious!)



Some training will be provided, but this role is for someone with advanced GoHighLevel and consulting experience. You'll manage your own client projects, help build full business systems in HighLevel, and bring smart solutions to the table.



We're expanding fast, and so will your role — if you're looking for a long-term opportunity where your skills can grow with the company, you'll feel right at home here. We run our own HighLevel SaaS agency, support other HighLevel SaaS businesses, and help users make the most of the platform.



Curious? Check out our YouTube channel: JonnyTheNomad



Primary Responsibilities:



Build and optimize sales funnels using GoHighLevel

Create and automate marketing workflows and CRM systems

Design landing pages and set up integrations with other platforms

Build custom AI chatbots with both standard Conversation AI and Closebot

Build and deploy AI agents that automate real client workflows



What We're Looking For:



Strong experience building funnels and automations in GoHighLevel

Confidence working with complex workflows and integrations

Hands-on experience with AI agents and modern AI tools — especially Claude (by Anthropic)

Clear and professional English communication — you'll be working directly with clients and managing their projects



Bonus Points If You Also Have:



Experience with Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Familiarity with other CRM or digital marketing tools

A background in digital marketing and past work as a HighLevel consultant

Experience building with Closebot AI bots

Experience building with Make, Zapier, n8n

Experience running paid ads on Meta or Google through HighLevel

A proactive, can-do attitude and love for learning new things



We've worked with talented tea
mbers from the Philippines before and value flexibility — as long as the work is done with care and quality, we trust you. Most of our clients are based in the US, so you must be able to work 9 AM – 5 PM EST. 



You'll also be supported by other full-time HighLevel consultants on our team who can help you get ramped up.



How to Apply:



Fill out our Google Form and make sure to include the keyword "OCTOPUS" in your response to the first question: "Where did you hear about this position?" Only applications that include the keyword and are submitted via the Google Form will be considered.



Apply here: 



We're excited to learn more about you and (hopefully!) welcome you to the team!

title: Lead Generation & Appointment Setter for Fitness Coaching Business
description:
Summary

Seeking a motivated, results-driven lead generation specialist to connect with potential clients, build relationships via social media & CRM, and book qualified Zoom consultations. Part-time weekends only. Flexible hours, performance bonuses, and a chance to grow in a fast-paced fitness business.



Part-Time | Hourly rate + Commission



About the Role



We’re a fast-growing online fitness coaching business looking for a Lead Generation Specialist / Appointment Setter to connect with potential clients, build rapport, and book qualified sales calls.



If you have a talent for starting conversations, nurturing relationships, and driving results — this role is for you!



Key Responsibilities



Lead Outreach & Engagement



Send outbound and inbound messages through social media platforms (Instagram,
, TikTok) and our CRM tool (GHL).



Maintain a minimum of 100 outbound messages per day per platform.



Qualify potential leads and schedule consultation calls with them via Zoom.



Follow-Up & Lead Nurturing



Reconnect with cold but qualified leads to restart the conversation.



Send reminders to booked leads to increase call show-up rates.



Check in with leads after calls (when the call was with another tea
mber).



Tracking & Reporting



Record daily outreach numbers, platform performance, offers made, and conversions.



Suggest and test new strategies to improve lead quality and conversion rates.



Collaboration & Communication



Attend weekly virtual tea
etings to review performance and share insights.



Stay in regular contact with the team during work hours via the provided communication channels.



What We’re Looking For



2+ years experience in social media communication or lead generation.



1+ year in online sales or appointment setting preferred.



Strong written and spoken English skills.



Tech-savvy with tools like Google Docs, G Suite, CRM platforms, Trello, and Zoom.



Self-motivated, organized, and detail-oriented.



Able to work evenings/weekends with some overlap in Eastern Standard Time.



Compensation & Growth



$5 hr USD 



Part-time.



Opportunities for pay increases and commission based on performance.



How to Apply



When applying, please include:



A short cover letter describing your relevant experience.



A brief explanation of why you’d be a great fit for this role.



Any examples of past work in lead generation, appointment setting, or social media outreach.



???? Tip for Applicants: We’re looking for someone who is proactive, communicative, and results-driven — if that’s you, we’d love to hear from you!
